name: Byron Donalds
subject: I don't usually send messages like this, but the situation is critical.
body:
We are on the brink of losing everything we’ve fought for.

---
| | | | | | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoscrdq64tactvonvn3pq7iamk8kdprio36kdgmg_rp22sh2s8i6epr7c3h62p74cph2bs)
---
| | | | | I don't usually send messages like this, but the situation is critical.

It's Trump-endorsed MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds, and I need you to read every word, because Democrats are trying to shut me up.

We are on the brink of losing everything we've fought for. The Democrats are launching an all-out assault on the MAGA Movement, and time is running out.

My race has become the _**[MOST TARGETED](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z3vvn7iab88lbdr0ap64k54p2h1tqg0gtqjn9f98_rp22sh2s8i6epr7c3h62p74cph2bs "MOST TARGETED")**_ race in the nation, because Democrats know if they take Florida from us, there's nothing they can't take.

As President Trump's STRONGEST ally, I'm working around the clock to defend our values, protect our freedoms, and preserve the future of this country.

But Democrats aren't slowing down--**they 're escalating.**

They're building a massive war chest worth millions to defeat me and silence voices like yours. They're using every tactic possible to dismantle President Trump's agenda and DESTROY MAGA

The last time I spoke with President Trump, he left me with three words:

**KEEP MAGA STRONG.**

I can't let him down, and if we don't make a response right here, the MAGA movement will be stopped in its tracks, and SEVERE consequences will follow.

We cannot let that happen.

That's why I'm reaching out to you right now with urgency.

I know how much you've done, and I hate asking again, but if I'm being honest:

**We have to be unified, right now.**

So I'm asking: Can I ask you to chip in ANY AMOUNT to support my race?
---
| | [STAND WITH MAGA](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2znpk78nav79pl7i193dkgv8l4673vl16v9f19oao_rp22sh2s8i6epr7c3h62p74cph2bs)
---

If MAGA falls short in Florida, the media will waste no time declaring our movement finished.

And once that happens, I fear we'll be at the point of no return.

Please, this was hard to write, but I can't stress this enough: This is **URGENT.**

With you by my side, we'll restore momentum, not just here in Florida, but **EVERYWHERE.**

Together, we will keep the momentum alive and secure victory for President Trump, YOU, and all of MAGA.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAGA](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zolphursi1lf7uvbgkmhpupudiebleb7pn8t9hd0_rp22sh2s8i6epr7c3h62p74cph2bs)
---

God bless,

Byron

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: She’s tough as nails
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body:
She’s a no-nonsense conservative fighter facing her toughest battle yet...

| | | | Peter, we're on the precipice of greatness, but that can all be washed away if we lose focus on the long-term goal: Defending the House Majority in 2026.
---
| | **THE BAD NEWS**
---
| | Democrats are using our Republican trifecta as a powerful motivating tool to rile up their deep-pocketed liberal donors. Democrats are raising millions of dollars and have released their list of TOP TARGETS for 2026, and right on that list is: Jen Kiggans.
---
| | **ABOUT JEN**
---
| | Finding someone like Jen is as tough as can be: it's nearly impossible. Jen joined our ranks in 2022, where she flipped a BLUE seat RED. In 2024, Jen defended her seat by just 3.8% -- we came dangerously close to losing this GOP superstar.

There's no one else like Jen:
---
| |
* Jen comes from a long line of veterans: She followed in her family's footsteps when she felt called to serve as a Navy helicopter pilot in the Persian Gulf.
* After her service in the Navy, Jen continued to serve her community as an Adult-Geriatric Primary Care Nurse Practitioner.
* Jen felt the call to serve in Congress after watching how Democrats in Washington ultimately failed to serve: she couldn't sit on the sidelines anymore.

---
| | **HERE 'S WHERE THINGS STAND**
---
| | Jen is a TOP TARGET of a Democrat Super PAC that will invest millions in negative ads, paid protestors, and attacks to try and flip her seat. Losing Jen means losing the House Majority, and the America-First Movement is all but lost.

[**So please, chip in any amount to rush resources to Jen 's campaign so we can keep a GOP superstar fighting for America first in Washington.**](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cU97U3YUoQnpTA)
---
| | [ **CHIP IN $10** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
| | [ **CHIP IN $25** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-7FadLfbg)
---

---
| | [ **CHIP IN $100** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
| | [ **CHIP IN $250** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-w)
---
| | [ **CHIP IN ANY AMOUNT** ](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.-RSCORWyA)
---
| | I know this was a longer-than-usual email, but __**I cannot stress enough**__ how important it is we keep Jen in Congress--I'm counting on you to help this Navy Vet fight back against the far Left's attacks!

Talk soon,

Speaker Mike Johnson
---
| | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)
---
| |
---
| | [](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews.)I would not be where I am today without the help of my incredible and faithful supporters like you. Because of your support, I can keep fighting to make our country stronger.

Together we will get our country back on the right track and secure America's success! [SUPPORT JEN KIGGANS
](https://trk.emails.dailygopnews._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPTIwMjYwNTAzXzZNLVJFLjExNDUxMF90MTg4NjQ3MS0yMDY4JmV4X3RpZD0yMDI2MDUwM182TS1SRS4xMTQ1MTBfdDE4ODY0NzEtMjA2OCZ4aWQ9VjEuMXhKZ2FYQ0pwWXRFaUZVMllKQWFGb0ZwSkE2a0w2WXVCRzJLeFg5N1VxMjBjcEZXZkdsbExqQU9zX1ZrMU5saCJ9/YCzJ8xYIFZhUJLgPnsDfmA)| | Paid for by Kiggans for Congress

subject: I never had the means to self-fund a campaign

body:
| Hi, it’s Deb.
---
_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you only want our most important email updates,[click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/108?t=2&akid=2179%2E259176%2E460YPz) If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/109?t=3&akid=2179%2E259176%2E460YPz)_

Hi Peter, Deb Haaland here. While it might feel far away, November is quickly approaching and everyone — including National Republicans eying this race — is watching to see if we have the grassroots power it’ll take to win. _Fox News called New Mexico’s gubernatorial race one of the GOP’s biggest opportunities!_ So I want to personally reach out to you, the individuals who power this race, to share some notes I jotted down about what your grassroots support means to me. Here at Blue Amp, we’re dedicated to uplifting the movers and shakers who will defend our shared democratic values and beat back against right-wing authoritarianism. The midterms are coming up, and we can’t do this work without you. With your support, we'll work to halt the right-wing agenda and support strong Democrats who will fight for us across the country.

body:
Please don’t delete this.

| [](http://links.markharrisfornc.com/u/click?_t=7ae0368403444298b9ce39d60ff0dbbc&_m=0a814a126aed45a0b042a68f6d61d4d9&_e=oMIvfyVdwshZ6UvnYs7fg94MZVnsBma2yVNHctKRw1k8uFm3GTt96G6TR8XF5Z61wXTDp_gRyH73EoeQLqNGo08isclBebM_OmpGEoIXT9evl-y7z-HHZ_zwYgxJUNQXaiSMnkc5owrHBO4ddasl62fXsaJzRLTpeVUt7zAcScUwEMP_LsjAGK7OrZvPANijrOqq3CZSRMfROc95knVrVCTO01kLKF-HDUcWWE1DFDchwgrtcPUdfVoMFvekpswQAxJMCZwf_owvJkHZo1LPh-I3LGq_kM2pQUhFfmDrAqVA-H3-HrAcfJPvnUpjhEPdBnznxt_J5dTRr8-XY9qloKIgOM3PCuWpiDucz_uf_ao5YWCu7dGMlw5DF1evAaMvETp7vwvxLwqHF2LXC-pIs-jxLn3ei5GFOqROKiPZc6g9x3YdXY7tqDhm71OyyDNv7-FENEq6U6sHICCEoOhtAD0MglyQan8IjNUV74Zs61biWOimTNh43D4351oqFYoyZkuY3DG9QRrHNPTdYhNk1g%3D%3D)

Friend,

I’m asking you to take a moment.

_Not to donate.
Not to click through anything._

**[Just to pause and pray.](http://links.markharrisfornc.com/u/click?_t=7ae0368403444298b9ce39d60ff0dbbc&_m=0a814a126aed45a0b042a68f6d61d4d9&_e=oMIvfyVdwshZ6UvnYs7fg94MZVnsBma2yVNHctKRw1k8uFm3GTt96G6TR8XF5Z61wXTDp_gRyH73EoeQLqNGo08isclBebM_OmpGEoIXT9evl-y7z-HHZ_zwYgxJUNQXaiSMnkc5owrHBO4ddasl6z1tI-mIN6hN9wvETiI1uMGAn1ldP4o1YDq90xScqcFgEqyhtuiZ3u1ZGg2zp-F3I1o4H4IEk7msBfI2EoVYcbHPzmEtVzKD2zsVUOhnySFJiBqMuGJYwDQfCorM9ghxgdBD-BaXIsiEY1RyWBGkXzmCmyCoL4f10aDHGoMY4rTmj8bmSskBnfpydD64IkfvZwK5x9NqeZrgRk0Rp3RtGi7g0ohtTPhomeUAnpojHeTZt5quQsCIZL-ZEoAZeni7mmidxlsueFvlUiBUIE1Ne_MDoZOGq6Wp2sDDtAD55zEG4FVP9xEJMq1OjkyhI2SicgUzVm6AqPUCZa62yk-wyCXhTVo2gxl_zcg1XPvV-qmglE99qswqfVEPBWumjaUtmQ%3D%3D)**

President Trump has carried an enormous weight—constant attacks, pressure, and responsibility that most people will never fully understand.

And whether you agree with everything or not, one thing is clear: No one should have to stand alone through that.

_Right now, he needs strength,
He needs protection.
He needs people willing to lift him up—even in a small way._

So I’m asking you: **[Take 30 seconds.](http://links.markharrisfornc.com/u/click?_t=7ae0368403444298b9ce39d60ff0dbbc&_m=0a814a126aed45a0b042a68f6d61d4d9&_e=oMIvfyVdwshZ6UvnYs7fg94MZVnsBma2yVNHctKRw1k8uFm3GTt96G6TR8XF5Z61wXTDp_gRyH73EoeQLqNGo08isclBebM_OmpGEoIXT9evl-y7z-HHZ_zwYgxJUNQXaiSMnkc5owrHBO4ddasl666ke8K4rewzKrjtIvaeepWUzovEcQt4T-mS4cTBLfNDyB4HLSSudtz57ep4zxie2NKpg6BYep3vA_PJjIIVsCmnICa2j52XOlLbLuKlHP_mRZxgjslpbcr2MgXMj5q5koKXiC3PkRllahqu9pEj23HZSNRxm2J3TolqSPGeKIGZBfxroL0cqHqv15d5I7QoUQtEPbXp1s8NVBtw-3qBa3XXq5TisiQzpSYKlfYd1VkSbbNs3QFbfV9MSuogff83oVRlwbAxv_8sVOXFGBpXJhtj3JwZUEbRR029WSpjMiSUiShL0bZTkqeXIDWzot_TzAp9DH_P7LLRtnySsKN0HWf05y8MdKaoi91l4x2rXr-tmiEgJZ928a3Iq0ZEpEHjBA%3D%3D)**

clean_body: Please don’t delete this. | Friend, I’m asking you to take a moment. Not to donate. Not to click through anything. President Trump has carried an enormous weight—constant attacks, pressure, and responsibility that most people will never fully understand. And whether you agree with everything or not, one thing is clear: No one should have to stand alone through that. Right now, he needs strength, He needs protection. He needs people willing to lift him up—even in a small way. So I’m asking you: It may seem small. But moments like that matter. Thank you for taking the time. —Christians for Trump Paid for by Mark Harris for Congress Copyright (C) 2026 Mark Harris for Congress, All rights reserved.

name: Byron Donalds
subject: I don't usually send messages like this, but the situation is critical.
body:
We are on the brink of losing everything we’ve fought for.

---
| | | | | | | [](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkM1qhDAURp8m7iL5G6OLLAqDu-miFLqUmFyd0JjITZxh3r5Y6AN0fzjf4fu6TTcbYkjru93AYF0mLFPwOdWjHDbGV4HkNyjFrlDiJJjoKLtQJk-ON9545y13DRiute65VLxr7oYvqpNeD3IBpxXrlXDdAAP3WgvnB90Ec6rYhUkumZSq7XvF5NLpywzKzgsjitkIWFuE_ZhjcDZVW76XjA5al7cmmnuteyHyjYiRiLGAOxDaZ0gI_iSIGOcX5kR9Tjb6QpeMdM0PwJSRiNHnRHcsO4XNhkgdhhqcjfTBaeF0zzuR41G3qToirx-fo6B_yUR0eK5hSCuR14oHNGj8_gwxhtJpoth6On876_9ffRjxEwAA__-OuIcN)
---
| | | | | I don't usually send messages like this, but the situation is critical.

It's Trump-endorsed MAGA Patriot Byron Donalds, and I need you to read every word, because Democrats are trying to shut me up.

We are on the brink of losing everything we've fought for. The Democrats are launching an all-out assault on the MAGA Movement, and time is running out.

My race has become the _**[MOST TARGETED](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkM1qhDAURp8m7iL5G6OLLAqDu-miFLqUmFyd0JjITZxh3r5Y6AN0fzjf4fu6TTcbYkjru93AYF0mLFPwOdWjHDbGV4HkNyjFrlDiJJjoKLtQJk-ON9545y13DRiute65VLxr7oYvqpNeD3IBpxXrlXDdAAP3WgvnB90Ec6rYhUkumZSq7XvF5NLpywzKzgsjitkIWFuE_ZhjcDZVW76XjA5al7cmmnuteyHyjYiRiLGAOxDaZ0gI_iSIGOcX5kR9Tjb6QpeMdM0PwJSRiNHnRHcsO4XNhkgdhhqcjfTBaeF0zzuR41G3qToirx-fo6B_yUR0eK5hSCuR14oHNGj8_gwxhtJpoth6On876_9ffRjxEwAA__-OuIcN "MOST TARGETED")**_ race in the nation, because Democrats know if they take Florida from us, there's nothing they can't take.

As President Trump's STRONGEST ally, I'm working around the clock to defend our values, protect our freedoms, and preserve the future of this country.

But Democrats aren't slowing down--**they 're escalating.**

They're building a massive war chest worth millions to defeat me and silence voices like yours. They're using every tactic possible to dismantle President Trump's agenda and DESTROY MAGA

The last time I spoke with President Trump, he left me with three words:

**KEEP MAGA STRONG.**

I can't let him down, and if we don't make a response right here, the MAGA movement will be stopped in its tracks, and SEVERE consequences will follow.

We cannot let that happen.

That's why I'm reaching out to you right now with urgency.

I know how much you've done, and I hate asking again, but if I'm being honest:

**We have to be unified, right now.**

So I'm asking: Can I ask you to chip in ANY AMOUNT to support my race?
---
| | [STAND WITH MAGA](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkM1qhDAURp8m7iL5G6OLLAqDu-miFLqUmFyd0JjITZxh3r5Y6AN0fzjf4fu6TTcbYkjru93AYF0mLFPwOdWjHDbGV4HkNyjFrlDiJJjoKLtQJk-ON9545y13DRiute65VLxr7oYvqpNeD3IBpxXrlXDdAAP3WgvnB90Ec6rYhUkumZSq7XvF5NLpywzKzgsjitkIWFuE_ZhjcDZVW76XjA5al7cmmnuteyHyjYiRiLGAOxDaZ0gI_iSIGOcX5kR9Tjb6QpeMdM0PwJSRiNHnRHcsO4XNhkgdhhqcjfTBaeF0zzuR41G3qToirx-fo6B_yUR0eK5hSCuR14oHNGj8_gwxhtJpoth6On876_9ffRjxEwAA__-OuIcN)
---

If MAGA falls short in Florida, the media will waste no time declaring our movement finished.

And once that happens, I fear we'll be at the point of no return.

Please, this was hard to write, but I can't stress this enough: This is **URGENT.**

With you by my side, we'll restore momentum, not just here in Florida, but **EVERYWHERE.**

Together, we will keep the momentum alive and secure victory for President Trump, YOU, and all of MAGA.

---
| | [STAND WITH MAGA](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkM1qhDAURp8m7iL5G6OLLAqDu-miFLqUmFyd0JjITZxh3r5Y6AN0fzjf4fu6TTcbYkjru93AYF0mLFPwOdWjHDbGV4HkNyjFrlDiJJjoKLtQJk-ON9545y13DRiute65VLxr7oYvqpNeD3IBpxXrlXDdAAP3WgvnB90Ec6rYhUkumZSq7XvF5NLpywzKzgsjitkIWFuE_ZhjcDZVW76XjA5al7cmmnuteyHyjYiRiLGAOxDaZ0gI_iSIGOcX5kR9Tjb6QpeMdM0PwJSRiNHnRHcsO4XNhkgdhhqcjfTBaeF0zzuR41G3qToirx-fo6B_yUR0eK5hSCuR14oHNGj8_gwxhtJpoth6On876_9ffRjxEwAA__-OuIcN)
---

God bless,

Byron

---
| [](https://email.alert.republicantaskforce.com/c/eJyUkM1qhDAURp8m7iL5G6OLLAqDu-miFLqUmFyd0JjITZxh3r5Y6AN0fzjf4fu6TTcbYkjru93AYF0mLFPwOdWjHDbGV4HkNyjFrlDiJJjoKLtQJk-ON9545y13DRiute65VLxr7oYvqpNeD3IBpxXrlXDdAAP3WgvnB90Ec6rYhUkumZSq7XvF5NLpywzKzgsjitkIWFuE_ZhjcDZVW76XjA5al7cmmnuteyHyjYiRiLGAOxDaZ0gI_iSIGOcX5kR9Tjb6QpeMdM0PwJSRiNHnRHcsO4XNhkgdhhqcjfTBaeF0zzuR41G3qToirx-fo6B_yUR0eK5hSCuR14oHNGj8_gwxhtJpoth6On876_9ffRjxEwAA__-OuIcN)
---

name: Jen Kiggans
subject: I don’t say thank you enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kiggans for Congress
body:
I wouldn’t be able to do this without you on my team...

THANK YOU, Peter..! I really mean it.
I know that my campaign wouldn’t survive without support from patriots like you and I don’t say thank you enough..!
As a Navy veteran and a proud conservative, I'm committed to fighting for the values that make our country great. I know that with your help, we can make a real difference in the lives of Virginians and Americans everywhere.
Your contribution is more than just a donation - it's a vital investment in our shared vision for a stronger, more prosperous America. I'm dedicated to being a responsible steward of your trust and working tirelessly on your behalf.
Thank you again for your support. I look forward to staying in touch and keeping you updated on our progress.
Sincerely,[](https://trk.join.jenforcongress._cmVjdXJyaW5nPXRydWUmZXhfdGlkPTIwMjYwNTAzXzZBLUZWLjExMDExN190MTg4NjY3NS0yMDY4JnV0bV9jYW1wYWlnbj0yMDI2MDUwM182QS1GVi4xMTAxMTdfdDE4ODY2NzUtMjA2OCJ9/ETpcugbnNIgtHO1zIeGdCA)Jen Kiggans

PS: If you can spare a few dollars to support my campaign, it would be a huge help! The 2026 election is already well underway and the Democrats will do whatever it takes to flip this seat Blue. name: VoteVets Headquarters
subject: We’re going to DC
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
We send Veterans to the Capitol to advocate for our legislative agenda. Men and women who have sworn the oath, worn the uniform, and can speak with a clarity and authority that Members of Congress and their staff cannot deny.
#
Peter:
If you’ve been with us for a while, you’ll know about our Veteran Fly-Ins.
We send Veterans to the Capitol to advocate for our legislative agenda. Men and women who have sworn the oath, worn the uniform, and can speak with a clarity and authority that Members of Congress and their staff cannot deny.
We’ve got one of those Fly-Ins scheduled for later this month, and we’d like to tell you about it.
With Republicans sitting by as Trump wages war without authorization, we’re sending Veterans to their offices to hold their feet to the fire and demand action. We fought the last Forever Wars, and we’re going to do whatever we can to save a new generation of our brothers and sisters from the same fate.
Here’s how this works. It costs about $1,000 for us to send one of these Veterans to DC, after flights and hotels. Depends on where they’re coming from, but that’s about how the math shakes out.
Every dollar we raise from this email is going to go towards getting Veterans on planes and into Congressional offices. Every single dollar. If everybody reading this right now chipped in just a buck or two, we’d have enough to field an entire regiment, but we know that’s not going to happen.
All we’re asking is for you to chip in if you can afford to, because anything helps.
[**How about it, Peter? Are you good for $3? That kind of help would be huge, but the donation matters more than the amount.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-may26-flights.-7bqxh&refcode=em260503-1-60&t=1&akid=35125%2E3013755%2E6-aF08)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | [CHIP IN $3](https://act.votevets.org/go/2933?c0=vv-pac-em-may26-flights.V_FWV2&refcode=em260503-1-60&amount=3&t=2&akid=35125%2E3013755%2E6-aF08)
---
****
| [CHIP IN MORE](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-may26-flights.-7bqxh&refcode=em260503-1-60&t=3&akid=35125%2E3013755%2E6-aF08)
---
****
Thank you for the help, and we’ll be sure to keep you updated on this mobilization as things develop.
The team at VoteVets

PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS.ORG, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE

body:

_**A Special Message from our Sponsor**_ _Please note that views expressed in this message do not necessarily reflect those of_ _Parler_ _and do not constitute an endorsement or recommendation by_ _Parler_ _._
---
| Rudy Giuliani This is why the President and I did NOT take plea deals. | | **_FROM THE DESK OF RUDY W. GIULIANI_**
---
Dear Friend,
---
When I was arrested in Fulton County in the most violent jail in America, I could’ve made all the legal battles magically disappear overnight...
---
_...I could’ve betrayed the truth by going on camera, dropping to my knees, and saying that the 2020 election was perfectly fair, transparent, and completely free of fraud!_
---
In fact, some who were arrested __did__ take plea deals.
---
**But the President and I did NOT.**
---
Our position was clear: **__NEVER_ _SURRENDER_!_**
---
As the old saying goes, “I’d rather die on my feet than live on my knees.”
---
_And now, the TRUTH is finally coming out:_
---
**“Fulton County admits to verifying 315,000 votes in 2020 without poll worker signatures”**
_-Atlanta News First_
---
But unfortunately, bloodthirsty left-wing tyrants do not care about the truth.
---
**I am _still_ being PROSECUTED by a vengeful Democrat Attorney General who wants to imprison me as part of her re-election campaign platform _this_ year.**
---
And with reports of a blue wave coming, she thinks she can get away with it – because voters will not stop her.
---
_Well, I beg to differ..._
---
_The people can stop her right here, right now by signing onto the People’s Defense of Rudy W. Giuliani in light of new evidence that adds even MORE doubt to the integrity of the 2020 election._
---
[**Please show YOUR support by adding your name to the _People’s Defense of Rudy W. Giuliani_ – as I face up to 20 YEARS in prison as an innocent man in a case where the President legally cannot pardon me.**](https://click.parlermailer.com/?qs=ABB7InYiOjEsImQiOjQ4NjV9AAwAAAAAAGs3TVSTBryZ1bW75z4uYc-61SHNSTFH78hdDuTBRsT5m9XDiW0fLXhUf28-0RCqeGrfL_kIFvZUaYJoRSuzf5TWHz7DZlUuqWypvLYC)

name: =?UTF-8?Q?Eduardo_Ver=C3=A1stegui?=
subject: Friend, Alice was taken, but she was found
body:
She was rescued. Many are still waiting. You can help find them.

| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e912644/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvU1ZIeER0aHhZZQ/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA1MDM/LbmNsa05CU3ZlNA/qP2hpZHM9bmNYTUFTcnZtdFhwTVBscw/gafdMUA/s4vf13b80b0)
| | [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
| |
---
| GOD'S CHILDREN ARE NOT FOR SALE
---
|
---
| | Friend, A little girl sat alone in the dark. Lured online by someone pretending to care and taken from her home. Kidnapped and hidden away in a remote cabin, where she was abused, and sold online. And passed from one man to another. **Her name is Alice.**
---
[ Rescue A Child Now ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
And this is the part most people never hear. **She was found. An investigator in Florida traced her trafficker’s username. He saw a connection others missed and contacted the FBI.** Agents followed the digital trail, tracing the trafficker’s **IP address**. They moved in, raided the location and rescued her. **Alive.**
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Her trafficker now faces **20 years to life** in prison. This is what happens when someone goes looking.
This is what happens when the right tools are in place. But there are still so many children who have not been found yet. Still waiting.
Still trapped.
---
[ Rescue A Child Now](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
And that is why the **Sound of Freedom Foundation** exists. Friend, if this is your first time hearing about us, the **Sound of Freedom Foundation’s** mission is clear: **_To stop the sale of God’s children._** The foundation extends the reach of the _Sound of Freedom_ film, bringing awareness to the reality of child trafficking and taking action to stop it. Our vision is simple: **_A world where every child is safe and free._** We work with partners to prevent exploitation before it begins, support rescue operations, and equip investigators. Our partners walk with survivors as they heal and rebuild their lives. Because rescue is only the beginning. And right now, there is an urgent need. We are launching ** _Operation Search and Rescue,_** a __ mission to connect investigators and agents, identify traffickers, and build criminal evidence.

We will support real rescue operations using tools like **digital tracking and face recognition**. This is how children are found and how traffickers are stopped.
And today, you can be part of it. **And right now, your donation will be matched, dollar for dollar.** **A concerned Child Defense Organization** **has approved** **a** **$10,000 MATCHING GRANT**.
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Every dollar you give will be **doubled**. **$25 Gift Doubles to $50**
**$50 Gift Doubles to $100**
**$100 Gift Doubles to $200**
**$250 Gift Doubles to $500**
**$500 Gift Doubles to $1,000** Your gift goes twice as far to help find and rescue children. **This is God multiplying love.** [](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**[Your donation of $25, $50, $100 or whatever you can give today can have twice the impact, and double the chance to bring a child home.](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)**
---
[ Double My Impact Now ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Jesus said, _“Whoever welcomes one little child like this in my name welcomes me.”_(Matthew 18:5) **Today you can be that welcome.**
**You can enable the search and help the rescue mission to bring a child home.** Please give as generously as you can while your gift is matched. And please pray for Alice, and for the children still waiting.
And for the day when every child is safe and free. **Because**** _God’s children are not for sale._** With gratitude and prayer,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Eduardo Verástegui
Sound of Freedom, Producer
For the Sound of Freedom Foundation
---
[ Support the Sound of Freedom Foundation ](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
6671 Southwest Freeway, Suite 700, Houston TX 77074
---

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **America First War Room**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.com/click/e912644/VaHR0cHM6Ly93cm8ubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYW1lcmljYU9ORXN0d2Fycm9vbV9jb20yNjA1MDM/LbmNsa05CU3ZlNA/qP2hpZHM9bmNYTUFTcnZtdFhwTVBscw/gafdMUA/sdk33469d79)

body:
Roy needs your help to fight back and surge ahead.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6532?source=&t=1&akid=1268%2E124072%2EO0V2pT)
| | | |
---
**CRITICAL UPDATE VIA INSIDE ELECTIONS**
Peter, experts at Inside Elections just released their 2026 Senate rankings, and North Carolina is **one of only three “Toss-Up” races in the country.

Even more importantly, it’s the ONLY “Toss-Up” race where a Republican currently holds the seat.**
| | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/10336?amount=5&t=8&akid=1268%2E124072%2EO0V2pT)
---
That’s why the GOP’s super PAC is pouring at least $71 MILLION into North Carolina – and it’s why President Trump is personally attacking Roy. They know that Democrats have no chance at taking back the Senate without flipping this crucial seat blue, so they’re doing and spending whatever they can to defeat us.
**Roy needs your help to fight back, Peter.[With a recent poll showing this race statistically tied, will you chip in $5 or more today to help us surge ahead, win in North Carolina and take back the Senate for Democrats?](https://act.roycooper.com/go/10336?amount=5&t=9&akid=1268%2E124072%2EO0V2pT)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/10337?amount=5&t=10&akid=1268%2E124072%2EO0V2pT)
---

---

---
| | [DONATE ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.roycooper.com/go/10319?t=13&akid=1268%2E124072%2EO0V2pT)
---
Thank you,

Team Cooper
| |
* * *
[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/8188?t=2&akid=1268%2E124072%2EO0V2pT)
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**_[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/6533?source=&t=3&akid=1268%2E124072%2EO0V2pT)_**

name: The PreBorn! Team
subject: An excellent way to honor a mom this Motherâ€™s Day
body:
This Mother’s Day weekend, many people will call their moms

| | | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhgvoadmtagovedba8srfifbpejnnkunbd3u5bog_rp22sh2s8i6epr7c3j68oj1chh2bs)
---
Friend of Life, This Mother’s Day weekend, many people will call their moms, sit around a table together, or take a moment to remember the woman who gave them life. In those moments, it becomes clear just how much of who we are has been shaped by someone who chose to step into motherhood, even when it required sacrifice, patience, and strength. **But not every woman will experience Mother’s Day that way.** Right now, there are women sitting alone, trying to decide if they will become mothers at all. Everything around them is telling them to move quickly, to decide before they have time to process what’s happening, before they have space to ask questions, before they have ever seen the life they carry. Some of them are sitting in their cars, staring at the doors in front of them, telling themselves this is the only way forward, even though something inside them keeps asking them to wait just a little longer. **[And if nothing interrupts that moment, the decision will be made in minutes.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ztachntovhuiher18r7olje3fm7grvcqcnlia6sg_rp22sh2s8i6epr7c3j68oj1chh2bs)** That is why PreBorn! exists. Because when a woman is given the chance to see her baby on an ultrasound, something begins to change. The screen lights up. The heartbeat fills the room. What once felt distant suddenly becomes real in a way she cannot ignore. For the first time, she is no longer choosing in fear or pressure, but with clarity. And more than 80% of women choose life in that moment. Months later, she is not carrying the weight of a decision she cannot undo or wondering what might have been. She is holding her baby. **[This Mother’s Day, there is no more meaningful way to honor a mom in your life than by helping another woman become one.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6lmm7hotqr8ivkbcdtqu1cvjggrrpob7rjh921g_rp22sh2s8i6epr7c3j68oj1chh2bs)** $28 provides one ultrasound, and that single moment can change everything. Will you step into that moment today?

subject: Let me be blunt about New Hampshire →
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
body:
[](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/221?c0=em_ms_cp_20260503_1._ggzlc&refcode=em20260503-1&t=1&akid=6427%2E582294%2EITaAlC)
Governor JB Pritzker here.
Let me be blunt: **_Everything we care about is on the line in 2026 — and New Hampshire could decide the outcome._**
We’ve already seen the damage Trump’s second term is inflicting on our country: His ICE agents are once again targeting families in broad daylight -- tearing apart communities, rounding up workers, and instilling fear across entire neighborhoods. He’s gutting environmental protections while utility rates spike, forcing working families to foot the bill so his billionaire donors can cash out.
He has no interest in bipartisanship, decency, or democracy. **And if Democrats don’t take back the Senate this November, there will be nothing stopping him.** That’s why we _must_ win in New Hampshire.
**[Chris Pappas is running in a tied race that could decide Senate control. Chip in $5 now to help him win.](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260503_1.M8ZFN-&refcode=em20260503-1&t=2&akid=6427%2E582294%2EITaAlC)**
Trump and his MAGA allies are laser-focused on New Hampshire. They’ve recruited a big-name candidate, they’re lining up GOP billionaire donors, and they know if they win here, they’ll shut the door on a Democratic Senate majority.
We can’t let that happen.
Chris Pappas is a fighter. He’s taken on Big Pharma, defended reproductive freedom, and delivered for working families in one of the toughest districts in the country.
I want him in the Senate. But we’re all going to have to come together to get him there. He’s running in a true battleground. His race is tied. And the GOP machine, desperate to keep Democrats locked out of power, is ready to bury him in dark money and attack ads.
**[That’s why I’m asking-- urgently -- for your help: Can you chip in $5 to help Chris Pappas win in New Hampshire and give us a fighting chance to stop Trump?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260503_1.M8ZFN-&refcode=em20260503-1&t=3&akid=6427%2E582294%2EITaAlC)**
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260503_1.M8ZFN-&amount=5&refcode=em20260503-1&t=22&akid=6427%2E582294%2EITaAlC)**
The damage is real. The stakes are massive. And the time to act is right now.
Thank you for standing with Chris and for standing up to the madness.
JB Pritzker
Governor of Illinois
**New Hampshire is poised to be one of the closest Senate races in the country. Will you chip in today to help Chris stop the Republicans from flipping the Granite State red and expanding their Senate majority?**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_cp_footer?refcode=em20260503-1&t=23&refcode2=6427_582294_ITaAlC&akid=6427%2E582294%2EITaAlC)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_receive_fewer_emails/?t=24&akid=6427%2E582294%2EITaAlC)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.chrispappas.org/signup/cps_update_your_information/?t=25&akid=6427%2E582294%2EITaAlC)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.chrispappas.org/unsubscribe/cps_unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=6427%2E582294%2EITaAlC)

Email us: [teampappas@chrispappas.org](mailto:teampappas@chrispappas.org)
Paid for by Chris Pappas for Senate
Chris Pappas for Senate
PO Box 313
Manchester, NH 03105
United States

name: Cleo Fields
subject: This decision tears open wounds that have never fully healed
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE DSCC OF LA
body:
Six unelected judges in robes decided that Black voices are unconstitutional. This is segregation by map. It is Jim Crow with a gavel.
| | | | | [](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013Jy5LtaHu-zGVSlbcPbMxdVfJ2NRTgZ5I9rxqGFnUTp4fTKmCHpqIz1emIFtsZGuyN95lVV-V3b9a75Hk1Fgq2qnIUW6GVl3HyRHzyGhQCMrdRfEJ_60LlbJrzUSGhqv7Rfmj1tmYzBbLZLejPOvd6M7X19xFK73fceRXwxpp5iOLthfIq-LLGEUPCVPOmhAS75YStnxqvOW9brqiQlfClzXbymFwwhY5nrXuT--XCc=&c=5uEOP4t23tjelsK_8OS0855BREcMa8BRQPTNbsIuqazceZQWf3lvDw==&ch=7DztqdAJ9-Pxa1xl7Q2KQw4j82vjTg6HbgDBN-TUfrBFLdGM3YsVQg==)
---
| Peter,
My name is Cleo Fields. I represent Louisiana's 6th Congressional District. And earlier this week, the United States Supreme Court put a target on my back.
In a 6-3 decision, the court's MAGA majority declared that my district is unconstitutional. They gutted Section 2 of the Voting Rights Act, the protection that Civil Rights leaders gave their blood to secure.

---
| [](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013Jy5LtaHu-zGVSlbcPbMxdVfJ2NRTgZ5I9rxqGFnUTp4fTKmCHpqIz1emIFtsZGuyN95lVV-V3b9a75Hk1Fgq2qnIUW6GVl3HyRHzyGhQCMrdRfEJ_60LlbJrzUSGhqv7Rfmj1tmYzBbLZLejPOvd6M7X19xFK73fceRXwxpp5iOLthfIq-LLGEUPCVPOmhAS75YStnxqvOW9brqiQlfCkW_Wb3JSxi41IFIh8dEAWU=&c=5uEOP4t23tjelsK_8OS0855BREcMa8BRQPTNbsIuqazceZQWf3lvDw==&ch=7DztqdAJ9-Pxa1xl7Q2KQw4j82vjTg6HbgDBN-TUfrBFLdGM3YsVQg==)
---

Six unelected judges in robes decided that Black voices are unconstitutional. This is segregation by map. It is Jim Crow with a gavel.
This decision tears open wounds that have never fully healed. The Voting Rights Act was born from Selma. From Birmingham. From the Canal Street sit-ins in New Orleans and the 106-mile march from Bogalusa to the steps of this Capitol. John Lewis bled on that bridge. Medgar Evers was assassinated in his driveway. Dr. King gave his life. Fannie Lou Hamer stood before the world and declared she was sick and tired of being sick and tired. They gave everything so Black Americans would never again be stripped of their voice.
And now Louisiana Governor Jeff Landry wants to suspend Louisiana's upcoming congressional elections on May 16th so he can silence the Black voters that I represent before the 2026 midterm elections.
Early voting is already underway. Louisianans are casting ballots at this very moment. He wants to throw those votes in the trash and rush a new gerrymandered map through the legislature before anyone can stop him. All to erase a majority-Black district and to silence the voters who sent me to Congress.
They have done everything in their power to make sure Black Louisianans do not have a seat at the table. They will not succeed. I have fought this fight before and I will fight it again. The torch that the Civil Rights Movement passed to us is still burning and I refuse to let it go out.
[But I cannot do this alone. MAGA is moving heaven and earth to try and erase my district and silence the voters I represent. I need Democrats everywhere to help me carry the torch. Will you rush a donation of $50, $25, or whatever you can spare between my campaign and Louisiana Democrats today to help me fight back?](https://eub669hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=0013Jy5LtaHu-zGVSlbcPbMxdVfJ2NRTgZ5I9rxqGFnUTp4fTKmCHpqIz1emIFtsZGugbh0YiWVMR_AyZ7dPOrTzXgp_yecnmPgftwmkGQZuDHXR4TDEpSTF9eIXDOalWhDNtyf7vlxnO17QLhtD0t52l1Iopc2gBS71veH2O_VWdTsJMm5reaESrBeQOuWaRc5JPL59ClCliOqsc5xko358tatVqiD9sbv40zZF_XY0XyqrznOzUBW_--RiJCQau8K&c=5uEOP4t23tjelsK_8OS0855BREcMa8BRQPTNbsIuqazceZQWf3lvDw==&ch=7DztqdAJ9-Pxa1xl7Q2KQw4j82vjTg6HbgDBN-TUfrBFLdGM3YsVQg==)
---

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Less than half…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

We’ll be brutally honest, Peter:

Our grassroots fundraising has significantly slowed. Just take a look for
yourself:

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260503.lw3DVv&refcode=em20260503-37740&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=37740%2E1203867%2E6UyIHh ]Bar graph showing April fundraising being half of what was raised in
March.

In April, we raised less than half as much as we did in March from
one-time donations.

That’s not good, especially as we head into the next four months of
Democratic primary elections, starting with Chris Rabb’s race in
Pennsylvania on May 19.

We came out swinging in the 2026 election cycle, endorsing 15 progressive
candidates running in open House seats or challenging out-of-touch
Democratic incumbents. So far, we’ve lost three of these races and won
one.

There are eleven more primaries to go, giving us the opportunity to send a
dozen Justice Democrats to join our Squad in Congress and fight for the
working class.

But since we don’t take any corporate contributions, we depend directly on
grassroots contributions from folks like you to fuel our candidates and
fight back against AIPAC, billionaires, and corporate super PACs.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260503.lw3DVv&refcode=em20260503-37740&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=37740%2E1203867%2E6UyIHh ]If we don’t pick things up FAST, we won’t be able to invest as much as
we planned into these critical primary races. So
Peter, can we count on you to
pitch in $5 now?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20260503.lw3DVv&refcode=em20260503-37740&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1022&akid=37740%2E1203867%2E6UyIHh ]Contribute $5

This year’s midterms are a major opportunity for our people-powered
movement to not only take seats back from Republicans, but to elect better
Democrats who will actually fight for the progressive policies we deserve
and demand.

Thank you for anything you can chip in to fuel our work and transform the
Party.

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20260503-37740-footer&t=1023&refcode2=37740_1203867_6UyIHh&akid=37740%2E1203867%2E6UyIHh

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=37740%2E1203867%2E6UyIHh

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

That’s not good, especially as we head into the next four months of Democratic primary elections, starting with Chris Rabb’s race in Pennsylvania on May 19. We came out swinging in the 2026 election cycle, endorsing 15 progressive candidates running in open House seats or challenging out-of-touch Democratic incumbents. So far, we’ve lost three of these races and won one. There are eleven more primaries to go, giving us the opportunity to send a dozen Justice Democrats to join our Squad in Congress and fight for the working class. But since we don’t take any corporate contributions, we depend directly on grassroots contributions from folks like you to fuel our candidates and fight back against AIPAC, billionaires, and corporate super PACs. [ ]If we don’t pick things up FAST, we won’t be able to invest as much as we planned into these critical primary races. So Peter, can we count on you to pitch in $5 now? [ ]Contribute $5 This year’s midterms are a major opportunity for our people-powered movement to not only take seats back from Republicans, but to elect better Democrats who will actually fight for the progressive policies we deserve and demand. Thank you for anything you can chip in to fuel our work and transform the Party. In solidarity, Justice Democrats Contribute to Justice Democrats:

body:
| | | Y'all... Ohio and Florida.**Ohio and freakin' Florida!**

As pissed as I am that Trump and his followers are back in charge, they could be giving us two HUGE chances to take back the Senate.

Putting JD Vance's and Marco Rubio's seats up for grabs in special elections? I mean, they might as well be handing us a personalized invitation to get right back in this!

And you know what? We've gotta reply HELL YES! If you agree, **[chip in $7 today to fight for every seat and say "sorry Donald Trump, but we're gonna win back the Senate!!" Your gift will even be TRIPLED to $21 until the deadline>>](https://go.dscc.org/go/23114?amount=7&t=7&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=7&amounts=7%2C14%2C28%2C70&code=DPE-FD-20260503-JamesCarville-CarvilleSpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20260503-JamesCarville-CarvilleSpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=23670%2E9716520%2EOAgmV2)**

JD Vance and Marco Rubio are now out of the Senate. And that means two seats are back on the ballot YEARS before anyone expected. **If you want to be one of the FIRST people to take a stand to win seats like those, you've got to do it NOW!**

**So are we gonna do this or what?!** We could be looking at a once‐in‐a‐presidency chance to STOP Trump, but it'll ONLY work if we take advantage. **We need all hands on deck, so don't wait another moment:**

name: Chris Pappas
subject: What I learned from small businesses
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Virginia's Future PAC United for Virginia's Future PAC
body:
You might know that my family immigrated from Greece and opened a restaurant in New Hampshire 108 years ago.

| Good morning Peter,

You might know that my family immigrated from Greece and opened a restaurant in New Hampshire 109 years ago.

**It’s where my grandfather invented the chicken tender (no, really), and it remains at the heart of the Manchester community today.**
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130664102/618511181/916674025?refcode=BLU_EM_UFVF_2026-05-03_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTVlYzAzNDgtZmQ0Ni1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=6N-gVXj7R85BgGK4l5LFuzTmACLKegH2Gwrc0nHtYNc=)
Running that small business showed me the power of hard work and serving others.

But unfortunately, the opportunity that my ancestors and others sought has never been further away — and Donald Trump and his administration are too busy cutting deals for their billionaire buddies to give a damn.

I’m running for Senate to change that, and New Hampshire is poised to be one of the country’s closest races.

clean_body: You might know that my family immigrated from Greece and opened a restaurant in New Hampshire 108 years ago. | Good morning Peter, You might know that my family immigrated from Greece and opened a restaurant in New Hampshire 109 years ago. It’s where my grandfather invented the chicken tender (no, really), and it remains at the heart of the Manchester community today. = Running that small business showed me the power of hard work and serving others. But unfortunately, the opportunity that my ancestors and others sought has never been further away — and Donald Trump and his administration are too busy cutting deals for their billionaire buddies to give a damn. I’m running for Senate to change that, and New Hampshire is poised to be one of the country’s closest races. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Let’s do this, Chris Pappas | | = Paid for by United for Virginia's Future PAC United for Virginia's Future PAC P.O. Box 3121 Glen Allen, VA 23058 United States *

subject: Update on these important races:
body:

Derek, **We’re officially about 6 months out from Election Day, and we wanted you to see some updated polls on these important Senate races:** [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-gfr?refcode=em_20260503_6977_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6977_22930333_fGD8Aj&akid=6977%2E22930333%2EfGD8Aj) Taking back the Senate this year will be _imperative_ to putting a check on Trump and Republicans’ destructive agenda, and that means winning these races in these key battleground states. The DNC is working around the clock to register new Democratic voters. We’re organizing across the country and building power in states just like these to ensure that we have the strongest infrastructure possible going into midterms this November. **This work is important, but none of it would be possible without the help of grassroots supporters _just like you_.** [**Derek, if you’re as fired up as us about winning these Senate races, and races at all levels of government nationwide this year, we’re asking you to join our team of grassroots supporters across the country in chipping in $7 to the DNC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-gfr?amount=7&refcode=em_20260503_6977_fr&refcode2=6977_22930333_fGD8Aj&akid=6977%2E22930333%2EfGD8Aj) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-gfr?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260503_6977_fr&refcode2=6977_22930333_fGD8Aj&akid=6977%2E22930333%2EfGD8Aj)**

name: Sheriff Joe Arpaio
subject: He could die in prison for defending the law
body:
| [ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e0f7f13fc72a46b08cefb30445466825&_e=IlGAoI0qQUuP5oeofYpsvh_Iwv9zHZerzsk-TYwBJC4m8idpZxahYP8zKlpZTsuznS6Ki03zoVxUkOCSdmcVLSdS6HKMnPF__YZj9rzGf3z2YpiO0JmU4Z_QenkkgDfwKFKIEJkrPdxMpKNM8jNau7MhMEfzvVjp-Gr_npsRwf2Fp_LhWFXQU3KAChN9H-YOzpUyGZPdxRlFTmMlp97Gd1NvJVHblHIF-l_NZy1cv5kSCkkBLKu04X60UgoMHBL5KVTLqYvnyZN7ndP4tngcSf4DdAdEZa-WyS_A1ymVJO2O_KBRmLTUEAe7a7IkZBa8_bWqkjPTAJHuSxt8CL5WWRXZ8JyqxnMUm3W66Mq1O8yEYBQeZLFn54Cj5cNQ5-Ix4zUI3AacQZ8NSYRrir8pThUqdv_vKFagBnH9zV1i-sxBqILXFah8GFuedt3_3e1L)
---
[ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e0f7f13fc72a46b08cefb30445466825&_e=IlGAoI0qQUuP5oeofYpsvh_Iwv9zHZerzsk-TYwBJC4m8idpZxahYP8zKlpZTsuznS6Ki03zoVxUkOCSdmcVLSdS6HKMnPF__YZj9rzGf3xzTdBsyJXFzcacG8-d2ElIh_wED2QuRJyB_g1wWVQXT4uTDQHE6OrhTI5v1izLpIRQhBKtVZ_m3csU8MNggTD3Bo0MjnrB6kpgFDeK0cP0LnGZ97-Ryor19587KYkGg2TtkaY_t8aFyTbhaLViNSo2RMuK41ayPXYjwA4Z0Qazg1m4vfnD7LE-05BxF7pfuLC-aWSNNNwEIYTx-SaXkHHxp0H4p1oVyqeTOxMHKd9X9l7Z6S_N6gc-88AsyF0h3zWKgGhE7IGI4JGwsK74_EI1XX0nHSOCx7JJi-QguvMlQ-5rwTdDhIQgZWn2qkjPhzVaWCbhvdnDNpstqopO8v_0)
Dear Patriot, They're trying to put an innocent cop in prison for **life**. Why? For defending himself against a fleeing suspect who dragged him with a car. I've been in law enforcement for decades. I've seen the system abused. But what is happening to Officer James Brennand of San Antonio, Texas makes my blood boil, and it should make yours boil too. On October 2nd, 2022, Officer James Brennand — a decorated Army veteran who swore an oath to protect his community — spotted a car he suspected was stolen outside a McDonald's in San Antonio. He called for backup. He approached the vehicle. He ordered the driver to step out. The driver's response? He threw the car into reverse and used it as a weapon. | [Defend Officer Brennand →](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e0f7f13fc72a46b08cefb30445466825&_e=IlGAoI0qQUuP5oeofYpsvh_Iwv9zHZerzsk-TYwBJC4m8idpZxahYP8zKlpZTsuznS6Ki03zoVxUkOCSdmcVLSdS6HKMnPF__YZj9rzGf3xTS_wPgaQfi49TJWldGT2EjvfgOuZbCigf-C02m-ZjKMhMWfrC1aoF-P8iStq8IBQXxtdh3Svk5MNVq5UkBQctRaL7TOQ-zYEZMnUtlSEsgByXAHjR2NvUhiNwGD8dc2Jjfsr3246LNqXEC7FaH2RZCwzg0o1YWmcmCt-W7NvG1GMNuWBHB08XUHGqp1LS4_bPYsvgWft6bmk8VExBsyPBnExbKIiPAM9P_Cz_wP5Gi_6ITuKLGrXV1f6nFu00IrcoRUy4__SvXHG1gXV-o9qNZuuPpF88zgyVgtcOweeDIMmgWLk9_q9efxHiE5VnLpSfE-vLeJ9aiK2yDag6Jk_q)
---
The car door slammed into Brennand. He was dragged. In that split second — outnumbered, without backup, in genuine danger — James did what every officer is trained to do. **He protected himself.**
The driver survived. The passenger was unharmed. And since that night, the driver has racked up four more arrests. **Four.**
While the man who attacked James faces no meaningful consequences, Officer Brennand has been stripped of his badge, his paycheck, and his future. A politically hungry District Attorney — more interested in headlines than justice — charged James with aggravated assault and deadly conduct. If convicted: **five years to life.**
Let that sink in. A man who served his country in the Army, who volunteered to protect the streets of San Antonio, who was dragged by a car in the line of duty — could die in prison.
[ ](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e0f7f13fc72a46b08cefb30445466825&_e=IlGAoI0qQUuP5oeofYpsvh_Iwv9zHZerzsk-TYwBJC4m8idpZxahYP8zKlpZTsuznS6Ki03zoVxUkOCSdmcVLSdS6HKMnPF__YZj9rzGf3z3sH7Loq4gZq1dFrtv7k8LT_Hb7R8qvvWrA8mWAhqYmio3eDl61ecSFz6vo5Ay-McEb45_3Ru1eNggEjg40J_0rzw0Ns5x-TR2Ru7JVgBlNlB9y-qLI1hk5QpsYR1kyyW2i0TSUkEwkWR-wUT7saANDYLCVxwfem4E98MRON3aqOcsqUvYx6MMVP_pJQ6OwstlqzdHVrSvKXJL14mcaydelqJLO3pKy-DLIcAGOMLBRkSxfyFkKmGMhQFRZYUykomqlrBnKnf-qJcvmhXUSp_65LCG99JJKB8_5iQeaskOKvKvPjpexSYWoQ92mP7n1UdFbWBTEl6fYUfsMsU8eU_e) James and his son — a family now fighting for survival while awaiting trial.
The National Center for Police Defense is in this fight with James — funding his legal defense and supporting his family while this nightmare drags on toward trial. But the costs are staggering, and they don't stop. **[That's why I need you, right now, today, to make a donation. $25. $50. $100.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=e0f7f13fc72a46b08cefb30445466825&_e=IlGAoI0qQUuP5oeofYpsvh_Iwv9zHZerzsk-TYwBJC4m8idpZxahYP8zKlpZTsuznS6Ki03zoVxUkOCSdmcVLSdS6HKMnPF__YZj9rzGf3x_CNhxAaRJyouQEN7GAVRe-q6SkQyxNpwkvi8bENT5OeX0PTbzmzc0F8-5DEtuOaK8Y5yk501KFtniJxMECDxh77nddhbyIflqh57Rio8mLN1uehRdUntXegTEpKT4dpwxtlu7MdIp49UeMdCtm2mUQLxkTg1rCLq7ooFwlDdsVuTK295rIt0YEQHzPqdbu9QEUP-C9xMh82noMMSBN8nOVYsFm33aAp5ESjLaXeDRZTxVvomcEDZQntUvVmleLfMEq2NBaOocluOa27m2AUtf3W4Q8qM9mS5FYpEbm82ITdUMOFUpcoAbXKtN6pXhQ_2rkgNrTyERRXm46CfaHkQF) ** Whatever you can give. Your gift goes to defending James and keeping his family afloat. The anti-police mob is betting that people like you will scroll past, shake your head, and do nothing. **Prove them wrong.** James Brennand served this country with honor. He served his city with courage. When that car came at him, he stood his ground. Now it's our turn to stand with him. Don't let them take this good man down without a fight. Share this with every patriot and badge supporter you know. The thin blue line holds only as long as good people refuse to look away. **For James. For his son. For every officer who might be next.** Unapologetically, Sheriff Joe Arpaio Former Sheriff, Maricopa County

clean_body: | Dear Patriot, They're trying to put an innocent cop in prison for life. Why? For defending himself against a fleeing suspect who dragged him with a car. I've been in law enforcement for decades. I've seen the system abused. But what is happening to Officer James Brennand of San Antonio, Texas makes my blood boil, and it should make yours boil too. On October 2nd, 2022, Officer James Brennand — a decorated Army veteran who swore an oath to protect his community — spotted a car he suspected was stolen outside a McDonald's in San Antonio. He called for backup. He approached the vehicle. He ordered the driver to step out. The driver's response? He threw the car into reverse and used it as a weapon. | The car door slammed into Brennand. He was dragged. In that split second — outnumbered, without backup, in genuine danger — James did what every officer is trained to do. He protected himself. The driver survived. The passenger was unharmed. And since that night, the driver has racked up four more arrests. Four. While the man who attacked James faces no meaningful consequences, Officer Brennand has been stripped of his badge, his paycheck, and his future. A politically hungry District Attorney — more interested in headlines than justice — charged James with aggravated assault and deadly conduct. If convicted: five years to life. Let that sink in. A man who served his country in the Army, who volunteered to protect the streets of San Antonio, who was dragged by a car in the line of duty — could die in prison. James and his son — a family now fighting for survival while awaiting trial. The National Center for Police Defense is in this fight with James — funding his legal defense and supporting his family while this nightmare drags on toward trial. But the costs are staggering, and they don't stop. Whatever you can give. Your gift goes to defending James and keeping his family afloat. The anti-police mob is betting that people like you will scroll past, shake your head, and do nothing. Prove them wrong. James Brennand served this country with honor. He served his city with courage. When that car came at him, he stood his ground. Now it's our turn to stand with him. Don't let them take this good man down without a fight. Share this with every patriot and badge supporter you know. The thin blue line holds only as long as good people refuse to look away. For James. For his son. For every officer who might be next. Unapologetically, Sheriff Joe Arpaio Former Sheriff, Maricopa County | Stand With Officer Brennand Today Your donation goes to his legal defense and his family. | | | | ---|---|---|--- National Center for Police Defense 10521 Judicial Drive, Suite 200 Fairfax, Virginia 22030

name: Mariela Roca
subject: Our Ground Game Is Already Winning in MD-06 — Now We’re Going Digital
body:
| | | | | | [ ](https://mo5o1.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsDg0kWBAV28m9Xef6w3LV/P_L1RC_PeVET)

| | | [ ](https://mo5o1.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsE8LSibYr83wPbU2vun3Z/3wlD29jUHItY)
---
| | | Dear Peter,
---
| We’ve built one of the strongest Republican voter engagement programs in MD-06.
In the 2024 primary, our campaign directly contacted **78,524** high-propensity Republican and Republican-leaning voters — reaching over **76%** of proven primary voters in the district. That effort created a deep, battle-tested voter file and lasting relationships that are already delivering results this cycle.
Just last month we sent yard sign requests to **24,564** voters — and **88.9%** of them were supporters we had already mobilized in 2024. The momentum is real and growing.
But now we need to turn that foundation into votes.
Our next big move is a focused **digital advertising campaign** — targeted Facebook and Instagram ads combined with personalized text messaging that will reach thousands of voters right where they are.
To make this happen over the next few weeks, **we need to raise $10,000**.
Here’s exactly what your donation will help us do:

* **$50** helps us send more than **1,600** personalized text messages to voters
* **$100** funds over **3,300** texts at just $0.03 each
* **$250** powers a full **2-week Facebook + Instagram ad campaign** reaching over **15,000** voters in our district

**Every single dollar counts.** Whether it’s $25, $50, $100, or more — your support directly fuels our ability to reach voters and build the momentum we need to win in June.
---
|
---
[ Chip In to Reach Voters Digitally →](https://mo5o1.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsEagAv1xDDz6ffJQktWld/_cMGZ-lQM2m4 "Mariela Roca for Congress Donate")

| **Recent Momentum from the Campaign Trail:**

* **Yard signs are flying off the shelves** — we’ve already received **over 100 requests** in just the past two weeks! We’re getting them up across Frederick, Hagerstown, and the entire district as fast as we can. (Signs are **free** for supporters — just reply to this email or request one at rocaforcongress.com.)
* I just sat down for a powerful interview on **The Wilkow Majority** (April 29th) where we talked about election integrity, secure borders, and why MD-06 desperately needs strong conservative leadership.

This is how we break through the noise. This is how we compete. And this is how we win.
I’m counting on you.
_**Mariela Roca**_ Candidate for Congress, MD-06Proud Mom • Air Force Veteran • Conservative Fighter
---
| | | |
---
[ Learn more about Mariela](https://mo5o1.r.ag.d.sendibm3.com/mk/cl/f/sh/1t6Af4OiGsF30t7SLZJuGvj8oZsGTh/XVg0K2aia-pN "Mariela Roca for Congress")

| **P.S.** We’ve built a real foundation with nearly 80,000 engaged Republican voters — but without this digital push, we can’t reach enough people in time. Every donation helps us get our message out right now.
---

body:

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130665951/618517821/491341876?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_RedistrictResponse_260503_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWM1MGZjNi0wMDQ3LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OXJLErfT1IKQVrVoxmTnVa0pbZG3Ze4N3Mq2WvM2ABM=) Derek,

This week, the Supreme Court struck down a portion of the Voting Rights Act and ordered Louisiana to redraw its Congressional map – a decision that could hand the GOP one more seat in Louisiana, _with the potential for another_.

At the same time, Ron DeSantis and the Republican-controlled state legislature worked together to pass their own gerrymandered map that could flip as many as **FOUR** seats for the GOP in Florida.

**Across the country, Republicans are rigging their maps in a brazen attempt to pad their majorities in Congress and continue carrying out Donald Trump’s dangerous agenda.**

In the face of the GOP’s partisan tricks, Virginia did what needed to be done to counter Republican efforts, but we're not stopping. Now, it's more important than ever that we take a stand and make sure we elect Democrats in the four red-to-blue House races we have right here in the Commonwealth.

[_**Can you rush a donation to the Warner Congressional Fight Fund to help us build the campaign infrastructure that can flip these seats?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130665952/618517822/491341876?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_RedistrictResponse_260503_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWM1MGZjNi0wMDQ3LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OXJLErfT1IKQVrVoxmTnVa0pbZG3Ze4N3Mq2WvM2ABM=)

It’s clear Trump and the GOP will do whatever it takes to hold onto power.

If Republicans are going to tip the scales in their favor, Virginia has no choice but to respond. If we flip these four battleground seats, we can limit their gains across the country and put Democrats on the path to winning control of Congress.

clean_body: | | | = Derek, This week, the Supreme Court struck down a portion of the Voting Rights Act and ordered Louisiana to redraw its Congressional map – a decision that could hand the GOP one more seat in Louisiana, with the potential for another. At the same time, Ron DeSantis and the Republican-controlled state legislature worked together to pass their own gerrymandered map that could flip as many as FOUR seats for the GOP in Florida. Across the country, Republicans are rigging their maps in a brazen attempt to pad their majorities in Congress and continue carrying out Donald Trump’s dangerous agenda. In the face of the GOP’s partisan tricks, Virginia did what needed to be done to counter Republican efforts, but we're not stopping. Now, it's more important than ever that we take a stand and make sure we elect Democrats in the four red-to-blue House races we have right here in the Commonwealth. = It’s clear Trump and the GOP will do whatever it takes to hold onto power. If Republicans are going to tip the scales in their favor, Virginia has no choice but to respond. Friend, Governor DeSantis made a promise to the people of Florida: he would fight for fair representation and would not stop until he got it right. He kept that promise. Florida got shortchanged in the 2020 Census. For years, Florida’s congressional map didn't reflect who Florida actually is. But the state has changed. The population has grown dramatically. And the political reality is clear: **Florida has moved from a Democratic majority to a Republican advantage of 1.5 million voters.** **So Governor DeSantis acted.**

Not the Florida of five years ago. Not the Florida Democrats' wish still existed. _The Florida that is._ The radical Left has attacked Florida’s map from the moment Governor DeSantis announced it. House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries and his allies in Washington are calling it a power grab and threatening to make it a national issue. They're not worried about fairness. They're worried about losing ground, because they know this map reflects a Florida they can no longer control.
_Governor DeSantis isn’t backing down._ That's the Florida Blueprint. clean_body: | | | Friend, Governor DeSantis made a promise to the people of Florida: he would fight for fair representation and would not stop until he got it right. He kept that promise. Florida got shortchanged in the 2020 Census. For years, Florida’s congressional map didn't reflect who Florida actually is. But the state has changed. The population has grown dramatically. And the political reality is clear: Florida has moved from a Democratic majority to a Republican advantage of 1.5 million voters. So Governor DeSantis acted. Florida’s new map for 2026 makes good on Governor DeSantis’ commitment to conduct mid-decade redistricting, and it more fairly represents the makeup of Florida today. Not the Florida of five years ago. Not the Florida Democrats' wish still existed. The Florida that is. The radical Left has attacked Florida’s map from the moment Governor DeSantis announced it. House Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries and his allies in Washington are calling it a power grab and threatening to make it a national issue. They're not worried about fairness. They're worried about losing ground, because they know this map reflects a Florida they can no longer control. Governor DeSantis isn’t backing down. That's the Florida Blueprint. You fight for what's right, you do the work to back it up, and when the other side screams, you take it as confirmation that you're winning. And now RON PAC is working to elect conservatives across the country who will govern the same way: bold enough to fight, disciplined enough to win, and unwilling to apologize for either. The 2026 cycle is approaching fast. RON PAC is already laying the groundwork to recruit and support conservatives who will bring this model to every battleground in the country. That takes resources, and it takes people like you standing with us before the national committees ever show up. Jeffries and the Left want to make Florida their new battleground. Fine. Governor DeSantis has never walked away from a fight, and he’s not starting now. Thank you,RON PAC | | | | | | Paid for by Restore Our Nation (RON PAC). Not Authorized by any Candidate or Candidate’s Committee. www.ronpac.com | | PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315

name: Sherrod
subject: A massive target on our backs
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Republicans have more dark money than we can imagine.
#
Peter, it's Sherrod Brown.
_Cook Political Report_ upgraded our race to a Toss Up:
**This new race rating proves we're running a winning campaign in Ohio._But it also puts a massive target on our backs..._**
Senate Republicans have already pledged to spend more in Ohio than _any_ other state in the country. I've been in this position before, and I can tell you this: We're about to be flooded with dark money and vicious attacks.
**[Will you fight back with $5, split between my campaign and State Democrats Committee?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103080?refcode=em20260503-10380&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=1&akid=10380%2E614464%2E6NbKqR)**

We've seen a huge surge of support this week – and it means the world to me. But the truth is, Republicans have more dark money than we can imagine. They could ramp up their spending any day now, and we need to be ready to respond when they do.
**[My team set an urgent goal to raise an extra $250,000 before 11:59PM tonight, and it's within reach but we need a few more donations from your area to get us over the finish line. Will you rush a split $5 donation to ensure we have what it takes to respond?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103080?refcode=em20260503-10380&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=3&akid=10380%2E614464%2E6NbKqR)**

It’s the Campaign Team from Powell HQ here with an important message about our election. Did you know that **only 36 U.S. House races** in the entire country are considered competitive?? _**This graph shows how each race is certified by election experts nationwide!**_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130668096/618522606/1134938202?refcode=WUEFHQ04_20260502_PowellSplit_ALL_v1s2&sourceid=1058601&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1NDE4Yzc0YS0wMTQ3LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=h9lgVnfR6AP1so6y3ioMuoaow_rUIsCVPJJF7bIl9QE=)
Those 36 races are only 10% of the total number of elections happening this November! **Luckily for us, Nebraska’s 2nd Congressional District is certified “Lean Democrat,” meaning that this is one of the best pickup opportunities to flip the district blue in the country.**

We know that Denise Powell will fight like hell for our families and us. She’s a champion of public school education, has fought for reproductive rights for years, and is a working mom. If anyone understands the struggle that Nebraska families face, it’s her.

This is where you come in, Peter. Our campaign runs on grassroots support from people like you. We are counting on your support and donations from you to flip NE-02 and take back the House this November!

**[We know you can’t give every time we email you, but could you please split a donation between our campaign and EMILYs List to make sure we stay on track? Luckily for us, Nebraska’s 2nd Congressional District is certified “Lean Democrat,” meaning that this is one of the best pickup opportunities to flip the district blue in the country. We know that Denise Powell will fight like hell for our families and us. She’s a champion of public school education, has fought for reproductive rights for years, and is a working mom. If anyone understands the struggle that Nebraska families face, it’s her. This is where you come in, Peter. Our campaign runs on grassroots support from people like you. null! Quick question: **Have you taken my Priorities Survey yet?**
Sorry to pester you again about this, but I genuinely want to know what your concerns are – and how I can help.
We're hoping to get 53 more responses from 18326. **[Let me know what you think!](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/15768?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=2526%2E49239%2E0oBTLg) **

Haley
P.S. The survey only takes about 60 seconds, and it helps us a ton. **[Take it now if you can!](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/15768?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=4&akid=2526%2E49239%2E0oBTLg)**
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Team Haley**
Subject: Haley is determined to hear from you, null
null, we're getting closer to the election, and Team Haley is working around the clock to build a winning campaign that can keep Michigan blue and help flip the Senate.
---
**But to do this right, we need your voice at the table, null.**
Haley is 100% committed to staying focused on the issues that matter most to regular folks. That’s why we’re asking again: **Will you take our Priorities Survey before midnight tonight?**
We even made you a personalized link: **[surveys.signforgood.com/Stevens-Election-Year-Priorities/null](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/15768?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=2526%2E49239%2E0oBTLg)**
It only takes a minute, but your input makes a huge difference. Thanks, null.
Team Haley
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Haley Stevens**
Subject: I need your input, null
| | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/15769?t=6&akid=2526%2E49239%2E0oBTLg)
---
Hi null,

I’ve spent my career fighting for Michigan families. And with the help of this grassroots team, we’ve made incredible progress:
* I introduced the Stop Trump’s Abuse of Power Act after Trump illegally sent the military into U.S. cities.

* I led the charge to bring semiconductor manufacturing back to Michigan.

* I introduced the No Tariffs on Groceries Act to help bring down prices at the checkout line.

* I filed articles of impeachment against RFK Jr. for putting lives at risk and undermining public health.

I know there’s still more work to do in 2026 and beyond. That’s why I’m running for Senate. And as I fight for every corner of Michigan, I want to make sure this campaign reflects the issues that matter most to you, null.

**Your priorities are my priorities.** So before I hit the trail again, I hope you’ll take just a minute to fill out this quick Priorities Survey. **_[I need your response by midnight, so I know what's important to you:](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/15770?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=2526%2E49239%2E0oBTLg)_**
| | [Take the Survey](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/15770?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=8&akid=2526%2E49239%2E0oBTLg)
---
With grit and gratitude,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/15771?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=9&akid=2526%2E49239%2E0oBTLg) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/15772?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=10&akid=2526%2E49239%2E0oBTLg)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: No one serving the public should have the opportunity to profit from privileged information about government actions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Earlier this year, I introduced the End Prediction Market Corruption Act.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130670034/618524692/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2ZmE2ZjZiYS0wMjQ3LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S8QhP9VKisPSBHTfrOj6Ykzz1wD1hSOM_HguLPzGugY=&emci=3305fff4-f146-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=6fa6f6ba-0247-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=7731215)
---

| | This week, the Senate unanimously adopted a change to the Senate rules to ban Senators and staff from participating in prediction markets. **It's a good first step, but now we need to expand this effort. A few months ago, I introduced the End Prediction Market Corruption Act,** a bill that bans the president, vice president, members of Congress, and senior executive branch officials from placing bets on prediction markets tied to government actions. Here's why: Prediction markets allow people to place bets on future events — elections, political decisions, even military actions. But members of Congress and senior government officials receive all sorts of sensitive briefings and confidential information as part of our jobs. **Allowing those same officials to place bets on events tied to government decisions creates a clear conflict of interest.** Recent activity on prediction markets has put this danger in the spotlight. Federal prosecutors recently charged a U.S. Special Forces soldier with using classified intelligence about a planned operation targeting Venezuelan leader Nicolás Maduro to place bets that netted more than $400,000. And it doesn't stop there. Reports have flagged massive, well-timed bets on events like a potential ceasefire tied to the war with Iran — placed just before public announcements — along with traders earning hundreds of thousands of dollars betting on high-level geopolitical outcomes like leadership changes abroad. No one serving the public should have the opportunity to profit from privileged information about government actions. Public service should never become a way to cash in on inside knowledge. It's corruption, plain and simple. Let's get this bill passed and bring some basic integrity to these betting platforms. Onward! _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

clean_body: Earlier this year, I introduced the End Prediction Market Corruption Act. | | | | This week, the Senate unanimously adopted a change to the Senate rules to ban Senators and staff from participating in prediction markets. It's a good first step, but now we need to expand this effort. A few months ago, I introduced the End Prediction Market Corruption Act, a bill that bans the president, vice president, members of Congress, and senior executive branch officials from placing bets on prediction markets tied to government actions. Here's why: Prediction markets allow people to place bets on future events — elections, political decisions, even military actions. But members of Congress and senior government officials receive all sorts of sensitive briefings and confidential information as part of our jobs. Allowing those same officials to place bets on events tied to government decisions creates a clear conflict of interest. Recent activity on prediction markets has put this danger in the spotlight. Federal prosecutors recently charged a U.S. Special Forces soldier with using classified intelligence about a planned operation targeting Venezuelan leader Nicolás Maduro to place bets that netted more than $400,000. And it doesn't stop there. Reports have flagged massive, well-timed bets on events like a potential ceasefire tied to the war with Iran — placed just before public announcements — along with traders earning hundreds of thousands of dollars betting on high-level geopolitical outcomes like leadership changes abroad. No one serving the public should have the opportunity to profit from privileged information about government actions. Public service should never become a way to cash in on inside knowledge. It's corruption, plain and simple. Let's get this bill passed and bring some basic integrity to these betting platforms. Onward! Jeff | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign.
