[This is a longer email, but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish.](http://links.maga-conservatives.com/u/click?_t=da215d85003f407c964bf56cae76557f&_m=fe4e2b1bd79f4432b2d36856ac060759&_e=6FDbiKVj---bhND8XgIhyshbl79MsglTTTfYybJxR2d7OMmYMUk-vkEblFfZ1QAFQgJFEEFMZ5ghgGlnTPv4CWK0HSCwqf9FYgt-pChdYv7-hl9wXUIlIlbwWhNc6eoKqxoMJIi_jP29aXj5mt0cYh8rrwB7BQdB2VLcSKWlMwONWq6orj7KCOCCGdpGSdwFLHCweufnB_ABk84TBEyNHH74BzG0XfMmXWCs1eB7egipz6qpe9Vz3T7Z_dSOywpc1SC0MBBcM1u-iBwidVuAkCjvG9RTXFanGrfPadhsZJ_3dpiiQPvA4I3Z3mrgsAMOnxdeiVmN0-ld131xNeJWBwd-MsiFihns5QTZCKBcgWg7iBlzng5P-RwSU5VMIvzLQExlwZeLYQLEBSZ4GVOSDwGfD9456DbJWZ-bNEzWZxkNRGYHd0nNWVB6onK_RuSqAs9Owm-OstWH2X0B_z-6y2sG_1Lhq0uGyFUX1P8YZZfD6fqCfEHg69HEnDEK85MzsCYwefwnwE8cTZuxChCUkEFXRD2LN7QLPOS4-DuKaYA35RIofx4ihc_qQrGhFPCGPqsLG5baaDgFo5O0Q32o5RswaowG1oHbsObTYokwgES1HzBZ5lEYmQJUSyTGKULnvwad39epOoRoWIao4Hm0zJxY-qkbadfIFQvHW6XIQ844W12ctF_JjZY7-OoNoFXUbjSpuXV25juSgy6Ale0ELQ%3D%3D)
It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up dirt poor, I was raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction.
It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC.
But I felt God called me to tell my story. Warts and all. I felt led to speak out because I believe millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11.
As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC.
I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you.
I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great.
[Which brings me to the purpose of my email today.](http://links.maga-conservatives.com/u/click?_t=da215d85003f407c964bf56cae76557f&_m=fe4e2b1bd79f4432b2d36856ac060759&_e=6FDbiKVj---bhND8XgIhyshbl79MsglTTTfYybJxR2d7OMmYMUk-vkEblFfZ1QAFQgJFEEFMZ5ghgGlnTPv4CWK0HSCwqf9FYgt-pChdYv7-hl9wXUIlIlbwWhNc6eoKqxoMJIi_jP29aXj5mt0cYh8rrwB7BQdB2VLcSKWlMwONWq6orj7KCOCCGdpGSdwFLHCweufnB_ABk84TBEyNHH74BzG0XfMmXWCs1eB7egipz6qpe9Vz3T7Z_dSOywpcY96j7jZaPZd2NVtWSVWQQDufD6pSBWn05QVGlmy1DnrZy700U63b9UIp86ZeqtPjDTx9FseqMbZv8dIuIH61JNPkEe2cHV7MPPWeyn_a3mVWm6LR1xt6170QYY0Ou48x9jC6m2Y4g0gnT9ueOOzCjMvGSV7Vb06TV2cXyArjwrnDTF-ModUas_3xTuZnGWBCOzbhANJ82kvXvignp1KBJfwBBNVHXX14_oUW5E5rJoC_leIqiVz2WUMzq-SYT4l2pXaiF1z0BPwIq7ZpQH77Mxi-miy9hjZ9xQo5fiR4WmVqkYBmtUOgUkBGcULoYkYOWKvrdnDtzrTOVhMUPRKG5hufZQ0eic52O7IvxP9uHU9Xgt9PnCGYbAY9fwGqppx9biBI9fLGVLsuWkk-O-eY_rUBDwy2t7dL9qGQvRLftgwuo-3d9alRmc1OGzkV9ZSi2Up6c8y-c_32l-s56GxPDA%3D%3D)
We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win.
So now we're forced to rebuild.
The Democrat Machine is ALREADY crushing us in fundraising, ALREADY outspending us in key races, and ALREADY building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections.
At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable.
So here's my final pitch to you:
[I’m teaming up with Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise a million dollars by the end of the month.](http://links.maga-conservatives.com/u/click?_t=da215d85003f407c964bf56cae76557f&_m=fe4e2b1bd79f4432b2d36856ac060759&_e=6FDbiKVj---bhND8XgIhyshbl79MsglTTTfYybJxR2d7OMmYMUk-vkEblFfZ1QAFQgJFEEFMZ5ghgGlnTPv4CWK0HSCwqf9FYgt-pChdYv7-hl9wXUIlIlbwWhNc6eoKqxoMJIi_jP29aXj5mt0cYh8rrwB7BQdB2VLcSKWlMwONWq6orj7KCOCCGdpGSdwFLHCweufnB_ABk84TBEyNHH74BzG0XfMmXWCs1eB7egipz6qpe9Vz3T7Z_dSOywpcsj8OvK6PpaSFyxhmUGDKtBoz4qpaJs3foyDL_WtErLDksVdfl4f9tNrNoxWtBGR5XfOsIOHQveFNwd9HsB5IMlhzd_xQc-GAHo4c21AKP3iMnpmEn6H42SYkk6iFryBV4U-J4AO3E2u284g0SnvvwM_uUPVzfq7mNickYPZvLJSfdmXaE6NahjKLXgEDiAW9KtFW6Y6IDfnI6mL9YNi6SUdtbadL4BhLOEIEiIuEZupwQXW93ISzQcCb2WEuFboBOdenoAXPWhK666X55PifSHyVEZuc-kUxhQwA5CnDXhpUp9N0RDBuJd5nq7v-Ljgse68JH-sY5XUMwB_15Crw116ZoWC4wP8_dKPhI0rfNlSG805H8cOoQpREZuIqSqRWDh1y6YaNzwIHwLtB7qzDdFkgQM5KiBLwEpExfEnhKJb_HZ5RuRQVg08AMZlUPKcOQlDUFbcP-3SuzrxtmwoOmQ%3D%3D) I understand that's ambitious. clean_body: This is a longer email, but I respectfully ask you to read it start to finish: | My fellow Americans - it is Vice President JD Vance. It wasn't easy telling the world I grew up dirt poor, I was raised by my Mamaw while my mother struggled with addiction. It wasn't exactly the prep school/trust fund/summer-in-the-Hamptons upbringing that is commonplace in DC. But I felt God called me to tell my story. Warts and all. I felt led to speak out because I believe millions of Americans share stories like mine. Stories of jobs being outsourced to China, addiction ravaging communities and killing our neighbors, and heeding the call of duty after the Towers fell on 9/11. As your Vice President, I now stand in the breach for the left-behind, forgotten men and women who built this country, but were abandoned by the political class in DC. I'll do everything in my power to make sure that never happens again. I'll fight every day for good folks like you. I promise to always stand between you and the Democrat Machine that aims to obliterate everything that makes our country great. We're coming out of the most expensive election in American history. I mean that. Kamala Harris spent over a billion dollars against us. It took EVERY PENNY we had to get our story out there, expose her ultra-Liberal record, reach undecided voters, and win. So now we're forced to rebuild. The Democrat Machine is ALREADY crushing us in fundraising, ALREADY outspending us in key races, and ALREADY building the campaign infrastructure to decimate us in the Midterm Elections. At this point, the consequences of simply resting on our laurels would be unthinkable. So here's my final pitch to you: I understand that's ambitious. But if that's what it takes to deliver President Trump a Republican House for his entire second term, it's a no-brainer. I'll do what it takes to win. Do you think you can help us get there? Whether it's $5 or $500 - the amount you give isn't nearly as important as how many folks step up: | Look, you've probably heard bits and pieces of my story at this point. If my humble beginnings taught me anything, it's to never give up, never surrender, and never go down without a fight. That's why I'm partnering with Steve Scalise to help lay the critical groundwork we need to win. Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you. God bless America, Vice President JD Vance | \- Democrat Leadership formed an anti-Trump task force \- More than a dozen Attorneys General are suing the Trump Administration \- A House Democrat just introduced 7 Articles of Impeachment If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT! name: Team Demand Justice PAC
subject: The Supreme Court’s shadow system exposed:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Demand Justice PAC
body:
[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260503-61414&t=1001&akid=61414%2E1407376%2Ex-Oryg ]Demand Justice PAC[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260503-61414&t=1002&akid=61414%2E1407376%2Ex-Oryg ]Demand Justice PAC

A bombshell
report reveals Chief Justice John Roberts helped build the Supreme Court’s
“shadow docket” — a backdoor process for major rulings with no full
briefing, no arguments, and often no explanation.

What started as a rarely used emergency tool has been transformed into a
quiet pipeline for reshaping the law out of public view.

And under Trump, it’s been weaponized.

When Trump gets blocked in lower courts for breaking the law or pushing
unconstitutional policies, he runs straight to the Supreme Court demanding
an “emergency” order.

And this Court delivers:

30+ requests.
~80% success rate.

These are supposed to be temporary rulings. They’re not.

Immigrants lose protections. Civil servants get pushed out. Limits on
presidential power disappear all through unsigned, late-night orders with
no explanation.

Roberts set this precedent. Now it’s the playbook.

The bottom line is: this Court is operating without transparency,
accountability, or the restraint our democracy demands — and it won’t
change on its own.

Demand Justice PAC is exposing these abuses and building public and
political pressure needed to force reform — from ethics rules to
structural changes that rein in this out-of-control Court. But that
pressure only works if we can scale it.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260503.P5vHWq&refcode=em20260503-61414&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=61414%2E1407376%2Ex-Oryg ]If you’re ready to take on a Supreme Court that thinks it can operate
above the law, chip in $5 to Demand Justice PAC today.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260503.P5vHWq&amount=5&refcode=em20260503-61414&t=1022&akid=61414%2E1407376%2Ex-Oryg ]Donate $5 ››

Thank you,

Team Demand Justice PAC

name: George Conway
subject: Peter, Trump is a piece of sh–!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
|
---
_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you only want our most important email updates,[click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/108?t=2&akid=2182%2E259176%2EKaPaZo) If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/109?t=3&akid=2182%2E259176%2EKaPaZo)_

[](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11050?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.03_Conway-POS_B2_F1_S6_C6_90AC-365DON-RS-T1&refcode3=partner_loc_gc_em_baa&t=4&akid=2182%2E259176%2EKaPaZo) Until today, I would never have called a President of the United States – of any party – a “fucking piece of shit.” **But Peter, it’s time to be honest: Donald Trump _really_ is. Exactly that.** We’re almost two years into this godforsaken presidency, and already he’s kidnapped the leader of one country and killed the head of another, launched a war no one wants, and destabilized global security with truly terrifying disregard for the American people. **Peter, I want to go back to an America where I can’t make the case that the president is a fucking piece of shit.** That’s why I’m running for Congress. We have to take back the House and use every tool we have to STOP Trump from destroying our country and (let’s be honest) the world. [**Can you split $10 right now between me and Blue Amp Action to help power my campaign and stop Trump? →** ](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11050?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.03_Conway-POS_B2_F1_S6_C6_90AC-365DON-RS-T1&refcode3=partner_loc_gc_em_baa&t=5&akid=2182%2E259176%2EKaPaZo) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to George Conway and Blue Amp Action will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $10](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11051?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.03_Conway-POS_B2_F1_S6_C6_90AC-365DON-RS-T1&refcode3=partner_loc_gc_em_baa&t=6&akid=2182%2E259176%2EKaPaZo)
---
[DONATE $25](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11052?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.03_Conway-POS_B2_F1_S6_C6_90AC-365DON-RS-T1&refcode3=partner_loc_gc_em_baa&t=7&akid=2182%2E259176%2EKaPaZo)
---
[DONATE MORE](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11053?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.03_Conway-POS_B2_F1_S6_C6_90AC-365DON-RS-T1&refcode3=partner_loc_gc_em_baa&t=8&akid=2182%2E259176%2EKaPaZo)
---
Look, I am absolutely serious.
American lives have already been lost. And for what?
So Trump can play out his wargame fantasies and treat complicated geopolitics like one of his reality shows.
Our president is a psychopath, and he is out of control. And soon, it’s going to cost us our future if we don’t act.
[**Please, Peter – I implore you to take this seriously and stand with me today in the fight to stop his descent into authoritarianism. Chip in $10, or anything you can, to my campaign and Blue Amp Action. →**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11050?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.03_Conway-POS_B2_F1_S6_C6_90AC-365DON-RS-T1&refcode3=partner_loc_gc_em_baa&t=9&akid=2182%2E259176%2EKaPaZo)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to George Conway and Blue Amp Action will go through immediately:_
[DONATE $10](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11051?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.03_Conway-POS_B2_F1_S6_C6_90AC-365DON-RS-T1&refcode3=partner_loc_gc_em_baa&t=10&akid=2182%2E259176%2EKaPaZo)
---
[DONATE $25](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11052?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.03_Conway-POS_B2_F1_S6_C6_90AC-365DON-RS-T1&refcode3=partner_loc_gc_em_baa&t=11&akid=2182%2E259176%2EKaPaZo)
---
[DONATE MORE](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11053?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.03_Conway-POS_B2_F1_S6_C6_90AC-365DON-RS-T1&refcode3=partner_loc_gc_em_baa&t=12&akid=2182%2E259176%2EKaPaZo)
---
This can't wait,
George Conway
Democrat for Congress, NY-12

Your support is vital to our mission — with your help, we can boost George Conway’s message and build a brighter future. Every contribution – $10, $25, or even $100 – allows us to continue amplifying leaders who will fight for our democracy.

name: JanePAC Newsletter
subject: Your May edition of The JanePAC Monthly 🗞️
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
There is a lot to unpack.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130671547/618528359/1328794144?refcode=ea.5a6eda1a-0547-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ms=ea.5a6eda1a-0547-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhNmVkYTFhLTA1NDctZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HZ0hZfEW_3l-ojlvyMk3mRNF10DwXe1CRjMf8W5jyqI=&emci=2a0274d2-8745-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=5a6eda1a-0547-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=4823105)
---
Welcome to the May edition of **_The JanePAC Monthly_**. We’re looking back at Jane’s powerful Earth Day appearance, following a Supreme Court case that hits close to home, and making sure you have the details for the most important primaries of the election cycle. Let's dive in! 👇
* * *
**📍WHERE'S JANE?** **Jane Brought Her Climate Advocacy to the Stage for Earth Day** Jane has never been one to sit on the sidelines, and Earth Day was no exception. She joined the _Today Show_ to discuss her newest project, **Dear Everything: A Musical Uprising for the Earth** , an “Earth opera” debuting at the Brooklyn Academy of Music. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130671548/618528360/-803653937?v=uO947cQ98-E&refcode=ea.5a6eda1a-0547-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ms=ea.5a6eda1a-0547-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhNmVkYTFhLTA1NDctZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HZ0hZfEW_3l-ojlvyMk3mRNF10DwXe1CRjMf8W5jyqI=&emci=2a0274d2-8745-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=5a6eda1a-0547-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=4823105) The musical tells the story of a small town where a group of adults tries to sell a local forest to a timber company, and the young people, understanding the forest is essential to their survival, embrace collective action to save each other. The production also puts young climate leaders front and center, featuring local youth choirs in every performance and helping support youth-focused climate organizations. Jane has always understood that fighting for a liveable future means channeling joy, artistry, music, and collective, cross-generational power. | [**WATCH JANE'S FULL INTERVIEW →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130671549/618528361/-803653937?v=uO947cQ98-E&refcode=ea.5a6eda1a-0547-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ms=ea.5a6eda1a-0547-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhNmVkYTFhLTA1NDctZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HZ0hZfEW_3l-ojlvyMk3mRNF10DwXe1CRjMf8W5jyqI=&emci=2a0274d2-8745-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=5a6eda1a-0547-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=4823105)
---
* * *
**🗞️ WHAT'S IN THE NEWS?**
**Corporate Accountability Is on Trial at the Supreme Court**
The Supreme Court heard oral arguments in a major case over whether Bayer, the pharmaceutical and biotech giant, can shut down a wave of lawsuits claiming its Roundup weedkiller causes non-Hodgkin lymphoma — _the same cancer Jane was diagnosed with in 2022._
**“A victory for the manufacturer, Bayer, could end thousands of lawsuits against the company claiming that the herbicide causes cancer.”

_\- The New York Times_**
---
Jane has spoken openly about her diagnosis, her months of chemotherapy, and how lucky she was to have access to life-saving treatment. This case is a reminder of what's at stake when corporations are shielded from accountability for the harm their products cause.
A win for Bayer at the Supreme Court could close the door on accountability for tens of thousands of people.
We'll be watching closely.
**[Read more from _The New York Times_ on the case and its potential impact →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130671550/618528362/-539259762?refcode=ea.5a6eda1a-0547-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ms=ea.5a6eda1a-0547-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhNmVkYTFhLTA1NDctZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HZ0hZfEW_3l-ojlvyMk3mRNF10DwXe1CRjMf8W5jyqI=&emci=2a0274d2-8745-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=5a6eda1a-0547-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=4823105)**
* * *
**🗳️ CRITICAL ELECTIONS**
In the coming weeks, JanePAC’s endorsed candidates are heading into some of the most important U.S. House primaries of the cycle.
We are proud to support **Chris Rabb in PA-03, Heidi Hall in CA-03, Christian Menefee in TX-18,** and **Randy Villegas in CA-22** — four bold leaders ready to interrupt the status quo and bring real courage to the halls of Congress.
Because we’re not just fighting to flip the House this year. We’re also fighting for better and stronger Democratic leadership.
The GOP money machine is already in motion, and Republicans are raising _millions_ to protect their power in the most competitive battlegrounds.
So we need a massive showing of grassroots support. We’ll have more details and opportunities for you to support their campaigns before voters head to the ballot box, including a phonebank for you below!
* * *
**☎️ ORGANIZING**
**Join Jane Fonda for a Phonebank for Heidi Hall on Tuesday, May 5!**
**Want to take direct action for one of our most exciting climate champions? Join Jane herself for a special phonebank supporting Heidi Hall on Tuesday, May 5, from 5:30–7:30 PM PDT / 8:30-10:30 PM EDT**
Heidi has spent her entire career standing up for working families and fighting for bold climate solutions. And with her June 2 primary coming up fast, she needs our voices behind her right now.
No experience necessary. Training, scripts, and support will be provided. _All you need is the willingness to show up._
[**RSVP NOW →**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130671551/618528363/1198427001?utm_source=MayNewsletter&refcode=ea.5a6eda1a-0547-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ms=ea.5a6eda1a-0547-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjVhNmVkYTFhLTA1NDctZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=HZ0hZfEW_3l-ojlvyMk3mRNF10DwXe1CRjMf8W5jyqI=&emci=2a0274d2-8745-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=5a6eda1a-0547-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=4823105)
---
* * *
That's it for this edition of **_The JanePAC Monthly_**.
Thank you for being part of this movement. If you want to stay plugged in between newsletters, follow us on social media for daily updates and behind-the-scenes moments with Jane and the team:

clean_body: There is a lot to unpack. | Welcome to the May edition of The JanePAC Monthly. We’re looking back at Jane’s powerful Earth Day appearance, following a Supreme Court case that hits close to home, and making sure you have the details for the most important primaries of the election cycle. Let's dive in! 👇 📍WHERE'S JANE? Jane Brought Her Climate Advocacy to the Stage for Earth Day Jane has never been one to sit on the sidelines, and Earth Day was no exception. She joined the Today Show to discuss her newest project, Dear Everything: A Musical Uprising for the Earth , an “Earth opera” debuting at the Brooklyn Academy of Music. The musical tells the story of a small town where a group of adults tries to sell a local forest to a timber company, and the young people, understanding the forest is essential to their survival, embrace collective action to save each other. The production also puts young climate leaders front and center, featuring local youth choirs in every performance and helping support youth-focused climate organizations. Jane has always understood that fighting for a liveable future means channeling joy, artistry, music, and collective, cross-generational power. | 🗞️ WHAT'S IN THE NEWS? Corporate Accountability Is on Trial at the Supreme Court The Supreme Court heard oral arguments in a major case over whether Bayer, the pharmaceutical and biotech giant, can shut down a wave of lawsuits claiming its Roundup weedkiller causes non-Hodgkin lymphoma — the same cancer Jane was diagnosed with in 2022. “A victory for the manufacturer, Bayer, could end thousands of lawsuits against the company claiming that the herbicide causes cancer.” \- The New York Times Jane has spoken openly about her diagnosis, her months of chemotherapy, and how lucky she was to have access to life-saving treatment. This case is a reminder of what's at stake when corporations are shielded from accountability for the harm their products cause. A win for Bayer at the Supreme Court could close the door on accountability for tens of thousands of people. We'll be watching closely. 🗳️ CRITICAL ELECTIONS In the coming weeks, JanePAC’s endorsed candidates are heading into some of the most important U.S. House primaries of the cycle. We are proud to support Chris Rabb in PA-03, Heidi Hall in CA-03, Christian Menefee in TX-18, and Randy Villegas in CA-22 — four bold leaders ready to interrupt the status quo and bring real courage to the halls of Congress. Because we’re not just fighting to flip the House this year. We’re also fighting for better and stronger Democratic leadership. The GOP money machine is already in motion, and Republicans are raising millions to protect their power in the most competitive battlegrounds. So we need a massive showing of grassroots support. We’ll have more details and opportunities for you to support their campaigns before voters head to the ballot box, including a phonebank for you below! ☎️ ORGANIZING Join Jane Fonda for a Phonebank for Heidi Hall on Tuesday, May 5! Want to take direct action for one of our most exciting climate champions? Join Jane herself for a special phonebank supporting Heidi Hall on Tuesday, May 5, from 5:30–7:30 PM PDT / 8:30-10:30 PM EDT Heidi has spent her entire career standing up for working families and fighting for bold climate solutions. And with her June 2 primary coming up fast, she needs our voices behind her right now. No experience necessary. Training, scripts, and support will be provided. All you need is the willingness to show up. That's it for this edition of The JanePAC Monthly. Thank you for being part of this movement. If you want to stay plugged in between newsletters, follow us on social media for daily updates and behind-the-scenes moments with Jane and the team: Together, we are building a movement they cannot ignore. And we're just getting started. In solidarity, – Team JanePAC = | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

That’s why, five months from Election Day, our campaign team is already out there knocking on doors and connecting with people directly. Last week we learned that in our upcoming Democratic primary election, we will have not one, but two opponents. We expect them to be well funded by billionaire special interests. Outside groups could flood airwaves and mailboxes with deceptive ads and mailers, trying to mischaracterize Rashida’s record of fighting for working people and against greedy corporate interests. In recent Democratic primaries, we’ve seen outside groups spend millions of dollars to try and install candidates who represent their interests, not the interests of local residents. While Rashida is fighting for the right to affordable utilities, including water and electricity, fighting back against greedy corporations that put profits over workers and pollute our environment, and fighting for human rights at home and abroad, special interests will spend virtually unlimited resources to manipulate the conversation and prop up their handpicked candidates. Together, we’re bringing Rashida’s message to all corners of the 12th congressional district and countering special interest money with grassroots organizing. Thank you, Team Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . name: Gina Hinojosa
subject: Exactly 6 months from today
body:
Anything you can find in your budget each month will help my team and I mobilize across the huge state of Texas.
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Sorry to reach out on a Sunday, Peter.
**But I need you to see this date: May 3, 2026. Exactly six months from Election Day.**
**Six months sounds like a long time. It isn’t. Not in a race like ours.**
We are running a campaign across the largest battleground state in America: from Amarillo to Brownsville, El Paso to Houston, and every town in between. That takes sustained resources — not just today, but month after month.
[**That’s why I’m asking you for something specific today: will you make a monthly donation to help power our campaign through the final 6 months of this race?**](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/1891?c0=em_ms_gh_20260503_1_recurring.QygDE9&refcode=em20260503-1046&t=1&akid=1046%2E299639%2E1kEXLz)
Greg Abbott has a $100 million war chest and a network of powerful donors loyal to him who will ensure he always has the resources it takes to run this race. But we have something even more powerful: a growing, grassroots campaign that shows up everywhere, listens to everyone, and makes the case for real change.
**Everywhere we go, it’s clear that Texans are fed up with Greg Abbott and are ready for change. But we can only keep building this campaign if supporters like you are with us every single month between now and November.**
Your monthly gift of $5, or whatever fits your budget, gives my team the steady resources we need to keep organizing, keep traveling, and keep reaching voters who are ready to take Texas back all the way through November 3rd.
[**So, what do you say? Will you pledge a monthly contribution of $5 today? Any amount you can donate monthly will make a real difference in our ability to compete in this race, Peter.**](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/1892?c0=em_ms_gh_20260503_1_recurring.-Wntjv&refcode=em20260503-1046&amount=5&t=2&akid=1046%2E299639%2E1kEXLz)
[Start a Monthly Donation »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/1891?c0=em_ms_gh_20260503_1_recurring.QygDE9&t=3&akid=1046%2E299639%2E1kEXLz)
We have just six months to go. Let’s make them all count.
Thank you,
Gina

[ Donate » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260503-1&t=4&refcode2=1046_299639_1kEXLz&akid=1046%2E299639%2E1kEXLz)
[ Donate Monthly » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260503-1&recurring=1&t=5&refcode2=1046_299639_1kEXLz&akid=1046%2E299639%2E1kEXLz)
---

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5b41dbe647934745a0ae1ba67abcedc2&_e=Ous21DnudjfI468FmSPFqFHFE_DJDM9TBQNft38JJDLEKPuOctBSgJT_Jo0DeyVOzSY27UNarg2_TTGO3RWHZntXd_STmQO-wWiOAbqvEW9utxAxczJlH9Atxzoze_gknht-YYIz6tBYHqSOV-xrLI5fIg1ndjsNbevrmWH-XB1LQLtsl863BVvaGUjkL3cs3SsZYw9f9IB0DF89Zoy9jP8QK2Wklj1tltRbghdPzcTXa5mJXh8fEs4ipw3Ls_qKgDICyQTD8wfsoG8KTULX5yHSpq9eNt4LNFPpwhdAt9QdwLPqXzMG6GQOgDSNROLgRGec7L88cJkapUIK_4j19nmcnRTH_j7lZwvL_hUhp05-_sw07UUKTcSbvwH6fdmLriMEDNGe1rR66foradZ4a5zLC2lyjXTuBCwHU0c3JlW_17-TbNAcEeISMJdIfyLDgalTnvbOKwwA4gHzAM2YWlrE8JlyZmeJu5STXrpv00ObF5JSgsumOH1oAwht44LjwcfTtv8tbaXkaWEZGrV0GCkcT8NaIHQAJFVgzQSbr3KZPHUiIulT3rMY0o3Lg0EyeYIQ1i-ubtNynWMH_NA2jQ%3D%3D)
Patriot,

On Saturday night, a California man armed with a shotgun, a handgun, and multiple knives charged the security checkpoint at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, with President Trump in the room.

His name is Cole Allen, a 31-year-old tutor from Torrance, California.

And before he made his move, he sent a manifesto to his own family laying out exactly what he intended to do.

**He wanted to target administration officials, starting with the President of the United States!**

Let us be clear about what just happened...

**This is the _third time_ they have tried to kill President Trump.**

And this time, the man who pulled the trigger wasn't some lone lunatic who slipped through the cracks. He had a plan, a manifesto, multiple weapons, and a hotel room on the 10th floor of the venue. He ran into that building while the President of the United States was inside!

The radical left has spent years calling President Trump every name in the book. Calling his supporters terrorists. Weaponizing the courts, the FBI, and every arm of the federal government to destroy him. Calling for resistance by any means necessary.

Well. Here is the truth:

**The Left is not going to stop. They will not accept the results of free and fair elections. They will not stop at legal warfare. Now we have seen - again - what happens when they incite enough hatred.**

This is exactly why what Turning Point PAC is doing matters so much right now.

**We are not fighting a political campaign. We are fighting for the survival of this movement.**

We are fighting to make sure that the America First movement cannot be stopped by violence, lawfare, or any other means the radical left throws at it.

[Fight for the America First Movement](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5b41dbe647934745a0ae1ba67abcedc2&_e=Ous21DnudjfI468FmSPFqFHFE_DJDM9TBQNft38JJDLEKPuOctBSgJT_Jo0DeyVOzSY27UNarg2_TTGO3RWHZg7Q-Ab-dXILbyNx5c9csWED-Lq8LsFKGwB2mM_SVZtEwMFCPhArDquECWZj1q3XAsvj07rmT8P9kok8Gd7b5L3BvbezC_H6uk0xWWIBa3TQHWwUarFDYrAi2v1I2H995BsoFi3-nI_fBBOR-U6JbZvHQNaRK6jDjUIxDf61xxVsXtpVNBKd44TgMpMS4fBwaI6G-fhWmXDMmKCb7pHG97QgnWUzIIr6lTXgsB3v4Bv8KbYab6acZfif3tzLtXUhYt_xEWQytKM8VubReb_OPQ_HvFe6oi7ufzdp-ClB-ckZzqjC9EHKolhL7cSFYLRPKc6dWlgzJwPvByWOwZZzbPHmZaQvGaHr_w7ctHawj54K4HrNt-LzV9fgaks7WTngkr7VHtuu9HLFsNpFQRssboFAq1L-14zFRifhD8KDIkJ26rjpSnag9foAHpxAhNXMBRZA45cGDPxWkv-K4GLJNnJmFYXUFjXk0PKuOyayMsvh4pweGwRn3YwLFYrXQpMJjfvcgugQSb9ZbR4N7l1UUyg%3D)

**Here is how you can help right now:**

**ONE:** Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire are the battleground states where 2026 - and the road to 2028 - will be decided. The radical left is already pouring millions into these states.

**TWO:** Turning Point PAC is hiring, training, and funding **700 NEW ballot chasers**. Boots on the ground. Real relationships in real communities. Not TV ads. Not consultants. People.

**THREE:** Republicans outnumber Democrats in registration in these key states. We have the voters. We just need to reach them - and _**we need your help to do it**_.

Every **$50** you give funds a ballot chaser for a full day in the field.

[Every dollar you contribute today is a direct response to what happened Saturday night.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=5b41dbe647934745a0ae1ba67abcedc2&_e=Ous21DnudjfI468FmSPFqFHFE_DJDM9TBQNft38JJDLEKPuOctBSgJT_Jo0DeyVOzSY27UNarg2_TTGO3RWHZntXd_STmQO-wWiOAbqvEW9utxAxczJlH9Atxzoze_gknht-YYIz6tBYHqSOV-xrLJVeW6F3q2X5v3Qyf87jeqYHoAWSUOC1zqpZ_gEjJNd8TCn9YP754GGItRjALUzjG066zprEZbafIap0BbiMjg6C7jIwmDGjKH528eYto1eAue544CCeRlld44ro5-3GHdjOWzwSA-fv_FvJaNoLK_TlfDqHH76jm-OQAcGFERxr_fMkDIpmkiLjWpUpUXU0FnlqcgrGJQ-YLMXBpAdiDwXNsTs5UNQ8Kxm-lr6t0JfYqwdhG_StwkIQQpxSHakwZGnoKePl5czVrR7z5ohh1i-j8EGXioatwM8FxgqOuVhh07PZwsX4sPChFxBVNCsY6XaB5anAB0wkzHB89UrOTqQjtZ6jm88MNtWp4C_UIwab-sNcF58aGGIzfT2ZQqU9OboB2NhdYK8ux-3xSHezDcxHS9aeoS8p_zLrwXxCGMNn1lkwaDeFI1uSyFWxJ-GimfpLxAv9Crwgnb2MmqVcS-s%3D)

It is a statement that this movement will not be intimidated. That we will not be silenced. That _**we will not back down**_.

**Please stand with Turning Point PAC right now.**

They tried to stop him with two bullets in Butler, Pennsylvania.

They tried to stop him with a gunman on a golf course.

They tried to stop him on Saturday night with a shotgun, a handgun, and a manifesto.

**And every single time, he survived. And every single time, the America First movement came back stronger.**

That's because of you. And it's because of what we are building together.

The Red Wall starts in 2026. Help us build it.

For America and for Charlie,

Tyler Bowyer
Executive Director
Turning Point PAC

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.'s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee's name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. clean_body: Patriot, On Saturday night, a California man armed with a shotgun, a handgun, and multiple knives charged the security checkpoint at the White House Correspondents' Dinner, with President Trump in the room. His name is Cole Allen, a 31-year-old tutor from Torrance, California. And before he made his move, he sent a manifesto to his own family laying out exactly what he intended to do. He wanted to target administration officials, starting with the President of the United States! Let us be clear about what just happened... This is the third time they have tried to kill President Trump. And this time, the man who pulled the trigger wasn't some lone lunatic who slipped through the cracks. He had a plan, a manifesto, multiple weapons, and a hotel room on the 10th floor of the venue. He ran into that building while the President of the United States was inside! The radical left has spent years calling President Trump every name in the book. Calling his supporters terrorists. Weaponizing the courts, the FBI, and every arm of the federal government to destroy him. Calling for resistance by any means necessary. Well. Here is the truth: The Left is not going to stop. They will not accept the results of free and fair elections. They will not stop at legal warfare. Now we have seen - again - what happens when they incite enough hatred. This is exactly why what Turning Point PAC is doing matters so much right now. We are not fighting a political campaign. We are fighting for the survival of this movement. We are fighting to make sure that the America First movement cannot be stopped by violence, lawfare, or any other means the radical left throws at it. Here is how you can help right now: ONE: Arizona, Nevada, and New Hampshire are the battleground states where 2026 - and the road to 2028 - will be decided. The radical left is already pouring millions into these states. TWO: Turning Point PAC is hiring, training, and funding 700 NEW ballot chasers. Boots on the ground. Real relationships in real communities. Not TV ads. Not consultants. People. THREE: Republicans outnumber Democrats in registration in these key states. We have the voters. We just need to reach them - and we need your help to do it. Every $50 you give funds a ballot chaser for a full day in the field. It is a statement that this movement will not be intimidated. That we will not be silenced. That we will not back down. Please stand with Turning Point PAC right now. - They tried to stop him with two bullets in Butler, Pennsylvania. They tried to stop him with a gunman on a golf course. They tried to stop him on Saturday night with a shotgun, a handgun, and a manifesto. And every single time, he survived. | Dear Peter, I don’t know about you, but I can’t help but feel we are failing our kids, grandkids and all young people. Not only are they going to be the first generation worse off than any other before them, but they are going to have a harder time affording to live in the neighborhoods where they were raised, a harder time affording college and finding a job, not to mention the jobs AI may be taking away. It’s time for us to fight for the future and ensure the next generation thrives. We must reduce the debt our children will have to bear and make healthcare, education and the cost of living affordable. Together we can create an economy and a future that serves everyone! name: Florida GOP Team
subject: Florida deserves fair representation.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE REPUBLICAN PARTY OF FLORIDA
body:
Florida has changed dramatically over the last few years, and it is time our congressional map reflects the reality of the Sunshine State today. |
---

Hi Peter,

Florida has changed dramatically over the last few years, and it is time our congressional map reflects the reality of the Sunshine State today.

As Florida GOP Chairman Evan Power recently stated, Floridians have earned accurate representation. After years of record-breaking population growth and a shift that has led to a **1.5 million Republican voter registration advantage** , it is long past time to move away from outdated districts that no longer fit our state.

body:

| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

[](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)

Everything could change if I lose a supporter as devoted as you, so please say that you back MAGA ASAP!

name: Mai Vang
subject: Look at what we’ve built:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mai Vang For Congress
body:
| | | | [ ](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquO38L98SklfBdoDq94y0bmIPp1sMsxRlzUR9IaKq2v2grIy5OK_Hz_rGVIh5dOJbCp-ncKPMlc7PBvGPRNqQF442sFWvvJ4H1QjdZVnipMzCqEExSoT4-UHUSOZSI7ZgoAlj1d082ttDOioGle-5sUbyaDWFzHLhKFINGF2Inl2E2y-PqvAnDW_SP2oDi1hm0MMe4_bQw7vRqOPMwxrbCm83dxfYC7HbthD_PEpKuS_seFMqxmuDYPgkUlDGtgjXiqg_BKXfyzOlTITpOewVgSEEU9BvTMa7olgDTPvIJ-bg/4qb/pKfOIke0TBK7L7TronsnwA/h0/h001._JH6Z-0XbG7WbUEJpbp-1lzvKtTvkC_xCE1Uq41XPUc)
---
Friend,

I want to start by saying thank you for everything you did to support this campaign in April.

Whether you chipped in, showed up, or helped spread the word -- it made a real difference at a critical moment.

Over the past few months, we’ve been building something really special together.

From day one, this campaign has been about showing up, and because of you, that’s exactly what we’ve been able to do.

Below are a few moments from the year so far. If you’re short on time and didn’t get a chance to give in April, a **[donation of $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquO38L98SklfBdoDq94y0bmIPp1sMsxRlzUR9IaKq2v2jP6duldHpzB3V6jsa1n1fQQObqDrgrK_Xa669kmfIRZQC5t5Hh4TLZ8X-YmKbPBAz4jhqzHK98zcSPOROOeD8WeA765GNuY8IPavLX0nML8_Ev8QmSJQyiUr3GAB13wOhJBI-2Zgod9dDmY6Er0teBh1zeiAEgknEB1vzbvP7TiU-HZ1kEKk9PKGB8-RrhE_ElPsEdKOdUJ-FeG_YLRQZ1aBhFTy4Br-AVo-Ic6lQPD-A7kxIMi08Sjyg-cEpfBbg/4qb/pKfOIke0TBK7L7TronsnwA/h1/h001.aFD8C2w4LUGyI_IDvHH1YyJ55Z143aVWqP5eK8izhKs)** would help us keep building through to the June 2nd primary.

Thank you,

Mai | **[DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquO38L98SklfBdoDq94y0bmIPp1sMsxRlzUR9IaKq2v2jP6duldHpzB3V6jsa1n1fQQObqDrgrK_Xa669kmfIRZibdemC9WUohDmaTCqoHmpStWNFcMuqIEGE-jzS0M1Bw1y18o7JttqRH5Zs93T-8r9X4tVLLsVKLEpmuFix0d9uKwoyABI3KRCYXy5o7V_XTRWaiSEycj9dMobuM6uNymT6eF0e_yMrzljCiEkh0HoVH0updo1PWwEIvDMeSjwa8QMlXbFyjcUGJbDz7_WuCzUz0XxMERcmMRQ2GYJS0OcQ/4qb/pKfOIke0TBK7L7TronsnwA/h2/h001.U7vH2uhcGLLWFNUQiYLzMC9YxzNg1ugLmtsP1W03eiE)**
---

* * *
**We opened our campaign headquarters in Sacramento.**

That space has already become the center of our organizing – where volunteers come together, where we plan, and where this movement continues to grow.

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquO38L98SklfBdoDq94y0bmIPp1sMsxRlzUR9IaKq2v2jP6duldHpzB3V6jsa1n1fQQObqDrgrK_Xa669kmfIRZLlPTAdOIs86kqntInjwPJJgicgWFsjAYvcvpbV6FEe22gXov-zbQq2dAAjRnOgFekTsqntsJ6JO1s79l-nzi8a8SDuc1uXVyGNxHH-Dg4eKjoaYFhP2KMCSGka9uMtNM-yA2X3E7s8u1ESRlNmUZPfl4SoFE_cp7S6sKStTitkBHxxzF_iVHAK6_4eQcxu5twvfBckmPRvefeP50RjY67Q/4qb/pKfOIke0TBK7L7TronsnwA/h3/h001.FHD21BtEHWm_gYjp8EvPrhxHDkwwbBTDFB1kzm1P1Os)
**The Sacramento Bee endorsed our campaign.**

For the first time in decades, they endorsed a challenger over a 20-year incumbent. That’s a signal that what we’re building is real, and that people are ready for a change.

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquO38L98SklfBdoDq94y0bmIPp1sMsxRlzUR9IaKq2v2jP6duldHpzB3V6jsa1n1fQQObqDrgrK_Xa669kmfIRZHiFjGj8YyRqKEbaEGYuYf2kyU9XmN5CmEWy4-BN1zf9QWw_NBewtCcpsAZby1HGC3bZCL3cqpFnhg6ogT5IeQ9uZyA0212oRymqH8lCb5zukGZmZbDbj5XT1X2eo37C_oAdnGerGVlamKOO-8Xav0WKwoxZxqR40NM_Z4nWdmgVDCntHvldyEZyzWof0issUENlPkP7tsuQ3CitmvGbK_A/4qb/pKfOIke0TBK7L7TronsnwA/h4/h001.oAdHLS9Yk3w4VQvVYaQjqRDtHk9ARlwfmVNlbuBGfgg)
**We launched our first TV ad.**

Every second of that ad was powered by grassroots support. No corporate PACs. Just people making sure our message reaches voters across CA-07.

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquO38L98SklfBdoDq94y0bmIPp1sMsxRlzUR9IaKq2v2jP6duldHpzB3V6jsa1n1fQQObqDrgrK_Xa669kmfIRZ19fD6TQcj11f_DH5K2Ooi4Kh2tt3gXH3sCWCHbreO8MsYLcDGlh-lXploH-nGVpOiAaPJ96ZQf-2YlVTSBxSXxPFHIVBy1uEwp7RlQsoNgNWtCpHVDassg1SpCyUdNfYnOk-RUci7LB7ehEmoMrO_AQ3w73G7bwKVhENCoqnJ9t4HXzareS3aPSuO0bV8GH56_3rUiBlFM4Kg8csQ3o3Sg/4qb/pKfOIke0TBK7L7TronsnwA/h5/h001.MhITA28QV3juZY4kieBm0i9-9Tg0JsXa-MY1AVqoRCM)
And through it all, we’ve kept showing up. At community events. At doors. In conversations across this district.

**That’s how we’re going to win.**

[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquO38L98SklfBdoDq94y0bmIPp1sMsxRlzUR9IaKq2v2jP6duldHpzB3V6jsa1n1fQQObqDrgrK_Xa669kmfIRZBLl6mKri1CgACJjW6slJENfzLg3fEtXiL9b6vFwik5dUoJDvvseqRa0O3GdLqTRwxEJs7FY6dK2X2e6sgYAZift0wO0ZZMH8vnpi9GfMT3PcB1-SyLsvkNIbkR7Jma3KWpNgxx8JU3EwiJ72ksuv2pbPFCrDRtGAP0laxDlR0Q9RTUJnwBFWR_bUdaZs4aBiGduRf3VmfEV1_-Sedjh-QQ/4qb/pKfOIke0TBK7L7TronsnwA/h6/h001.qtexJI7afAXmLcaRwB9uct4e8rqduH-u3idm-3wp2gI)
Thank you for being a part of this.

With heart and hustle,

Mai **[DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquO38L98SklfBdoDq94y0bmIPp1sMsxRlzUR9IaKq2v2jP6duldHpzB3V6jsa1n1fQQObqDrgrK_Xa669kmfIRZRO9nbrHtsdiLZVDxNsmOEupiQIhsT1DOsW_euF_zfhj2tGF-im3fSaggay-8H2agXHxgZ7jfg0tMKUhenwlEF8QutcL7Cty-It0HYgOI-oLlDIqhKqzcv1rJMlnHVhivEnWlpnlmIbpWaLAFcAoD-PJVUvgcwpPs6fRqxG--cxsWEmpm1Bl0rLeII3lWuWdRScMv3G5-z6kJpqMiSpwVpQ/4qb/pKfOIke0TBK7L7TronsnwA/h7/h001.NIZG85TwVue9Ou3XjK0DJdv1AuL1dWHOkZHDZDQwDEg)**
---
|
---
Mai is the daughter of Hmong refugees, born and raised in Sacramento. Mai’s parents fled war in Laos and arrived in California to find a new life.

As the oldest of 16 children, she helped raise her siblings while working hard to build a career dedicated to helping her community thrive. Mai is a proud product of public schools and was the first in her family to attend college. As a young organizer, Mai returned home to serve the community that raised and supported her.

To support Mai’s grassroots campaign, [consider making a contribution here.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquO38L98SklfBdoDq94y0bmIPp1sMsxRlzUR9IaKq2v2qD4EU4vozQb0JExaz8qY1vIEAHQ53NbqnfrIOSHNwsPBRurx9EE539IG1PnagP3DxReFubVF1VInaIpVIOw_qnahnrRwGmEh5KkX2oJ4fBY8cHMCKv6jnGpzRZ2XfnqO-8T4QBSf2Z09gsyScFM4-mIhrpNRRyaDiqvQBNDUZzMiJGGgXizfF-lBBceoW8MkCqtq6Jt_4vcF6Xr5U1J0r_CLODppAyYwBXMidvH4x_XoPraevdJz_6-AllYGHBnCA/4qb/pKfOIke0TBK7L7TronsnwA/h8/h001.at5UIz15192B2rDkbYLh87vyFCxSeifpdfesHjmnRfI)

clean_body: | | | | Friend, I want to start by saying thank you for everything you did to support this campaign in April. Whether you chipped in, showed up, or helped spread the word -- it made a real difference at a critical moment. Over the past few months, we’ve been building something really special together. From day one, this campaign has been about showing up, and because of you, that’s exactly what we’ve been able to do. Below are a few moments from the year so far. If you’re short on time and didn’t get a chance to give in April, a would help us keep building through to the June 2nd primary. Thank you, Mai | We opened our campaign headquarters in Sacramento. That space has already become the center of our organizing – where volunteers come together, where we plan, and where this movement continues to grow. The Sacramento Bee endorsed our campaign. For the first time in decades, they endorsed a challenger over a 20-year incumbent. That’s a signal that what we’re building is real, and that people are ready for a change. We launched our first TV ad. Every second of that ad was powered by grassroots support. No corporate PACs. Just people making sure our message reaches voters across CA-07. And through it all, we’ve kept showing up. At community events. At doors. In conversations across this district. That’s how we’re going to win. Thank you for being a part of this. With heart and hustle, Mai ** | Mai is the daughter of Hmong refugees, born and raised in Sacramento. Mai’s parents fled war in Laos and arrived in California to find a new life. As the oldest of 16 children, she helped raise her siblings while working hard to build a career dedicated to helping her community thrive. Mai is a proud product of public schools and was the first in her family to attend college. As a young organizer, Mai returned home to serve the community that raised and supported her. This isn't a "both sides" problem.

The violent Left murdered Charlie. They openly celebrated his death.

_You can 't sit this one out. _

**Winning in 2026 is existential. Winning in 2028 is existential. **

The violent Left will absolutely come for us --_ in every which way that they can. _

_Beat them at the ballot box. _

| | | **IMPORTANT NEWS FROM TEAM CRUZ ...** **[Vance, Cruz Head To Iowa On 2026 Missions As 2028 GOP Race To Succeed Trump Heats Up:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)_"_** Two of the biggest names in the Republican Party are making stops the next few days in Iowa, a key 2026 midterm battleground state whose caucuses, for a half century, have kicked off the GOP's presidential nominating calendar. Vice President JD Vance and Sen. Ted Cruz of Texas will have the midterms on their minds during their visits, which come with just over six months to go until this year's elections, when Republicans will be defending their slim Senate and razor-thin House majorities. But the moment the midterms are over, the..." **[Ted Cruz Says Government Shouldn't "Censor Speech" After FCC Launches Early Review of Disney Broadcast TV Licenses:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.-iuVKR2EbDDBpDKRIw)** "Ted Cruz is speaking out against the Federal Communications Commission's decision to launch an early review of Disney's broadcast TV licenses amid backlash Jimmy Kimmel has faced for his "expectant widow" joke. "It is not government's job to censor speech, and I do not believe the FCC should operate as the speech police," the Republican senator from Texas told Punchbowl News. He wasn't the only one to criticize the FCC's decision, as the National Association of Broadcasters also issued a statement..." **[CRUZ: Standing Against Christian Persecution:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)** "More Christians are killed for their faith in Nigeria than anywhere else in the world. Since 2009, Islamic jihadists have murdered more than 50,000 Christians in Nigeria, and more than 20,000 churches, schools, and religious institutions have been destroyed. Last year, I introduced the Nigeria Religious Freedom Accountability Act, which would require placing Nigeria back on the country of particular concern list and impose sanctions on officials involved in enforcing blasphemy and Sharia laws. When Christians are being systematically persecuted, anyone who remains silent..." **[Senators Cornyn, Cruz Lash Out At Houston Catch And Release Immigration Ordinance:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.)** "Senator Ted Cruz and Senator John Cornyn have both issued stinging rebukes of Houston City Council's decision to further minimize local police cooperation with Immigration and Customs Enforcement. "The Houston City Council's new sanctuary city policy is not only absurd - it's dangerous. Immigration enforcement is a critical part of ensuring national security and public safety. There's no logical reason Houston police shouldn't be able to fully cooperate with ICE agents who are simply enforcing our nation's immigration laws..." **[Ted Cruz: Democrats Will Do Anything To Stay In Power:](https://trk.email.tedcruz.org/c/7/eyJhaSI6MjE0NTQxMDEsImUiOiJtZy1lbmM6NWh6RDRoYmhSOTR0SVViRGFVQXlzUGowaHcxSkVGa0EiLCJyaSI6IjEzODc0OTA4NDUiLCJycSI6IjAyLWIyNjEyMy0xMGFiZWM2NDYxZDU0MWYxYTliOTg1NzBmZTQ0MGIwMyIsIm0iOmZhbHNlLCJ1aSI6IjUiLCJ1biI6IiIsInUiOiJodHRwczovL3d3dy5mb3huZXdzLmNvbS92aWRlby82Mzk0MjE4ODAyMTEyIn0/PHeYDEhqq-nxmRrVPXdN2Q) "**On Wednesday April 29, Senator Ted Cruz joined Sean Hannity on Fox News to discuss the Democrats' gerrymander in Virginia. Cruz described the Democrats actions as brazen and an abuse of power, and explained that the Democrat governor and legislature are attempting to take Virginia from a 6-5 Democrat state to a 10-1 Democrat state. Cruz also discussed the 6-3 Supreme Court decision in Louisiana v. name: Justin J. Pearson
subject: Trump is calling to eliminate my district
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
Our ancestors didn’t organize, march, bleed, and pray so we could shrug our shoulders now.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20260503-1&t=1&akid=3439%2E587540%2ELjZ_0Z)
Peter, Donald Trump conspired with the MAGA Gov. of Tennessee to try to eliminate my Democratic majority-Black district.
**But our ancestors didn’t organize, march, bleed, and pray so we could shrug our shoulders now.** We must honor their legacy by standing up, by showing up, and by refusing to be quiet when the foundation of our democracy is being chipped away.
That’s why I’m asking you to join me now — not with despair, but with **determination**.
**[I'm personally asking you to consider splitting a $10 donation to Leaders We Deserve and toward our new $100,000 Defend District 9 goal. Your donation and support now does more than just support our People-powered campaign for Congress — it truly powers our new mission to save this district from total elimination in a corrupt Republican power grab.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260503_1_justin.g51iqs&refcode=em20260503-3439&amount=10&t=2&akid=3439%2E587540%2ELjZ_0Z)**
**[Donate $10 »](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260503_1_justin.g51iqs&amount=10&refcode=em20260503-3439&t=3&akid=3439%2E587540%2ELjZ_0Z)**
After the shameful Supreme Court decision that gutted the strongest protection against discrimination in voting secured by the Voting Rights Act of 1965, it's clear that Republicans understand something simple: **the more People are allowed to participate fairly in our democracy, the harder it is for them to hold onto power.**
I spoke to the New York Times about this and here is what I said:
[](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260503_1_justin.g51iqs&refcode=em20260503-3439&amount=10&t=4&akid=3439%2E587540%2ELjZ_0Z)
Republicans are going to do what they’ve always done — rewrite the rules to their advantage, abuse the law, and disenfranchise every community they can to silence dissent, suppress votes, and take away representation.
**[If you can, please split $10 toward our new $100,000 fundraising goal to defend district TN-09, and continue building the People-powered Movement that will never back down from the GOP’s authoritarianism.](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/2160?c0=em_ms_lwd_20260503_1_justin.g51iqs&refcode=em20260503-3439&amount=10&t=5&akid=3439%2E587540%2ELjZ_0Z)**

clean_body: Our ancestors didn’t organize, march, bleed, and pray so we could shrug our shoulders now. Peter, Donald Trump conspired with the MAGA Gov. of Tennessee to try to eliminate my Democratic majority-Black district. But our ancestors didn’t organize, march, bleed, and pray so we could shrug our shoulders now. We must honor their legacy by standing up, by showing up, and by refusing to be quiet when the foundation of our democracy is being chipped away. That’s why I’m asking you to join me now — not with despair, but with determination. After the shameful Supreme Court decision that gutted the strongest protection against discrimination in voting secured by the Voting Rights Act of 1965, it's clear that Republicans understand something simple: the more People are allowed to participate fairly in our democracy, the harder it is for them to hold onto power. I spoke to the New York Times about this and here is what I said: Republicans are going to do what they’ve always done — rewrite the rules to their advantage, abuse the law, and disenfranchise every community they can to silence dissent, suppress votes, and take away representation. The only way they'll stop is if the People fight back so loud that they can't silence us. In Love & Service, Justin J. Pearson

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

This is the nobody saw coming. | Elon Musk — once considered an ally of Donald Trump — has launched a shocking public attack. And it’s not just words. Hidden footage and confidential intel reveal a mission so controversial, it’s shaking the very foundation of MAGA America. Why did Elon turn on Trump? What’s really behind Trump’s so-called “secret mission”? And why are so many trying to keep this story buried? For the first time, we bring you undeniable proof — unfiltered, uncensored, and raw. This is the footage they don’t want you to see. All the best, Simmy Adelman, Publisher Behind the Markets Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | First Invеstmеnt Updаtеs brоught tо уоu bу Іnception Media, LLC. clean_body: The invasion is restarting as I type this.| | | Peter, I am furious. They are ruling that the U.S. is required to let anyone in who says they’re “fleeing persecution.” This is not law. This is judicial tyranny. President Trump gave a clear order to secure the border and stop the invasion. Yet these unelected judges just overruled the will of the American people. The consequences of these activist judges are DEADLY: ❌Fentanyl pouring across the border and killing our kids. ❌MS-13 and vicious gangs terrorizing American communities. ❌Illegals straining our welfare programs, burdening the American taxpayer. We are watching our country be fundamentally transformed right in front of us – and the Radical Left is cheering it on. I will not stand by and let activist judges destroy our sovereignty. . Peter, this fight starts TODAY – and starts with YOU. The only way to win this is with massive grassroots support from loyal patriots like yourself. This is not a drill. Activist judges want to rip our borders wide open, harming you and your family in the process. The future of our nation is on the line. ⬇️ ⬇️ ⬇️ ⬇️ For American Sovereignty, Congressman Eric BurlisonMI-07 P.S. Every hour we wait is another hour our border remains undefended — and another hour American taxpayers foot the bill. | | Paid for by Eric Burlison for Congress 2135 E. Independence Ave. #1007 Springfield, MO 65807

We’re building this campaign the hard way – person by person – and here’s how you can be part of it.
| | | | | [](https://cefuo8hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r4PCR3U6xkeOELlVTOPHw4mJoMEQGYn-srSmJsuiFQAdzDLMVnMCDPaYiU38RhFWYjVXBunu3Tbppm0n_o8fgpMUBnvs73njTlr-I0slIst46_J1ccU9TfTFO-Lcind8ZcyB5kNXpDV1HDNqpJbGN9v4WSfO7DUMx9ZfMC0RV_Qw1yU6esxzZb1huv6EvxyX5udRWhGtgogY898VkyYkla_8uwyV5MQDXFfQFbxP2ByOEGsVRf2KYslibLsGH98-QOe9xwHCvlGkKjcH6yW7VTv2bvMc9pn-i_xj9jzNPNs=&c=cZTptF8vEK_0YZIcywUgf1swSbGW5pm7f-2hDazU4DBDad6cFhzsCQ==&ch=Vvk9a5z9l5DF4KXmHfli5mDhmKyoJcYA5dW-1Qo1jGdmf5EpBRWgRw==)

|
With just over a month to go until Primary ballots go out, folks have been asking me, "What can I do to actually help?"
I love that question.
Beating a 30-year incumbent who's taken millions from corporate PACs is not a vibes-based project. It takes organizing, reach, and a lot of people doing the small, unglamorous things that compound into power.
So here are the three biggest things you can do right now:
1\. [Take our issues survey](https://cefuo8hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r4PCR3U6xkeOELlVTOPHw4mJoMEQGYn-srSmJsuiFQAdzDLMVnMCDCAZ0tII0Ihc6ABaLWmfOuPlGCXFWchkA1eIBW_v5SJoNf6i934DOJLq7o4Nc8vkENly9AQA0Xlp5R7E5Ncjr5-BiI0SwHshFgIlDr3cgMoP_uJaMtzZZPo=&c=cZTptF8vEK_0YZIcywUgf1swSbGW5pm7f-2hDazU4DBDad6cFhzsCQ==&ch=Vvk9a5z9l5DF4KXmHfli5mDhmKyoJcYA5dW-1Qo1jGdmf5EpBRWgRw==) so this campaign remains rooted in what people are actually living through, not what consultants think sounds good.
2\. [Follow our campaign on social platforms](https://cefuo8hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r4PCR3U6xkeOELlVTOPHw4mJoMEQGYn-srSmJsuiFQAdzDLMVnMCDP0dP4ZFL2pbUfbJxV_YIWon-GWyVKEJydW-QaXUqXCCWXGGXpHXu4ys_UYeH8ATUX0BPzsJXaPuS_xGH3pp6_V7TOefa2GqocooiX_iOZFqSYIzUOBIBzI=&c=cZTptF8vEK_0YZIcywUgf1swSbGW5pm7f-2hDazU4DBDad6cFhzsCQ==&ch=Vvk9a5z9l5DF4KXmHfli5mDhmKyoJcYA5dW-1Qo1jGdmf5EpBRWgRw==) and repost, like, and share our content so we can beat the oligarch-bro algorithm and reach more people directly.
3\. [Chip in if you can](https://cefuo8hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001r4PCR3U6xkeOELlVTOPHw4mJoMEQGYn-srSmJsuiFQAdzDLMVnMCDP0dP4ZFL2pbag-ZvrbkRZT58N4bYtUEwy5Wtr_Afhb6NYolKyyf6c3Jd4rMuTKwAc9HfIBrpSgNnsYvdo2CYoUUUIDnc88R3DtjlJA5HMEIKwoTAsJSxA1W8x0FSzzNlHvn7ujrTBUtMu_q5ImXpoVv2So8T0Txg6WrOW2AmOu9OPis9tg7RXbiR1g635uYwQ==&c=cZTptF8vEK_0YZIcywUgf1swSbGW5pm7f-2hDazU4DBDad6cFhzsCQ==&ch=Vvk9a5z9l5DF4KXmHfli5mDhmKyoJcYA5dW-1Qo1jGdmf5EpBRWgRw==), so we can print the lit, knock the doors, run the ads that don't suck, and build the kind of campaign that can win.
We're not waiting around for permission from the same political establishment that got us here.
We're organizers, and if you're reading this, you're part of the team.
- Melat

name: Katie Porter
subject: Two paths
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41265%2E3422442%2ERqvYcf)
Dear Peter,
Running for governor in California is expensive. There are two paths candidates can take to deal with this.
One is to sell out your values to the special interests who got California into this mess. That’s the path some of my opponents are choosing.
There’s Xavier Becerra, who has taken _tens of thousands of dollars from Big Oil_ to fuel his campaign.
Then there’s Tom Steyer, a literal billionaire who made his fortune investing in big polluters and private prisons. _Now, he’s pouring $147 million into his campaign_ —enough to make your eyes pop.
**The other path is the one I’m choosing: grassroots support powered by my commitment to fight for working Californians.**
I’ve never taken corporate PAC money, and I never will. Instead, I’m building a movement of more than 100,000 people who’ve chipped in what they can, when they can, to power our campaign.
**Make no mistake: the corporate money my opponents are taking is helping their campaign. In the final weeks of this race, I’m counting on Porter Supporters more than ever to fund our ads and keep us competitive.**
**[Peter, can you help us pull ahead in the polls by chipping in $5 or more to our campaign today?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260503_1_ak.xxk7s2&refcode=em20260503-41265&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41265%2E3422442%2ERqvYcf)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260503_1_ak.xxk7s2&refcode=em20260503-41265&t=22&akid=41265%2E3422442%2ERqvYcf)
Thank you,
Katie Porter

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260503-41265&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=41265_3422442_RqvYcf&akid=41265%2E3422442%2ERqvYcf)**

subject: ' Trump’s DOJ Continues Biden-Era Prosecution of Prominent COVID-Era Maryland Physician' by Booker Scott
body:
How does a doctor praised for saving lives during the pandemic end up facing a Biden-era prosecution under Trump's DOJ?

| |
