# [' Trump's DOJ Continues Biden-Era Prosecution of Prominent COVID-Era Maryland Physician' by Booker Scott](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=196139081&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk2MTM5MDgxLCJpYXQiOjE3Nzc4Mjc5MDEsImV4cCI6MTc4MDQxOTkwMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTY3Mjk1ODkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.MSErz8z3bJj42_HClfCYL5Z2GwHK3NRwj-TY6ZuR84s)
### How does a doctor praised for saving lives during the pandemic end up facing a Biden-era prosecution under Trump's DOJ?
| | [Heartland Journal ®](https://substack.com/@heartlandjournal)
---
| May 3
---
| [](https://substack.com/@heartlandjournal)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=196139081&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk2MTM5MDgxLCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc3NzgyNzkwMSwiZXhwIjoxNzgwNDE5OTAxLCJpc3MiOiJwdWItNjcyOTU4OSIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.KsFn3QpLGawvJQUGUqyfifc5-VqFLqhBByo8uBaBGzc&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=196139081&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk2MTM5MDgxLCJpYXQiOjE3Nzc4Mjc5MDEsImV4cCI6MTc4MDQxOTkwMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTY3Mjk1ODkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.MSErz8z3bJj42_HClfCYL5Z2GwHK3NRwj-TY6ZuR84s&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=196139081&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk2MTM5MDgxLCJpYXQiOjE3Nzc4Mjc5MDEsImV4cCI6MTc4MDQxOTkwMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTY3Mjk1ODkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.MSErz8z3bJj42_HClfCYL5Z2GwHK3NRwj-TY6ZuR84s)
---
| | [](https://substack..VdwiSiGUDOexcL4bEKm-t_31gQ4r4dWNuqW2KGQ5Mp0?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/heartlandjournal/p/trumps-doj-continues-biden-era-prosecution?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/1debe08c-bc43-4ddd-affd-2b99920048fb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dr. Ron Elfenbein, a Maryland emergency room physician and healthcare entrepreneur, emerged as a frontline hero during the COVID-19 pandemic. He pioneered one of Maryland's first drive-through testing operations, ultimately testing and treating over 100,000 patients across multiple sites.

His clinics administered tests, provided monoclonal antibody infusions, sourced PPE, and even partnered with government entities like the DEA. For these efforts, he received citations from the Maryland governor and state legislature, along with "Person of the Year" honors from the state medical society. Yet today, Elfenbein faces renewed federal prosecution under the Trump administration's Department of Justice--charges originally brought during the Biden era.
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=6729589&post_id=196139081&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk2MTM5MDgxLCJpYXQiOjE3Nzc4Mjc5MDEsImV4cCI6MTc4MDQxOTkwMSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTY3Mjk1ODkiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.MSErz8z3bJj42_HClfCYL5Z2GwHK3NRwj-TY6ZuR84s)
Supporters call it a textbook case of selective enforcement and weaponization against a vocal critic of federal COVID policies. The controversy centers on billing practices at Elfenbein's drive-through sites operated by Drs. ERgent Care / First Call Medical Center. Prosecutors alleged that between 2020 and 2021, the clinics submitted over $15 million in false claims to Medicare and commercial insurers.

Specifically, they charged healthcare fraud for using higher-level evaluation and management (E/M) CPT codes--Level 4--for brief patient encounters that often lasted just minutes, involving nasal swabs, basic screenings, and virtual consultations via tent-side monitors. The government argued these visits did not justify the billing complexity.

Elfenbein's defenders counter that pandemic chaos created ambiguous guidelines. Drive-through operations moved patients rapidly to meet overwhelming demand, and coding interpretations varied. Elfenbein was an early, outspoken advocate for monoclonal antibodies--the same treatment that helped then-President Trump recover quickly.

He appeared frequently on CBS, Fox News, Newsmax, and other outlets, criticizing Biden administration decisions to restrict or redistribute these therapies based on what he called flawed data. Just weeks after his public criticism, federal investigators targeted him, but no until then.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/5c346f36-fe72-4aeb-b17c-be7213dc28c8?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
In August 2023, after an 11-day trial, a federal jury in Baltimore convicted Elfenbein on five counts of healthcare fraud. Each count carried up to 10 years in prison, potentially totaling decades behind bars plus massive restitution. In a rare and detailed 93-page opinion issued December 21, 2023, U.S. District Judge James K. Bredar (an Obama appointee) granted Elfenbein's motion for judgment of acquittal.

The judge ruled that the government failed to prove beyond a reasonable doubt that Elfenbein's use of the codes was objectively unreasonable or false, citing ambiguities in CPT guidelines during the emergency. He also conditionally granted a new trial, noting the defense evidence was strong. The Biden DOJ appealed on its way out the door.

In July 2025, the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fourth Circuit reversed the acquittal, finding sufficient evidence for a jury to convict under a lower bar, but upheld the conditional new trial order due to weaknesses in the government's case. A retrial is now scheduled for August 2026.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oZWFydGxhbmRqb3VybmFsLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.FrUETa1uL9oPJwJrrqZ8fiHO7LhwPxAo4t8YndM3wVc?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=196139081)
Elfenbein maintains his innocence, describing the case as retaliation for challenging federal overreach on treatments that could have saved lives (the antibodies). He notes the government later adjusted monoclonal antibody policies after acknowledging data issues. Supporters have launched petitions urging the Trump DOJ to drop the charges, arguing it perpetuates Biden-era lawfare rather than ending it.

This high-profile case raises broader questions about prosecutorial discretion, billing ambiguities in crises, and whether federal agencies target dissenting voices. As the August 2026 retrial looms, Dr. Elfenbein continues advocating for patients while fighting for his freedom and reputation.

Is it worth it for the Trump DOJ to continue to pursue the case against Elfenbein and does Trump or the higher ups in his DOJ even know the low-level Maryland prosecutors are continuing to pursue the case? Elfenbein hopes the case is finally dropped.

Editorial comments expressed in this column are the sole opinion of the writer
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d01ec70b-85a1-4f4b-8cd7-d4ee67ac8756?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

name: Mallory McMorrow
subject: What I had to say about Chuck Schumer 👇
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McMorrow for Michigan
body:
# [](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/685?refcode=&t=1&akid=4623%2E898137%2Ea7-jom)
Hey, did you catch me on CNN?
**Before I dive into what I shared with Manu Raju, I have to ask:**
[**Will you donate to my campaign for the Senate? I’m running to be the voice of Michigan, not the voice of the D.C. status quo. But taking on the establishment takes resources, and I’m counting on you to keep this going.**](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/6403?t=2&akid=4623%2E898137%2Ea7-jom)
| [DONATE](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/4?c0=mam-em-cnn26.5XvxsC&refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260503_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=4623%2E898137%2Ea7-jom)
---
[](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/6403?t=4&akid=4623%2E898137%2Ea7-jom)
_“I am the only candidate in our race who said that I would not support Chuck Schumer for leader. And I said it on Day One of this campaign, because we are desperate for a new Democratic Party and new leadership in the Democratic Party that recognizes, not as a lifelong politician, but as an American and as Michiganders here, what’s actually at stake here and what’s on the line.__**It is the future of our country.**_
_And people are responding to that. I get asked regularly on the campaign trail what I think about the Democratic Party. 'Is the Democratic Party getting this right? I’ve been asked multiple times at events, ‘Would you support Chuck Schumer?’ And I’ve said NO. It is stunning to me that neither of my opponents can give a definitive yes or no on that simple question.”_
The political establishment — the same people trying to clear the path for my opponent — don’t like that position. They think Washington should pick our leaders. They think that if you play by the rules and wait for permission, you’ll succeed.
**I’m not afraid to tell the truth, even if it’s hard. Because the stakes are too high to keep doing the same thing — it’s time for new ideas, new energy, and new leaders.**
[**We are up against the DC establishment and millions in GOP spending, and I don't take a dime from corporate PACs. This campaign is funded by people like you — so I’m personally asking you to donate right now:**](https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/6403?t=5&akid=4623%2E898137%2Ea7-jom)

I know what you may be thinking, _“John, will $1 really make a difference in overhauling ICE, reining in Trump’s illegal war in the Middle East, or preventing MAGA Republicans from selling off our public lands?”_ The answer is a resounding **yes.** Let me explain:
**If Democrats have any chance of taking back the Senate, it means we’ve got to defend this seat in Colorado.**
MAGA Republicans spent nearly $50 MILLION in 2020 trying to beat us. Now with their majority on the line, they’re gearing up to spend whatever it takes to flip this seat back to red.
Even more alarming? President Trump has made Colorado one of his top targets this year, and he’s prepared to wield his $1.5 BILLION war chest to beat us in the midterms and in 2028.
Our campaign doesn’t take a single penny from corporate PACs, so grassroots support is how we fight back. When folks like you chip in whatever you can, whenever you can, it really adds up. _And it shows Washington elites and the ultra-wealthy few just how much power everyday, hardworking folks hold._

name: NDRC
subject: You’re Invited: Emergency Redistricting Briefing tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President
body:
🚨 Emergency redistricting briefing tomorrow at 6 PM ET
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130677844/618545937/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0MmE4Yjg1LTExNDctZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=njhJNCDGQCreo0vdBgIoTxcFhzkSBarWRP_-qwY5bQE=&emci=c51230dc-fb46-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=f42a8b85-1147-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=8431045)
---

**[Join Attorney General Eric Holder and House Democratic Leader Jeffries virtually Monday, May 4 at 6 PM ET for an emergency post-Callais redistricting briefing!](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130677846/618545944/-964011402?utm_campaign=20260503-NDRC-All-PostCallaisInvite&refcode=20260503-NDRC-All-PostCallaisInvite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0MmE4Yjg1LTExNDctZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=njhJNCDGQCreo0vdBgIoTxcFhzkSBarWRP_-qwY5bQE=&emci=c51230dc-fb46-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=f42a8b85-1147-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=8431045)** Peter,

As you read this, multiple states are gearing up to redraw their already gerrymandered congressional maps in the wake of the Supreme Court’s egregious _Callais_ decision. There is no limit to the lengths that Republicans will go to lock themselves into power and avoid accountability for their disastrous policies.

We’re not just going to sit on our hands as this happens. As President Obama put it, “such setbacks can be overcome. But that will only happen if citizens across the country who cherish our democratic ideals continue to mobilize and vote in record numbers”.

**[That is why we’re inviting you to join us for a special emergency briefing tomorrow at 6 PM ET.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130677848/618545950/-964011402?utm_campaign=20260503-NDRC-All-PostCallaisInvite&refcode=20260503-NDRC-All-PostCallaisInvite&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY0MmE4Yjg1LTExNDctZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=njhJNCDGQCreo0vdBgIoTxcFhzkSBarWRP_-qwY5bQE=&emci=c51230dc-fb46-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=f42a8b85-1147-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=8431045)**

_Attorney General Eric Holder will be joined by special guest House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries to discuss what’s at stake and our plan to fight back for fair maps and fair representation — together._ **What:** A Live Event With Attorney General Eric Holder and

clean_body: 🚨 Emergency redistricting briefing tomorrow at 6 PM ET | Peter, As you read this, multiple states are gearing up to redraw their already gerrymandered congressional maps in the wake of the Supreme Court’s egregious Callais decision. There is no limit to the lengths that Republicans will go to lock themselves into power and avoid accountability for their disastrous policies. We’re not just going to sit on our hands as this happens. As President Obama put it, “such setbacks can be overcome. But that will only happen if citizens across the country who cherish our democratic ideals continue to mobilize and vote in record numbers”. Attorney General Eric Holder will be joined by special guest House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries to discuss what’s at stake and our plan to fight back for fair maps and fair representation — together. What: A Live Event With Attorney General Eric Holder and House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries When: 6 PM ET | Monday, May 4 Where: Register on Mobilize | | We are building a strong coalition to safeguard our democracy, protect fair maps, and combat ongoing gerrymandering nationwide. We hope to see you there! The NDRC Team The federal officeholders are appearing at this event only as special guests. They are not asking for funds or donations. = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. Text MAPS to 36787, STOP to end. Msg and Data rates may apply

name: EMILYs List
subject: Taking back power sounds like this >>
body:
Because saying it out loud is just the beginning |

subject: Let me be blunt:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Duncan for Governor
body:
---
| | Let me be blunt: The last time Democrats elected a governor in Georgia was in **_1998._**

We have a golden opportunity to change that -- but if we keep running the same losing playbook, Democrats could be locked out of power for _another_ 30 years.

I’m the only candidate in this race who can win in November by building a coalition of Democrats, Independents, and fed-up Republicans who believe in common sense leadership.

If you’re with me, will you use this link to rush an urgent donation to my campaign? _[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/geoff-duncan-202604-em](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130678333/618547760/985402107?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=25&refcode=EM_RTI_GD_20260503_FR_5B_T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjA3MDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjI5YjFiZjMtMTE0Ny1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fH7DNYbaP3EHOzglijU5CAqAB0BPGqNlQ9qNj0YDWPo=)_

National political experts have labeled our race a “toss-up,” calling it the best Democratic pickup opportunity in the country.

But if Democrats want to finally win in Georgia, we need to do something different -- and I’m a different kind of Democrat.

**But Georgians are already voting, so we’re running out of time to make our message heard.**

Donate right now at this link to help us reach as many voters as possible before it’s too late: _[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/geoff-duncan-202604-em](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130678340/618547767/985402107?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&addr1=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&employer=&occupation=&amount=25&refcode=EM_RTI_GD_20260503_FR_5B_T1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjA3MDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjI5YjFiZjMtMTE0Ny1mMTExLThlZjItMDAwZDNhMTRiNjQwIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fH7DNYbaP3EHOzglijU5CAqAB0BPGqNlQ9qNj0YDWPo=)_

Thank you so much.

\-- Geoff

name: Katie Britt
subject: You cannot share this: A private note
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc
body:
Please read my confidential note before it's too late.
|
---
| | | | [](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
---
| | |
---
| | Friend,
I wrote a special, private note for you— __**and for you only**__ —detailing the crushing reality. I honestly have nowhere else to turn but to you.
The liberals are pouring _**millions**_ into their campaigns, and I'm losing sleep knowing that if we fail to hold our seats, we fail President Trump. **[They will control the Senate, and his entire agenda will be blocked.](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)**
---

I'm not supposed to tell you how bad the deficit is, but I can't look away from the truth. Please, _I'm humbling myself before you,_ asking you to read my confidential note immediately. You are my _**only**_ hope to fight back against this tidal wave of liberal money.

**[Please click below, read my plea, and understand the weight of what's at stake.](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)** And please, promise me you won't share this. If this note gets out, President Trump's fight is over.
|
---
[Read My Confidential Note Here >>](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
Forever Humbled,
|
---
[](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
| | ****

---
|
---
|
---
|
---
[](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
I didn’t run for Senate to sit quietly on the sidelines. I’m a mom, a conservative, and a proud Alabamian—and I came to fight for the values that make America strong.

_**Faith. Family. Freedom.**_

The Left is doing everything they can to tear it all down. But I didn’t come to Washington to play games. I came to fight for the people who feel forgotten, overlooked, and ignored.

From securing the border to protecting our kids and defending our way of life—I’m in this for the long haul.

**This fight isn’t easy, but it’s worth it. And I’m not going anywhere.**

Will you stand with me?
|
---
[STAND WITH KATIE >>](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
|
---
[](https://link.email.brittforsenate.)
| |
# **We'd be sad to see you go, but if you want to stop receiving our emails, click[HERE](https://link.email.brittforsenate.com/click/e42705/VaHR0cHM6Ly9iZmEubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfYnJpdHRmb3JzZW5hdGVfY29tMjYwNTAz/LbmNsRzRxdTRs/qP2hpZHM9bmM0OHZzeVhjb05HbHM/gafeAjQ/s5p84daef79)**
---
| | Paid for by Britt for Alabama, Inc.
---

body:
Early voting has officially begun!| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130678641/618549094/-12840034?refcode=260503-ev-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NjYwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjE4Mzk3Zi0xMjQ3LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OKY1Y-azaDESCAjoy-5QkZhnUJcld1SOf4BVAULWDvU=)

| | | **_Early voting has officially begun in Georgia!_**
---
This is where elections begin to take shape — where momentum turns into real votes, and where campaigns like ours show up strong. We have a clear goal right now: **Make sure every single voter who’s ready for a change gets to the polls.** That means continuing to reach voters, getting out the vote in every community, and making sure no one sits this election out. _But we can’t do that without resources._ **With early voting officially underway, every dollar we raise right now goes directly toward turnout — knocking doors, making calls, and getting people to the polls.** **[So I’m asking: Can you chip in $10, or whatever you can, today to help us turn out voters across Georgia?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130678642/618549095/-12840034?refcode=260503-ev-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NjYwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjE4Mzk3Zi0xMjQ3LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OKY1Y-azaDESCAjoy-5QkZhnUJcld1SOf4BVAULWDvU=)**
---
[ **DONATE NOW** ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130678643/618549096/-12840034?refcode=260503-ev-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NjYwMSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZjE4Mzk3Zi0xMjQ3LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=OKY1Y-azaDESCAjoy-5QkZhnUJcld1SOf4BVAULWDvU=)

name: Deb Haaland
subject: my opponent is lying about me on the air
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO**
body:
| | | [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/134?t=1&akid=9344%2E400544%2EafClOw)
---
This is urgent, friend: The first vicious attack ad of the cycle was launched against me, and it is full of lies and misinformation to sway voters and tear down our momentum. **If we don't fight back ASAP, it could cost us this race and FLIP New Mexico red._[Could you please rush $10 now to keep New Mexico blue?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/8174?refcode=jtk658-fr-nd&t=2&akid=9344%2E400544%2EafClOw)_ **
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/8175?refcode=jtk658-fr-nd&t=3&akid=9344%2E400544%2EafClOw)
---
It has never been more essential, friend, to ensure New Mexico has a Democratic Governor. Trump has reiterated how much power, not people, is his priority. He’s willing to continue an illegal war at the expense of your Medicare, Medicaid, and childcare. And he’s trying to use the Supreme Court to do his dirty work, pushing to rewrite our Constitution, casting doubt on whether Native Americans are birthright citizens, and threatening our voting rights to silence minority voices.
They know if I’m in office, I’ll stop them. That’s exactly why they’re coming after me now.
This attack ad comes on top of reports saying that our race in New Mexico is one of the best pickup opportunities for Republicans. They're gearing up to spend MILLIONS to buy this seat and bring their extremist agenda into our state — _all because they know Governors are the last line of defense when the federal government abuses its power._
And now, they've launched a massive smear campaign on the airwaves because it's the only way they think they can win. **But with our rights, freedoms, and communities on the line, I refuse to back down without a fight.**
**That's why my team and I just set a $15,000****midnight goal to ensure we have the money to fight back against these lies, and I'm personally asking for your grassroots support to help us reach it before midnight tonight.** **_
[Will you please rush $10 now to help me fight back, win in November, and keep New Mexico blue?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/8174?refcode=jtk658-fr-nd&t=4&akid=9344%2E400544%2EafClOw)_**
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/8175?refcode=jtk658-fr-nd&t=5&akid=9344%2E400544%2EafClOw)
---
Be fierce,

Deb
|

Trump has reiterated how much power, not people, is his priority. He’s willing to continue an illegal war at the expense of your Medicare, Medicaid, and childcare. And he’s trying to use the Supreme Court to do his dirty work, pushing to rewrite our Constitution, casting doubt on whether Native Americans are birthright citizens, and threatening our voting rights to silence minority voices. They know if I’m in office, I’ll stop them. That’s exactly why they’re coming after me now. This attack ad comes on top of reports saying that our race in New Mexico is one of the best pickup opportunities for Republicans. They're gearing up to spend MILLIONS to buy this seat and bring their extremist agenda into our state — all because they know Governors are the last line of defense when the federal government abuses its power. And now, they've launched a massive smear campaign on the airwaves because it's the only way they think they can win. But with our rights, freedoms, and communities on the line, I refuse to back down without a fight. That's why my team and I just set a $15,000midnight goal to ensure we have the money to fight back against these lies, and I'm personally asking for your grassroots support to help us reach it before midnight tonight. | | Be fierce, Deb | | | | |

---
# FROM THE DESK OF ALAN DERSHOWITZ
---
| | Peter, In over sixty years in the legal profession, I've experienced first hand the impact of both good journalism and bad journalism -- mostly the latter -- and just how important and rare it is to get things right.

**In today 's media landscape there are far too many publications that get things wrong.** Many are more concerned with the political implications of a story than the basic facts.

**The New York Sun is different.** It's a paper that places principle over politics and people over party.
---
[ **Join the Sun for 1¢ →** ](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=ce055683f21541f28efe28c5885b47b1&_e=wDzXvAuUoaAnRoDptoeXs8XDQAaMBOYzlwdc7bi6kNpVR2UeTYpHWEmH27D9zVCD_N8pmy1CwGM6trPptZlgmaFf1XvrNLR-LbCdNoK9Dquz9UFT29hnhW8sc7hG0CwWz8RQWMoe15sOawcL0bev3vqBGc6bnP6YtfWyK4OF_9GdCs13S8pGRMf7Hb9p7xbNCeJZyGH1AZftPB9jwmpy_neZsdQRlrRhXgjm_4vjVw474TXFhA_mF-kav9yqbp75dyhQuIxCDQU7SwCAcyVfwfVGkw-LSVMvPjb-V2AS_tG67eDeR_6PJp6rq2gNx-n4O3vgL4E-jrJ0EDEwOBiQuAW3rBPMtK1jnsaYzKuR7Z1xWnE1ywzF_Yf6m4hdmqMoIN3PIlsJfNz6fJROSERt0UjlWlj4YYhYAMSMCjBZkCnRbLbXaulEzz5rbABEqPiLB7VxPwBLd2MBoDqCGE-60OaKvW4zQqLltGAQrWCxDrM%3D)
---
Its in-depth coverage of the legal challenges faced by President Trump serve as a case in point.

When I defended President Trump during his first impeachment, I faced an avalanche of criticism, but few papers made sufficient effort to fully appreciate the significance of the legal arguments.

The Sun's deeply knowledgeable leadership, including its editor Seth Lipsky and associate editor A.R. Hoffman are themselves students of the Constitution. It shows in their coverage, which I find to be first rate.

It will be no secret to you that I don't agree with everything that can be found in the Sun's pages, but I can say with confidence that its re-emergence is among the most important recent developments in American journalism.

I've been impressed by the Sun's growth so far, but I know it faces an uphill battle, one that I have pledged to join.

**The Sun 's success will be a gift to the American people and to the cause of truth.** But to succeed, we need you to join us. I highly encourage you to join the Sun today.

Every person matters in this effort.

Don't wait. The battle to restore American journalism starts now.
---

name: Sheriff Joe Arpaio
subject: A decorated Army vet did his job. A political DA wants him locked up for life.
body:
| [ ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=285e1baeb7a6493a987e8e91b050047d&_e=5b09owtpFogNpro-Den8gW9BkvHhaSHqpHIT8DXUbViY6tLj_7LZFEB9P3lhJZLPElexPOgZcO6mQbiRijr98jjX8aQ0e0ctJPFgGw0xP48DMjt_TLrl0wkudvtMURL2v1HvcxxdkHZYgYRA1iCbWUsUw8cv9efHK5KinIW-3v3Qv6ZHC3xVy0os8wIRUYX3oEwWNk5_FKY_ecSzGGRML-DELXVSUCld47I1_KfF44DsC3tfotR8u2W5yWJpvajUiYzixK1cwcdWuAeDtrLWJdPF24uvbj7lSEhfb_nUlzYirsBhpQb8SxvqvFHL8asWBE_YmyE8IZesRBkXWBix9i2WlAIvHMRlL59i4KxuNPVHG1zF0i89IO6tZ1SyuREglMA3xuQ2F9aRqBtfh4zXjwY9an19Wp5zY_lbC1Y_FFBjAP-qKSvN84hCMlvqN7jP)

[ ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=285e1baeb7a6493a987e8e91b050047d&_e=5b09owtpFogNpro-Den8gW9BkvHhaSHqpHIT8DXUbViY6tLj_7LZFEB9P3lhJZLPElexPOgZcO6mQbiRijr98jjX8aQ0e0ctJPFgGw0xP4-FDKAVuVWRL8JvlIBcMf-wm0g_FDaUo56nZLZBaBWGMKkFeOCI2BKwxJeXaKahAboJnVM0rISmYv6jacMqQEulLImwxCDakyyaThNFjcGv1CAiC-tkEuH1mJlenqLSwcqQH7Bj4ty-JO40l6kOCJoqncZe1KGFNyMTGqrA-T8Zh_5aL3h5nHsaOSsPE2UPQCz2ttNhDKc_aHvsun2KU94XeKrBlRytchBrWZ53eGw4oW5QC2G9TsyKwEwyayuJ95OZmsGellcd6rAlIZwAG5IHJxUpqKnm6NniASp_nmkgZWbDIT0bZNqzog0EzKq03V-RQXqWP9cQKClZHP5AsUQC)
Dear Patriot, They're trying to put an innocent cop in prison for **life**. Why? For defending himself against a fleeing suspect who dragged him with a car. I've been in law enforcement for decades. I've seen the system abused. But what is happening to Officer James Brennand of San Antonio, Texas makes my blood boil, and it should make yours boil too. On October 2nd, 2022, Officer James Brennand — a decorated Army veteran who swore an oath to protect his community — spotted a car he suspected was stolen outside a McDonald's in San Antonio. He called for backup. He approached the vehicle. He ordered the driver to step out. The driver's response? He threw the car into reverse and used it as a weapon. | [Defend Officer Brennand →](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=285e1baeb7a6493a987e8e91b050047d&_e=5b09owtpFogNpro-Den8gW9BkvHhaSHqpHIT8DXUbViY6tLj_7LZFEB9P3lhJZLPElexPOgZcO6mQbiRijr98jjX8aQ0e0ctJPFgGw0xP4-Sjmc7I8P-4HjylLM8MY6HzG1uA8jRf9iRW3yBBcbNty9REGsZmC827SfayssEtL1RPeNyvv0srGzbZP_mCrLVN_T90G2Nvbejm0P6EPO8mF7BjeEy9NagxNpYvFJ1RFXYdpInPjgMQ4Ua3t0py0c8SH6Pvliimniar6y3sX3tS0EcGvZJni9DDC8O7JS_Ys4gHsMXAarXTb9L8ZQTLU4IrfsNQlgT0oiIR8q6U3GP04y8aOIAYEax-UPSA0oL4_RxvMhnoL8A0WLLbzqc4MLBXg6_AqbqvlqGqmeUHItjp_o9P05MGff5ZE9k0v4ncaYfBU-yZLplN2qwKgw3Zusr)
---
The car door slammed into Brennand. He was dragged. In that split second — outnumbered, without backup, in genuine danger — James did what every officer is trained to do. **He protected himself.**
The driver survived. The passenger was unharmed. And since that night, the driver has racked up four more arrests. **Four.**
While the man who attacked James faces no meaningful consequences, Officer Brennand has been stripped of his badge, his paycheck, and his future. A politically hungry District Attorney — more interested in headlines than justice — charged James with aggravated assault and deadly conduct. If convicted: **five years to life.**
Let that sink in. A man who served his country in the Army, who volunteered to protect the streets of San Antonio, who was dragged by a car in the line of duty — could die in prison.
[ ](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=285e1baeb7a6493a987e8e91b050047d&_e=5b09owtpFogNpro-Den8gW9BkvHhaSHqpHIT8DXUbViY6tLj_7LZFEB9P3lhJZLPElexPOgZcO6mQbiRijr98jjX8aQ0e0ctJPFgGw0xP494I6QxOdBWVNdwzT4KKD_YPqhkfqln9jCvC_lIJnusV2TzDqumHvyJY5_elVSnX2Q-C7PjCxjoM4kRTkhHlQ9fSHiX0fbwl_NV_lagfGh0tc0IHxGO1AWydpp-ACgD3NGmq-v0BHzc4yMrZe4lQLn-Dz0s3IH8xQPCGJyiPIeuG0mnR86hBBWIreoFsGVKtocXvStY6zQwMSObUi5-JM3TrMAc7U8kVNZNFMBFDRxCg8myL9Lvnybkpw2vYqUvxYU-KjlmC-cg1vhQIRJjhzYgL6zFnkacrVp58IVlkluDHkbNDekFbdUl2Wh51wMkdWgQlyM9CqY0PZaF1PsyupxN) James and his son — a family now fighting for survival while awaiting trial.
The National Center for Police Defense is in this fight with James — funding his legal defense and supporting his family while this nightmare drags on toward trial. But the costs are staggering, and they don't stop. **[That's why I need you, right now, today, to make a donation. $25. $50. $100.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=285e1baeb7a6493a987e8e91b050047d&_e=5b09owtpFogNpro-Den8gW9BkvHhaSHqpHIT8DXUbViY6tLj_7LZFEB9P3lhJZLPElexPOgZcO6mQbiRijr98jjX8aQ0e0ctJPFgGw0xP499N-O-Lc4jgkBPogUOZfS4q2CxBxY72LzQqdZSUDMvxBKSgDxV_lPGMISXUkdIwu5vdrTpaMm0NmqzJiBVXei7-zEMuFWALxJK8fW7irENo0oEBstJr5nWZI7L2Kz2drwm3vmkIe3m_wOPAbPDxyetO11Zt5oAQh8b82Lp8QO23CCmtzoOm68-_cZD8jCmb2oR2lyCvVUWyvTrm2M6bwk-jMkLJYGpEM5fANoUebXgXsY_yMehvwRJ8p4UOfbAkyev7fGzTEEQMa6v1v6BojqfYzelYT1p_02g2HPWB7O0D0W3te1VQNb5VCIMPb2hN3ArW_8cTBYbuWX9kqleN0wg) ** Whatever you can give. Your gift goes to defending James and keeping his family afloat. The anti-police mob is betting that people like you will scroll past, shake your head, and do nothing. **Prove them wrong.** James Brennand served this country with honor. He served his city with courage. When that car came at him, he stood his ground. Now it's our turn to stand with him. Don't let them take this good man down without a fight. Share this with every patriot and badge supporter you know. The thin blue line holds only as long as good people refuse to look away. **For James. For his son. For every officer who might be next.** Unapologetically, Sheriff Joe Arpaio Former Sheriff, Maricopa County

clean_body: | Dear Patriot, They're trying to put an innocent cop in prison for life. Why? For defending himself against a fleeing suspect who dragged him with a car. I've been in law enforcement for decades. I've seen the system abused. But what is happening to Officer James Brennand of San Antonio, Texas makes my blood boil, and it should make yours boil too. On October 2nd, 2022, Officer James Brennand — a decorated Army veteran who swore an oath to protect his community — spotted a car he suspected was stolen outside a McDonald's in San Antonio. He called for backup. He approached the vehicle. He ordered the driver to step out. The driver's response? He threw the car into reverse and used it as a weapon. | The car door slammed into Brennand. He was dragged. In that split second — outnumbered, without backup, in genuine danger — James did what every officer is trained to do. He protected himself. The driver survived. The passenger was unharmed. And since that night, the driver has racked up four more arrests. Four. While the man who attacked James faces no meaningful consequences, Officer Brennand has been stripped of his badge, his paycheck, and his future. A politically hungry District Attorney — more interested in headlines than justice — charged James with aggravated assault and deadly conduct. If convicted: five years to life. Let that sink in. A man who served his country in the Army, who volunteered to protect the streets of San Antonio, who was dragged by a car in the line of duty — could die in prison. James and his son — a family now fighting for survival while awaiting trial. The National Center for Police Defense is in this fight with James — funding his legal defense and supporting his family while this nightmare drags on toward trial. But the costs are staggering, and they don't stop. Whatever you can give. Your gift goes to defending James and keeping his family afloat. The anti-police mob is betting that people like you will scroll past, shake your head, and do nothing. Prove them wrong. James Brennand served this country with honor. He served his city with courage. When that car came at him, he stood his ground. Now it's our turn to stand with him. Don't let them take this good man down without a fight. Share this with every patriot and badge supporter you know. The thin blue line holds only as long as good people refuse to look away. For James. For his son. For every officer who might be next. Unapologetically, Sheriff Joe Arpaio Former Sheriff, Maricopa County | Stand With Officer Brennand Today Your donation goes to his legal defense and his family. | | | | ---|---|---|--- National Center for Police Defense 10521 Judicial Drive, Suite 200 Fairfax, Virginia 22030

subject: A cup of coffee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
$5, Peter. That’s the donation we’re asking you to make today.
Here’s why:
For the price of a large cup of coffee, you can make a significant impact on Texas’ U.S. Senate race and the fight for the Senate majority.
We know it may seem like $5 is a drop in the bucket in a state as big and expensive as Texas. But small-dollar donations are the heart of our campaign.
It takes a movement of people to take back Texas from billionaire mega-donors and their puppet politicians. This race is going to be a marathon that requires a steady pace of support.
So yes, $5 does matter. We wouldn’t ask you if your support wasn’t important.
[**Will you make a $5 contribution to our campaign for the U.S. Senate today? This takes all of us — thousands of us chipping in to show our support for James.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q2.t_pReT&refcode=em260503-1-ak&t=1&akid=613%2E1347274%2E2Q7r81)

Thank you for your support.
Team Talarico

Thank you, \- Steve Hilton Authorized by Steve Hilton for Governor 2026 | | Paid for by Steve Hilton for Governor 2026

name: Shaun Finnie
subject: Back with James Talarico
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Shaun Finnie For Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0503 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0503]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0503 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0503]
Friend — Recently, I had another great conversation with State Rep. James Talarico, and I wanted to share why that matters.
Selme and I always appreciate James’s perspective on the work ahead here in Texas. He brings a level of thoughtfulness and seriousness that’s rare in politics right now.
We talked about what families are facing — rising costs, pressure on public schools, and the need for leaders who are actually focused on serving their communities.
And honestly, it’s just good to be around people who care about their neighbors and are in this for the right reasons.
That’s the kind of leadership Texas needs more of.
And it’s exactly why I’m proud to keep working alongside James as we build something bigger here in TX-02 and across the state.
If you want to be part of this effort, donate whatever you can right now to help us keep building. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0503] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0502] [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0502]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Donate $10 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?amount=10&refcode=em0503&express_lane=true] Donate $20 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?amount=20&refcode=em0503&express_lane=true] Donate $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?amount=35&refcode=em0503&express_lane=true] Donate $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?amount=50&refcode=em0503&express_lane=true] Donate $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?amount=100&refcode=em0503&express_lane=true] Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0503]
We’ve got a lot ahead of us — and I’m excited for what’s next.
Let’s get to work.
— Shaun
Donate [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/finnie_em?refcode=em0503]

name: Voter Action Project Research
subject: A suppressive ploy in Virginia?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Axios: MAGA Republicans want Trump to annex Arlington for D.C. [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/EA/EA007/1/89215/images/Axios_ReAnnexArlington.png]
Opponents of voting rights have responded to Virginia's redistricting moves by proposing that President Trump break up the commonwealth of Virginia. They're calling for an executive order that would reunite Virginia's Arlington County with D.C. -- even though Arlington left the original District of Columbia to go back to Virginia in 1847.
We want to hear from likely voters in your area about this idea. Will you take our one-question poll right away?
Team: Do you think the president has the power to break up the commonwealth of Virginia?
By clicking a response below your answer will be automatically recorded:
YES [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=050326_1yes&amount=15] NO [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-pollresponse?refcode=050326_1no&amount=15]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=050326_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=050326_1&amount=20]

body:
Losing Colorado to the GOP would be downright EMBARRASSING 🤦🏼♂️
| | |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130681035/618555562/-1487442751?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1383-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzVlYzc5Yy0xYTQ3LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VNd4InMXi7jp9uMcX-wMcLS_FgZqXQydWuO2C8ubyLA=)
Now looky here, y’all –
If I've learned anything over my more than half-century in Democratic politics, it's that we cannot afford to take any state for granted. Especially not the ones we think are "safe."
That's why if you've been sleeping on Michael Bennet's campaign for governor out in Colorado, I'm going to need you to _WAKE THE HELL UP –_**because we're just 10 days out from his first May public filing deadline, and he's on track to fall short.**
**_[So before I go on, I need every member of this grassroots team to get serious and rush $5 or more to his campaign before midnight tonight.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130681036/618555563/-1487442751?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1383-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzVlYzc5Yy0xYTQ3LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VNd4InMXi7jp9uMcX-wMcLS_FgZqXQydWuO2C8ubyLA=)_**
| | [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130681037/618555564/-1487442751?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1383-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzVlYzc5Yy0xYTQ3LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VNd4InMXi7jp9uMcX-wMcLS_FgZqXQydWuO2C8ubyLA=)
---
Now you'll have to pardon my French, but I'm scared sh*tless Democrats just don't get how bad we need to gin up grassroots resources to fight in Colorado.
'Cause right now, big-time Republicans like Trump and Lauren Boebert are already putting their thumbs on the scales of this race.
And even though you and I know they're _really_ the ones to blame for housing and health care soaring out of reach for regular folks, mark my words:

**They'll do anything, say anything and _spend anything_ if it makes voters blame Democrats like Michael for the outcomes of their bat-sh*t policies.**
I know Michael Bennet is the right person for the job. That’s why I was proud to endorse him for president in 2020. But without the funds to reach _every single voter_ , from the Denver suburbs to the most remote mountain communities, the GOP _will_ beat us to the punch. They _will_ flood the airwaves with millions in attack ads to ensure this movement sinks. And we _will NOT_ have the resources to fight back.
**_[If you want to stop that from happening, then _PLEASE, _y’all, before midnight, donate $5, $25, or anything you can – _toot sweet – _to ensure Michael reaches his $50,000 goal next week and has the grassroots support to win this thing.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130681038/618555565/-1487442751?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk1383-fr-nd&recurring=1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjgvMS83NDc5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYzVlYzc5Yy0xYTQ3LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VNd4InMXi7jp9uMcX-wMcLS_FgZqXQydWuO2C8ubyLA=)_**

clean_body: Losing Colorado to the GOP would be downright EMBARRASSING 🤦🏼♂️ | | | = Now looky here, y’all – If I've learned anything over my more than half-century in Democratic politics, it's that we cannot afford to take any state for granted. Especially not the ones we think are "safe." That's why if you've been sleeping on Michael Bennet's campaign for governor out in Colorado, I'm going to need you to WAKE THE HELL UP –because we're just 10 days out from his first May public filing deadline, and he's on track to fall short. = | | = Now you'll have to pardon my French, but I'm scared shtless Democrats just don't get how bad we need to gin up grassroots resources to fight in Colorado. 'Cause right now, big-time Republicans like Trump and Lauren Boebert are already putting their thumbs on the scales of this race. And even though you and I know they're really the ones to blame for housing and health care soaring out of reach for regular folks, mark my words: They'll do anything, say anything and spend anything if it makes voters blame Democrats like Michael for the outcomes of their bat-sht policies. I know Michael Bennet is the right person for the job. That’s why I was proud to endorse him for president in 2020. But without the funds to reach every single voter , from the Denver suburbs to the most remote mountain communities, the GOP will beat us to the punch. They will flood the airwaves with millions in attack ads to ensure this movement sinks. And we will NOT have the resources to fight back. = Please use the links in this email to start a weekly donation through ActBlue. | | | = | = | | = | = We'll sleep when we're dead, because NOW is Colorado's best chance to provide the vision this country desperately needs – as long as Michael can count on you as a part of this team. James Carville | Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States Paid for by Bennet for Governor. Registered Agent: Tracie Moore. _Woof!_ Hey friend, it's Zia! 🐾 I'm chewing my way into your inbox today for a quick message, so let me cut right to the chase:

Right now, my mom, Deb, is on the phone with her team talking about how the primary election is in LESS than a month, and she needs everyone to make their voice heard with early voting starting this week.

And as her loyal best friend, I wanted to do my part and help her raise the money she needs to compete and get her campaign to the finish line. ** _[Will you paw-lease make a donation now to help my mom win and keep New Mexico blue?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/8180?refcode=jtk657-fr-nd&t=2&akid=9355%2E400544%2ElrJcJ1)_**
| | [Donate](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/8180?refcode=jtk657-fr-nd&t=3&akid=9355%2E400544%2ElrJcJ1)
---
I remember the day my mom rescued me, and it was the happiest day of my life! That's how I know she's a fighter and a protector for all New Mexicans — people and furry friends, like me.

And that's something that will never change.

My mom is all in, friend, ready to fight on our behalf and move our great state toward progress. For me, that means safer neighborhoods for my walks, and for others that could also mean: higher wages, lower costs, and strong education for your children.
**She's got what it takes to win, but I know she can't do it alone. That's why I'm hounding you today, friend:_[Please, will you chip in $5 before midnight tonight so my mom can become New Mexico's next Governor?](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/8176?refcode=jtk657-fr-nd&t=4&akid=9355%2E400544%2ElrJcJ1)_**

Zia 🐾

name: Jocelyn Benson
subject: My decision
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR]
body:
[ stdin# ]Jocelyn Benson for Governor
Hi, I know you get a lot of emails from me. So I wanted to
take a step back and tell you a little bit more about me and why I’m
running to be the next Governor of Michigan.

Ever since I was a student, I knew I wanted to fight for justice and make
a difference. I’m the daughter of two special education teachers. I was
raised in a working class family that instilled in me the values of hard
work, opportunity, and serving others.

It’s why I started my career investigating threats to democracy and civil
rights in the US and abroad.

It’s why I became a law clerk in Detroit, fighting to protect and defend
people’s civil rights and freedoms.

It’s why, as Dean of Wayne State University Law School, I worked to ensure
all students could afford their education, froze tuition, and expanded
scholarships.

And it’s why, as Secretary of State, I’ve fought to make everyday life
easier for all Michiganders, secure our elections, and expand voter
access.

But I know our work is far from finished. So now, I’m running for Governor
to make sure Michigan is a place where everyone – from our kids to our
seniors – can stay and thrive.

I know that government works best when it’s there when you need it, and
gets out of the way when you don’t. So here’s my promise to you: when we
win this election, I will use every tool available to make life easier:
expand rural healthcare options, build more housing, take on the utility
companies who raise our rates, make childcare free, and ensure anyone can
afford to live in the best place to call home.

But here’s the truth: Michigan is one of the most competitive states in
the entire country, and our opponents have the backing of big billionaires
and special interests. I can only win this race with your support, so
today, I’m asking:

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/4408?t=1001&akid=1618%2E181023%2EIzyOTR ]Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to power our campaign for
Michigan and make sure we have the resources to win?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/4409?t=1002&akid=1618%2E181023%2EIzyOTR ]Donate $5 →

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/4410?t=1003&akid=1618%2E181023%2EIzyOTR ]Donate $25 →

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/4411?t=1004&akid=1618%2E181023%2EIzyOTR ]Donate $50 →

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/4412?t=1005&akid=1618%2E181023%2EIzyOTR ]Donate $100 →

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/4413?t=1006&akid=1618%2E181023%2EIzyOTR ]Donate $250 →

[ https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/4414?t=1007&akid=1618%2E181023%2EIzyOTR ]Other →

Thanks for reading,

Jocelyn

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with supporters like you.
Unsubscribe: https://act.jocelynbenson.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-jbmi/?t=1008&akid=1618%2E181023%2EIzyOTR

name: Tobias Read
subject: “Oregon’s secretary of state makes case for drop-box voting.”
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?]
I was just in Philomath this weekend, sitting in a small town hall with neighbors asking honest questions about something that should never be controversial: how they can trust that their vote will be counted.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?]
Here’s what I told them — and what I need you to hear too.
Oregon’s elections are secure, accurate, and built to work for real life. Vote-by-mail works. Drop boxes work. And people across our state rely on both to make their voices heard.
But right now, those systems are under pressure from every direction.
Just this week, Oregon joined other states in court to block yet another unconstitutional attempt to interfere with how Americans vote. We’ve already beat these attacks before — and we intend to do it again.
But defending our elections isn’t just happening in courtrooms. It’s happening in every county, every clerk’s office, and every community where voters are deciding how to return their ballots.
This work takes vigilance. It takes resources. And it takes a public willing to stand up for a simple idea: that democracy belongs to the people who live here—not to politicians trying to rewrite the rules from the top down.
We’re going to keep strengthening our elections. And we’re going to keep making sure every eligible Oregonian can cast a ballot safely and confidently.
If you’re with me in this fight to protect voting rights in Oregon, I’m asking you to pitch in today. Your support helps us communicate directly with Oregonians and defend vote-by-mail, secure our elections, and push back against dangerous attempts to make it harder for people to vote. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?]
Thanks for standing with us,
Tobias Read
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?]
https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR [https://www.facebook.com/TobiasReadOR] https://twitter.com/TobiasRead [https://twitter.com/TobiasRead] https://instagram.com/tobiasreador [https://instagram.com/tobiasreador]

PO Box 42307
Portland, OR 97242
United States

Conservative mom Beth Bourne **[stormed into a school board meeting](https://substack.com/redirect/931e5240-c247-463a-96e8-448b1c8b442c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and blasted woke teachers and administrators for allowing boys identifying as girls to dominate women's sports in school.
"Are you smiling at me?!!" Bourne confronted one of the administrators who appeared to be laughing during her frustrated speech.

# **Illegal immigrant charged with murdering two women in separate Long Island stabbings**
Rony Yahir Alvarenga Rivera, 22, **[allegedly stabbed a 42-year-old coworker to death](https://substack.com/redirect/39a3dc93-798c-4d6a-b317-b2d0d2b0715d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** as she took out garbage at a Wendy's in Island Park, Nassau County just after midnight Friday, then killed a second victim, a 32-year-old woman he was living with, several hours later.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/99b9a460-2dff-4028-8d6d-6e69c23c74f6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Nassau County Police Department: Rony Yahir Alvarenga Rivera, 22
* **Both women suffered "savage stab wounds** to the neck and torso," according to police, though the exact nature of Rivera's relationship with his roommate remains unclear.
* **Suspect turned himself in** : Rivera called police and told them what he had done, with Det. Lt. George Darienzo saying "He asked to see police and when police arrived, he said he killed somebody that night." Rivera was arrested outside a 7-Eleven in Lynbrook after telling officers "I've killed someone."
* **Immigration status** : Rivera came to the US illegally in 2016 at age 12 and is now facing multiple murder charges, though he has pleaded not guilty.

* * *
# **Liberal donor network Democracy Alliance pivoting to spend "tens of millions" on new media to counter conservative podcast dominance**
Democracy Alliance, responsible for $2 billion in spending on Democrat campaigns, media outlets and think tanks, **[is shifting strategy to developing alternative media](https://substack.com/redirect/76641643-25e6-4c90-8b6e-17160f9809dd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after conservatives' 2024 new media success.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/76641643-25e6-4c90-8b6e-17160f9809dd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **President Pamela Shifman told Semafor** "It became crystal clear after 2024 that we collectively had relied too much on forms of media that were not reaching people. Too much focus on paid advertisements, too much focus on broadcast television, and that is simply not where the majority of people consume their news."
* **Trump 's podcast strategy convinced liberals to change approach**: The 2024 election cycle--during which Trump and VP JD Vance made huge gains through podcast appearances on shows like Joe Rogan and Theo Von that got millions of views--convinced liberal donors to change tactics, while Kamala Harris's attempts on podcasts like "Call Her Daddy" failed to sway voters. An internal memo recommended donors invest in Democracy Alliance's new media fund to promote organizations like More Perfect Union and help liberals break into conservative spaces.
* **Focus on "trusted messengers" for young voters**: The memo stated "The right has spent decades cultivating and organizing young people. They build relationships through culture and community--and engage in politics after. We can't cede these voters. It's time for progressives to invest heavily in our own trusted messengers who can meet young people where they are." Shifman cited NYC Mayor Zohran Mamdani's social media campaign as effective, saying it "reached people, that spoke to people, that resonated with people, and that was joyful and positive and compelling."

* * *
# **Trump reviewing Iran 's latest proposal but says "Can't imagine it would be acceptable"**
President Donald Trump **[said late Saturday he's reviewing Iran's latest proposal](https://substack.com/redirect/3582e3ee-09f8-4534-92bb-ffbdc539d66e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for ending the war but expressed deep skepticism, posting on Truth Social "can't imagine that it would be acceptable in that they have not yet paid a big enough price for what they have done to Humanity, and the World, over the last 47 years." Trump told reporters in West Palm Beach earlier Saturday there's a chance the U.S. could restart strikes on Iran, saying "If they misbehave, if they do something bad -- but right now, we'll see."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3582e3ee-09f8-4534-92bb-ffbdc539d66e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Sticking points remain on nuclear deal** : Trump told reporters Friday "They want to make a deal, I'm not satisfied with it" and claimed Iran's government "wanted to make a deal so badly" but was "too disjointed to make the concessions necessary." Iran has demanded the U.S. lift its Strait of Hormuz blockade before discussing nuclear issues, while Trump said "They're asking for things that I can't agree to."
* **Iran warns of renewed conflict** : Islamic Revolutionary Guard Officer Mohammad Jafar Asadi said "Renewed conflict between Iran and the United States is likely" after Trump suggested Friday the U.S. might be better off without a deal. Israeli PM Benjamin Netanyahu scheduled a security cabinet meeting for Sunday.

Hi there, Chelsey Wininger here, DASS Executive Director. I'll be honest: I'm feeling pretty vindicated right now. **News just broke that DOGE personnel were secretly coordinating to share sensitive voter data to an outside political group. ** That group's stated goal? Find evidence of voter fraud and “overturn election results.” Color me surprised. Our Secretaries took serious heat for refusing to hand over voter data. They were sued for it, and raked over the coals in the media. And now we have the paper trail that proves they were right. These weren't just potential Hatch Act violations, it’s evidence that YOUR data was given to unnamed, outside actors to challenge and overturn election results. **This is exactly what we mean when we say Democratic Secretaries of State are the last line of defense for free and fair elections — and the stakes have never been higher than they are today.** These same actors are still operating, and the administration's data demands haven't stopped. 26 Secretary of State offices are on the ballot this November. If our Democrats fall to election deniers, there will be no one left to say no. name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Let’s talk about fraud
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Trump’s budget director spent our hearing calling working people frauds. I wasn’t going to let that stand.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20260503-6207-footer&t=1&akid=6207%2E420207%2EOsWfAh)
Peter,
A couple weeks ago, I sat across from Trump’s budget director Russell Vought — and what he said made my blood boil.
He spent our House Budget Committee hearing calling food assistance, home energy aid for low-income seniors, and healthcare subsidies “marred by fraud.” He implied that the people who depend on these programs to survive were gaming the system.
So if Vought wants to talk about fraud, then let’s talk about fraud.
**The Department of Defense has failed eight consecutive audits.** It is the only federal agency in the country that has _never passed a single audit_. There is over $10 billion in confirmed fraud!
And this administration’s response? A request for a $1.5 trillion defense budget.
More money for weapons, more money for war, and more money for a department that has proven it cannot be trusted with what it already has.
But somehow, there is never a single dollar left for the working people of this country who actually need it. No money for health care. No money to help working families put food on the table. And no money for universal childcare or affordable housing.
**This is a choice, Peter. A callous, deliberate one — made by corrupt politicians who have decided that endless wars matter more than your life. That defense budgets matter more than whether you can afford to see a doctor.**
It’s indefensible, and I refuse to accept it. I won’t stop fighting back on the House floor and in our communities. And I need you with me.
[**If you’re able, can you pitch in $3 today to keep me fighting in Congress?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260503-1.q9y-E0&refcode=em20260503-6207&amount=3&t=2&akid=6207%2E420207%2EOsWfAh)
**[Contribute $3](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-em-20260503-1.q9y-E0&amount=3&refcode=em20260503-6207&t=21&akid=6207%2E420207%2EOsWfAh)**
With gratitude,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20260503-6207-footer&t=22&refcode2=6207_420207_OsWfAh&akid=6207%2E420207%2EOsWfAh)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=6207%2E420207%2EOsWfAh)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=6207%2E420207%2EOsWfAh)

name: Mary Peltola
subject: Catastrophic
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
|
---
_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you only want our most important email updates,[click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/108?t=2&akid=2184%2E259176%2EzXmCv-) If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/109?t=3&akid=2184%2E259176%2EzXmCv-)_

Peter, I want to make sure you saw this headline. [](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11008?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.03_Peltola-Catastrophic_B3_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=4&akid=2184%2E259176%2EzXmCv-) National Republicans are taking aim at our voting rights, and the consequences could be “catastrophic” here in Alaska. The Supreme Court is leaning toward reversing an Alaska law that ensures all mail-in ballots postmarked by Election Day are counted. This is a huge deal for us. Alaskans rely on mail-in absentee voting to make their voices heard. In some remote villages, we don’t even have polling locations. It is already a challenge to ensure mail is picked up in a timely manner in these communities. The post is delivered by plane in places like Kodiak! And our weather can be very unpredictable. So when they make it harder for mail-in votes to be counted, they make it even harder for Alaskans to make their voices heard. Plain and simple. Here’s what folks are saying: | “It would be catastrophic. It’s mean-spirited,” Eric Croft, the chair of the Alaska Democratic Party, said of the potential effect on rural and Native voters. “It would hurt participation in rural Alaska. And Mary Peltola’s very strong in her Native communities, and in the community she comes from. So I think it will hurt her.”
---
What’s worse is the timing here. The Supreme Court won’t announce their decision until this summer, and we’ll have to race to respond before Election Day.
That’s why we need to do everything we can to prepare now. We already know we’re the underdogs in this fight against the DC establishment and their dark money donors, but I know this team can take on whatever comes our way.
So if you’re with me, we’re going to need a huge grassroots effort in the months ahead. Our campaign is powered by people like you, not special interests – but that means we need lots and lots of donations to build the resources we need to win.
[**Please, Peter: Will you split a $10 contribution between my campaign and Blue Amp Action for U.S. Senate to help us win in Alaska? With lots of people like you stepping up, we can overcome any obstacle and take this fight for fish, family, freedom to DC.**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11008?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.03_Peltola-Catastrophic_B3_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=5&akid=2184%2E259176%2EzXmCv-)
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mary Peltola and Blue Amp Action will go through immediately:_

---
[CONTRIBUTE $25](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11010?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.03_Peltola-Catastrophic_B3_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=7&akid=2184%2E259176%2EzXmCv-)
---
[CONTRIBUTE MORE](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/11061?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.03_Peltola-Catastrophic_B3_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=8&akid=2184%2E259176%2EzXmCv-)
---
Especially with our fundraising deadline coming up soon, your support could not be more important right now.
I sincerely appreciate you being a part of our team.
Thank you,
Mary

Here at Blue Amp, we’re dedicated to uplifting the movers and shakers who will defend our shared democratic values and beat back against right-wing authoritarianism. The midterms are coming up, and we can’t do this work without you. With your support, we'll work to halt the right-wing agenda and support strong Democrats who will fight for us across the country.

name: John Fetterman
subject: real fixes for Social Security
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/51612?refcode=jtk542-su-fl-header&t=1&akid=10728%2E434096%2EkmWAmk)
| | |
---
Derek, it's John. I’m reaching out because I need to hear from you.
The GOP is out here talking about gutting Social Security to fund tax cuts for the wealthiest dudes in America – so there's a lot at stake.
It’ll only take a minute to share your thoughts, **[so will you please take my Social Security survey now?](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52569?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk542-su-fl&t=2&akid=10728%2E434096%2EkmWAmk)** 🙏
| | [TAKE THE SURVEY >>](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52569?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk542-su-fl&t=3&akid=10728%2E434096%2EkmWAmk)
---
Hardworking people in Pennsylvania and across this country have paid into Social Security their entire lives.
They've earned this benefit, so it's only right they see those checks come through after they retire – it's their money!
The current administration is already throwing things into chaos by closing Social Security Administration offices, cutting staff, and making it harder for seniors to get help over the phone.
**So while I will ALWAYS fight to protect Social Security, I need to know yinz are with me –[click here to take the survey now.](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52569?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&code=jtk542-su-fl&t=4&akid=10728%2E434096%2EkmWAmk)**
Thanks for your response,
John ❤️

name: Robert Garcia
subject: Add your name: Firing Pam Bondi doesn’t change a thing re: Epstein Files
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
I'm asking for your immediate response >>
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130681712/618557949/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNDBmNGRlZC0xZjQ3LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=a_Zuf6LX1H6HP9O1NA4l8ZWycVXYVf502LhPpDks_T0=)
Pam Bondi is out — but here’s the real question: **Does that mean the Epstein investigation just... stops?**
According to Donald Trump’s new Attorney General, that’s exactly what should happen:
But as the top Democrat on the House Oversight Committee, let me be clear: _**Absolutely not.**_

name: Palantir SOS via Our Revolution
subject: Tell Your Reps: Get Off the Palantir Payroll
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

Palantir just released a CHILLING 22-point manifesto – and it’s as
terrifying as you'd think, declaring some cultures are inferior to others
and calling for the U.S. to reinstate the military draft while reviving
the militarism of the past.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37915?source=email-20260503&t=1011&akid=10675%2E5885482%2EsNFlgA ]Headline: Palantir Calls on U.S. to Reinstate Draft in 22-Point
'Supervillain' manifesto slammed by critics.

This as the company uses its deep ties to Trump and right-wing
billionaires to hardwire a surveillance state into the heart of our
democracy. Founded by Trump mega-donor and billionaire Peter Thiel, its
vision goes beyond Silicon Valley profits – powering ICE’s raids on
immigrant families, tracking union organizers, and arming police
departments with tools to surveil peaceful protesters.

But despite all that, right now across the country, Democratic candidates
are STILL taking Palantir money, lining their campaign coffers with Big
Brother cash.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37915?source=email-20260503&t=1012&akid=10675%2E5885482%2EsNFlgA ]As long as Palantir continues buying influence with campaign donations,
its hold on our political system will only grow. Will you call on your
member of Congress and every candidate to reject Palantir’s dirty money
NOW?

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37915?source=email-20260503&t=1013&akid=10675%2E5885482%2EsNFlgA ]ADD YOUR NAME

Palantir is raking in BILLIONS in federal contracts to power ICE raids,
surveil the public, and use its algorithm to target organizers and
peaceful protesters. They’re building a national dragnet, funded by us.

Meanwhile, Palantir PACs and employees are pouring MILLIONS into campaigns
from coast to coast. But as outrage at the company grows, Democrats are
increasingly under fire for accepting Palantir's money – and now it’s up
to all of us to raise the pressure to make that cash so toxic they have no
choice but to say NO.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37915?source=email-20260503&t=1014&akid=10675%2E5885482%2EsNFlgA ]Headline: Palantir-linked campaign donations put Democrats in tight
spot.

One thing is clear: either we purge Palantir’s influence from our
politics, or our democracy risks permanent lockdown by the surveillance
state. Our Revolution has hit the streets from Denver to D.C., confronting
Palantir at its headquarters, exposing their ties to ICE, and demanding an
end to taxpayer-funded oppression. But so long as candidates keep cashing
Palantir checks, this Big Brother machine will keep buying its way into
power.

The primaries are the first shot at blocking Palantir’s candidates and
championing those who stand up to say NO – but first we need to show
candidates just how toxic being on Palantir’s payroll will be.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37915?source=email-20260503&t=1015&akid=10675%2E5885482%2EsNFlgA ]Send an urgent message to your members of Congress and every candidate:
Get off the Palantir payroll and refuse Big Brother’s money now.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/37915?source=email-20260503&t=1016&akid=10675%2E5885482%2EsNFlgA ]ADD YOUR NAME

Palantir’s vision is chilling and real. Every dollar they slip to a
candidate is another brick in their surveillance state. We have to draw a
line – right now.

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=10675%2E5885482%2EsNFlgA ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=10675%2E5885482%2EsNFlgA ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=10675%2E5885482%2EsNFlgA ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=10675%2E5885482%2EsNFlgA ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=10675%2E5885482%2EsNFlgA ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=10675%2E5885482%2EsNFlgA ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20260503.13DDNX&t=1007&akid=10675%2E5885482%2EsNFlgA ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20260503.NTUi1L&t=1008&akid=10675%2E5885482%2EsNFlgA ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20260503.90nIVr&t=1009&akid=10675%2E5885482%2EsNFlgA ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20260503.tsPySo&t=1010&akid=10675%2E5885482%2EsNFlgA ]GIVE ONCE

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.ourrevolution.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe-2/?akid=10675%2E5885482%2EsNFlgA

Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe

PO Box 66208
WASHINGTON, DC, 20035

Not authorized by any candidate or candidate committee. Our Revolution is a

subject: There's only one way to stop this
