body:
The violent Left isn't hiding it anymore
It isn't a "both sides" problem when only one side is doing the shooting.

| | | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e6976bf6ebc94c8b89dfc737cd883f9e&_e=NXAR3DQUEZCQU9L2T11GdCkazvAwR3x3IsXbJ5Aip270I321xE94CqHmRZZ3zrUjTcTpA5uMO3BtXf9Nol5V3oio11Ffc26WDVnkKc8KiGvmNKXuFo10cbPwhHng_ayePlvKPXrd1T2tp5i5utTs7o2BS9-v_2T38vJEu8qQqjb6TS04UegSnMshIg0UbU5pJ-0DkLMLHgzBMtb37LVH-jxEnapSqDNF1D54Dh71H6tmy92trpHXZejAlMxhMm3bN1LrhNmTe7tln71LLhOZOVZHybLWpgj4qUJ9S32-Dr-4aP6xP6eczV3j64NT1WH61yqRqKnblCg9NXvDTrR0aGr7RC53RV41S_WpU2EJB5ZqNXm6MT05NjcSst1WyBmf4Is14e7z9ZmZEdqiBHKmhS2M4vlJhGg9c15B_5eJ9NIjCnE-q0JzaW9sKlfzCKdK9d1kcmVDqwg9nqLP9ttsh-pIYwjQl5_dh-Yd3svnX0N9GAZbiB9f-NJqId6xsri7r0d1wsBEDY5ZF2XmN4MN108oMHF1fZO6ByG_I5J4eTdXT8qMjKn3rH9qLMUM_VgROioSI1-Od8YyStj72x-PtQO2MTe8Fp6ilFFdX0HtGK2euii3MeNLkGbOrCNHcl3PaK6eMAmdlkA3CkbJKA2T4AOERpCcExH4cmPNyh2mOGabxKxcTD5H9CK7olHcHZGl)
---
Peter,
---
This isn't a "both sides" problem.

The violent Left murdered Charlie. They openly celebrated his death.

They've tried 3 times to kill President Trump. Their only disappointment was that the attempts weren't successful.

They funneled $3+ million dollars from the Left-wing Southern Poverty Law Center to the KKK and other actual extremist groups -- all to smear President Trump and patriots like you and me.

The SPLC put Charlie and Turning Point on their so-called "Hate Map" -- and we all know why.

The violent Left calls you "racist."

They call you "bigot."

They call you "fascist."

They call you "Nazi."

**And it 's all to encourage their most radical and deranged followers to pull the trigger and justify their violence. **

They want you gone.

They want you silenced.

And for far too many on the Left, _they want you dead. _
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e6976bf6ebc94c8b89dfc737cd883f9e&_e=NXAR3DQUEZCQU9L2T11GdCkazvAwR3x3IsXbJ5Aip270I321xE94CqHmRZZ3zrUjTcTpA5uMO3BtXf9Nol5V3oio11Ffc26WDVnkKc8KiGvmNKXuFo10cbPwhHng_ayePlvKPXrd1T2tp5i5utTs7o2BS9-v_2T38vJEu8qQqjb6TS04UegSnMshIg0UbU5pJ-0DkLMLHgzBMtb37LVH-jxEnapSqDNF1D54Dh71H6sis78ePPjJXaPixzkfHW5OLQjKC0Kgo4tKxyJY4E3qZsTh_b_KuKo0QcDQR7TNI0Jy8aMfm5BZ6I0Ip6aKnUyLxfa0Xjlk-o3fHw1Sk4bXWCjCztnTwtCC-87fdBppoQO0GalImIr4Y50wrbLBMk84Hf29SI6cC6Xxo_CJhmIX-j09l2xmEJ2rGaRhWOyuGB68Vw245spiZRD47cwvJarNdFcQifVRY4aDWq43TGoiKH9yX9AI22sggUFvN7o2gBd7niHUVvyaEpFtGdf4qQBJ-aFziPQsKAnDwaCghzpTUjDa4BOHpIvJfOuo_ilc3HLnLbXikQQGUzSJ-J0yzzAC3hibmk6S8CcljsURzCAl5TDzu_uZCptareUjd7xITQtZCmR1LEd4Saa0MRzLz0gqYFmrdRoGhMP6gkORG1KAR1VKKhnu-h87dtRFOdQTshOGiWu2QPC9Ss82cYaHm2rg)
---
The violent Left cares about one thing, and one thing only: _Power. _

And increasingly, more of the Left's rank and file believes violence is an acceptable means to achieve their political ends.

**Peter, I need you to listen to this closely... **

You may or may not be happy with President Trump or our majority right now...

But if you call yourself a patriot... if you call yourself a conservative... or if you're just a non-crazy person...

_You can 't sit this one out. _

**Winning in 2026 is existential. Winning in 2028 is existential. **

Because if we lose?

The violent Left will absolutely come for us --_ in every which way that they can. _

They will destroy America, and the very ideas and values that built it.

That leaves only one thing for you and me to do:

_Beat them at the ballot box. _

It's a simple formula...

Knock more doors. Chase more ballots. Put more paper in the box. Win Elections.

We did it in 2024.

We're in the states that will decide 2026 and 2028.

**And every day, we 're training more patriots to go knock doors, make phone calls, and do the hard work to WIN elections and SAVE this country. **
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e6976bf6ebc94c8b89dfc737cd883f9e&_e=NXAR3DQUEZCQU9L2T11GdCkazvAwR3x3IsXbJ5Aip270I321xE94CqHmRZZ3zrUjTcTpA5uMO3BtXf9Nol5V3oio11Ffc26WDVnkKc8KiGvmNKXuFo10cbPwhHng_ayePlvKPXrd1T2tp5i5utTs7o2BS9-v_2T38vJEu8qQqjb6TS04UegSnMshIg0UbU5pJ-0DkLMLHgzBMtb37LVH-jxEnapSqDNF1D54Dh71H6sHYTvrkgCeWWVEd1wHbIrMyKsebckjSQOXluM-YPJuEAfgTju2qGZYWOLWz4rpux02AUsw9a1fP_7ZHs1NnfhuMS76DJbBtUvI3rz_rW0A2csZjUyJKjg8Zw_X-1OJSeiXprGoqk2QpnHGsUK-xLu8Hi3UVvNZON_jv7FuppIgI4CuPDUMrITXiPRzbAOOsLfzOKS5-R0kJiCWpW65ESJ_n_bhjL3Tntqe6SZGXnHg2dk8-S-Y32tbde6o3pB84XSv9uvhU6f3ysQ94K4nkxTdHfGUpd8XM8XdY_2hsILY6PlwmtlsBDR74dioUsQH5jPXpORFh6k650i3YbMUC0b3-Sz7i-KPyoWGlcdic_DFcr0a-m-9ebBOsz5Jew0kbIzKaLVuOlk1gWTkD2ZNJVfhlzMB5KKxQ-arOEDP07IbT7WozS03mBlOWzjDkW5mu_rATf04tuOV8w0BT_zvkxmY)
---
So, Peter...

If you're a proud American patriot...

If you can't stand idly by while the Left encourages violence and even outright murder to gain power...

If you don't want this country to be destroyed by the same evil that killed Charlie...

**[Help sponsor a ballot chaser today. Every $50 you give to Turning Point Action guarantees we can train and deploy another chaser straight to the most critical battlegrounds across the country.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=e6976bf6ebc94c8b89dfc737cd883f9e&_e=NXAR3DQUEZCQU9L2T11GdCkazvAwR3x3IsXbJ5Aip270I321xE94CqHmRZZ3zrUjTcTpA5uMO3BtXf9Nol5V3oio11Ffc26WDVnkKc8KiGvmNKXuFo10cbPwhHng_ayePlvKPXrd1T2tp5i5utTs7o2BS9-v_2T38vJEu8qQqjb6TS04UegSnMshIg0UbU5pJ-0DkLMLHgzBMtb37LVH-jxEnapSqDNF1D54Dh71H6uMCmSvlkxgRHo2aeKFiJRDbXtZ0Ey_Cg3BFuSAyrKUnKLi6BRzld4x1-079ZGxyca-mM_1xOVpiohFMjOh9st1xJtdSgPw96Far0RmaN2Qa2BiINciY8YVtkvl3FAzCacAxKnsvlVTey0fIqdKz02N-Eq4x6EUnetANnIYmbXwqgZ1QajTBihTqV7fOqTwQtw3O89kujc0YZ6Y0ssmizqkub3qPCPGkD9X5ZjLoDzPOTR_PHaEhkN3dHv5EPiDIIUa3dda248dgMhvxwOqKhJ6ZbfShycFtOAAu7-dd5WMQ_MRPghab3Fimk0r8Um87CdfvjlHNhcoXJi-QRWqzIkIwamykVf6MEL8Uz7E5WU7WJwmJKNmdf_kWex8BPs37niiZuHD4Ud4Ev_B0WB7E4h-wpv4blemv6XMboefHO_2NKxCI1i-vs5dphxnTg71X2Fdp92D2cahrmydTCfgiO9Y)**

name: Dan Goldman
subject: Stop weaponizing the DOJ
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
Since day one, Trump and House Republicans have unfairly targeted the SPLC because it exposes the very extremists they enable. |
---
Peter, The Southern Poverty Law Center (SPLC) — one of America’s most respected civil rights organizations — is now under investigation by Trump’s Justice Department. This Justice Department “investigation” into the SPLC is exactly the sort of weaponization of federal power we’ve been warned about — and it must stop. Why is it being investigated? The SPLC used paid informants to monitor violent extremists and hate groups. You know who else uses paid informants all the time? The DOJ itself. It’s only now labeled as a scandal because it’s actually political retaliation. _Since day one, Trump and House Republicans have unfairly targeted the SPLC because it exposes the very extremists they enable._ As someone who spent a decade as a federal prosecutor and who helped lead the impeachment investigation into Donald Trump, I know how dangerous it is when the Justice Department becomes a tool for political vendettas. **When our institutions are weaponized, our democracy is weaker and we are all less safe.** The SPLC plays a vital role in fighting hatred and protecting our communities. Politicized intimidation against watchdogs who confront white supremacy and political violence threatens the rule of law. **We need a strong showing of supporters to make clear we overwhelmingly disagree with this sham investigation and that intimidation won’t succeed.** **[Will you add your name to demand that the DOJ and Congress stop weaponizing the Justice Department and allow the SPLC to keep doing this critical work?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130682603/618561106/-687163830?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20260503_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNThmZTU5My0yMjQ3LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iq0sksISOQjX2XT3vgzA6N5PVsCaRiDI4hMKR1f-ABo=&emci=048fe593-2247-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=058fe593-2247-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=13556823)** | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130682604/618561107/-687163830?refcode=AU_DSG_EG_GEN_PET_AC_20260503_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwNThmZTU5My0yMjQ3LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Iq0sksISOQjX2XT3vgzA6N5PVsCaRiDI4hMKR1f-ABo=&emci=048fe593-2247-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=058fe593-2247-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=13556823)

---
Hi Derek, it’s Jon.
If you’ve been considering chipping in to my reelection campaign, now’s the time. I’ll explain more in just a moment, but if you’re ready to join the fight right now, you can split a donation between my reelection campaign and the DNC here: [**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-ossoff-split**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-ossoff-split?amount=20&refcode=em_20260430_6928_fr&refcode2=6928_22930333_9PT1KJ&akid=6928%2E22930333%2E9PT1KJ)
Here’s the deal: Republicans have been spending big in Georgia ... and much earlier than usual. They’re already running ads to attack me and lie about my record because they know flipping this Democratic Senate seat is their best chance to lock in a pro-MAGA Senate majority for the long-term.
There’s no doubt about it: I’m the most vulnerable Democratic Senator on the ballot in the midterm elections.
_But I have you, Derek._
Together, we’ve built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history, and in 2021 that organization won Georgia and the Senate majority.
Now, I need you more than ever: **I am literally MAGA’s #1 target.**
Yes, this election will be tough.
But we know how to win tough fights. We’ve done it before.
_Let’s do it again._
So if you can, please chip in any amount to my campaign and the DNC today. Folks, The United States Postal Service is a valuable service for so many Americans. Millions of people across the country rely on the USPS to deliver everything from prescription medications to their paychecks to their voter registration or mail-in ballots. But Donald Trump and his MAGA cronies want to privatize this critical service, which will lead to higher costs for deliveries and increase delays in dropping off our packages. He's already targeted the USPS by slashing more than **_10,000 employees_** in an already understaffed agency. _**Let me be blunt**_**:** Trump's plans to privatize the Postal Service so his millionaire buddies can make a profit would only **hurt seniors, small businesses, and vote-by-mail.** **Our government should be focused on supporting the American people, not on increasing profits.** That's why my fellow Senate Democrats are fighting back against all attempts to privatize the USPS and keep their services affordable for everyone. [**If you’re with me, will you add your name to stand with the USPS and our postal workers against Trump's MAGA plans to privatize the postal service? Our petition only has a limited amount of space, so please add yours before it fills up.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130683048/618562419/-1161284130?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2026.05.03_SAVE-USPS_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGI2Yzk2NS0yNDQ3LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l3qNB1rK4rAsw3bRKlnBYYAdTCW-MZoTjHpE3PAacag=&emci=395a66f2-6842-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=e4b6c965-2447-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=11913588) | | [ ADD YOUR NAME » ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130683049/618562420/-1161284130?refcode=LOC_EM_PET_2026.05.03_SAVE-USPS_B1_F1_S1_C1_U1_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85Mjg3NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlNGI2Yzk2NS0yNDQ3LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=l3qNB1rK4rAsw3bRKlnBYYAdTCW-MZoTjHpE3PAacag=&emci=395a66f2-6842-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=e4b6c965-2447-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=11913588)

name: Roy Cooper
subject: An explanation
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I felt this responsibility deeply. Peter, At the end of this message, I’m going to ask you to **[make a donation to my campaign for U.S. Senate in North Carolina](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-cooper.syIMBw&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260503_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=5403%2E35263%2ELm-nyl)**. But first, will you let me explain why your support is so important? Frankly, running for Senate wasn’t part of the plan. I wanted to serve North Carolina from right here at home. Seeing all of the chaos coming out of Washington DC, I knew I had to do something. Folks had placed their trust in me throughout my career as a public servant to fight for them – and **I felt that responsibility deeply.** This is a race I simply could not walk away from. It’s also one I know we can win. Since launching our campaign, tens of thousands of people have joined our grassroots movement. I’m so grateful to count you as one of them, Peter. **With a recent poll showing this race statistically tied, and far-right Republicans spending millions to defeat me, I need your help to keep up our momentum.** **[Your contribution of $10 split between our campaign and Tammy Baldwin will be put to work immediately to help us win in North Carolina and take back the Senate. Will you chip in?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=stb-em-cooper.syIMBw&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260503_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=5403%2E35263%2ELm-nyl)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation will go through immediately:_ | | [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3664?c0=stb-em-cooper._u1fIa&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260503_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=5403%2E35263%2ELm-nyl)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $25](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3665?c0=stb-em-cooper.DgsDvg&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260503_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=5403%2E35263%2ELm-nyl)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $50](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3666?c0=stb-em-cooper.umTtY_&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260503_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=5403%2E35263%2ELm-nyl)
---
[EXPRESS DONATE $100](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3667?c0=stb-em-cooper.ZziN8n&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260503_PM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=5403%2E35263%2ELm-nyl)
---
| [EXPRESS DONATE $250](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/3692?c0=stb-em-cooper.jA4IjG&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260503_PM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=5403%2E35263%2ELm-nyl)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2591?c0=stb-em-cooper.UTuCFB&refcode=AU_STB_FR_TAN_GEN_AC_20260503_PM1_V1_S1&t=10&akid=5403%2E35263%2ELm-nyl)

Despite all of the hate and division in our country right now, I will always believe in the basic goodness of people – and I will always have hope. Thanks for being by my side.
Roy Cooper

subject: Fight back against Jamie Raskin’s attack in court
body:
[](http://links.stoppingsocialistdems.com/u/click?_t=4dcc2aab65fd4d0da6a107b0eef86d43&_m=48bfc15629304d6cac5d205e28c8bd0e&_e=B6T4Rf7azrBzs4MZ6526h23rVx6ofucVSFqssToNAsOv7n9-__4V9PZsO-29Smcy4xO2qtM-3PLvN_-eb4E55-qpkJXh6iYdv7-pmjdcYgzLYR8xEba0AqiYOoZ1yRzWHiOHSBjjbd6jU8eFMJZ4VEloJqtQIrtlqhb99H2Q-vM6ZbE215YT558G_edEXlHzklw6qDu8dKarGaRvXz0vimKNBP1M2PWwbwaFdDr37cPRMrc5YaiFcCMZ5vk3-V1oVbzeHe_8uZMejElgFtXUe_BjHs9XiHzrS2jTCDDabS8l2JEUJ_BGGYFZEj61jw9BsUE8ypnvldoGrUwgSnIFTKU0xG5cdnKFFekpFSjjObzmYXDqzooP4eUTL-fgavjnAVYLDOJEI3MnR-eWqzawWwHbcuhUFLoGrv8JTCW3DlpSZkY7rr5q0tXZbj4n4f8YCITpILQxXQh6JD9t631a43kNkiCxbVhrKNHBZU6gsg6jDTDaLmddC_d2O-5ohqwp6Kt3KaouqZtu20tCzqV9MFSs8i9vToG8LQ8wp5bhjjEu76p0sM_BM4Hcuj3QmbhDVVHHQsSzThcAhDCMHCcet1AyPWFdAvx5PvzxGj5dzJPQsuDk7HNuEXQSkEyI1e3c)

Peter,

No one likes asking for help. Most of us have worked hard all our lives to be self-sufficient and provide for our families.

But for our January 6 patriots still waiting on pardons -- good individuals who answered the call to peacefully protest a stolen election -- the last five-plus years have been nothing short of a nightmare.

Luckily, **the Trump Department of Justice has rightly asked the court to vacate the charges and convictions against the unpardoned Proud Boys and Oath Keepers leaders** and dismiss the cases with prejudice.

After years of weaponized prosecutions under the Biden regime, this is the right step toward real justice.

**But a new threat has emerged -- not from the DOJ, but from the radical left in Congress.**

Congressman Jamie Raskin -- one of the most partisan Democrats in Washington -- filed an amicus brief in three separate appeals in the D.C. Circuit to defend the original jury verdicts.

**Our side 's attorneys had to drop everything and work around the clock all weekend to draft a strong opposition brief! **

The filing deadline is extremely tight -- early this week.

These patriots have been completely financially drained after more than five years of brutal legal battles, imprisonment, and persecution. Many are veterans who served our country honorably, only to be treated like enemies of the state by their own government. They simply do not have the resources to fund this critical fight on their own while still dealing with other lingering issues.

**Stand in the Gap has stepped in to raise emergency funds so their legal team can file a powerful response -- on time and with strength.**

That is why we need your help today, Peter.

Our goal is to raise at least $120,000 this week to defend the 12 individuals involved.

clean_body: Peter, No one likes asking for help. Most of us have worked hard all our lives to be self-sufficient and provide for our families. But for our January 6 patriots still waiting on pardons -- good individuals who answered the call to peacefully protest a stolen election -- the last five-plus years have been nothing short of a nightmare. Luckily, the Trump Department of Justice has rightly asked the court to vacate the charges and convictions against the unpardoned Proud Boys and Oath Keepers leaders and dismiss the cases with prejudice. After years of weaponized prosecutions under the Biden regime, this is the right step toward real justice. But a new threat has emerged -- not from the DOJ, but from the radical left in Congress. Congressman Jamie Raskin -- one of the most partisan Democrats in Washington -- filed an amicus brief in three separate appeals in the D.C. Circuit to defend the original jury verdicts. Our side 's attorneys had to drop everything and work around the clock all weekend to draft a strong opposition brief! The filing deadline is extremely tight -- early this week. These patriots have been completely financially drained after more than five years of brutal legal battles, imprisonment, and persecution. Many are veterans who served our country honorably, only to be treated like enemies of the state by their own government. They simply do not have the resources to fund this critical fight on their own while still dealing with other lingering issues. Stand in the Gap has stepped in to raise emergency funds so their legal team can file a powerful response -- on time and with strength. That is why we need your help today, Peter. Our goal is to raise at least $120,000 this week to defend the 12 individuals involved. Every dollar you give helps protect the rule of law, push back against leftist interference, and stand in the gap for these American patriots. Or keep reading to learn exactly who these individuals are -- many of them veterans -- why they were unfairly targeted, and why this fight matters to every conservative who believes in fairness and justice. These were the patriots that the Biden DOJ pursued the hardest with politically charged trials. Stewart Rhodes (Veteran), founder and leader of the Oath Keepers, was convicted of seditious conspiracy and sentenced to 18 years in prison. Kelly Meggs was convicted of seditious conspiracy and sentenced to 12 years. Kenneth Harrelson (Veteran) was convicted of related felony charges and sentenced to 4 years. Jessica Watkins (Veteran) was convicted of related felony charges and sentenced to 8.5 years. Roberto Minuta, Edward Vallejo (Veteran), Joseph Hackett, and David Moerschel were all convicted of seditious conspiracy after their own months-long trial and received substantial prison sentences with federal terrorism enhancements. Ethan Nordean was convicted of seditious conspiracy and sentenced to 18 years. Joseph Biggs (Veteran) was convicted of seditious conspiracy and sentenced to 17 years. Zachary Rehl (Veteran) was convicted of seditious conspiracy and sentenced to 15 years. Dominic Pezzola (Veteran) was convicted of serious felony charges in the same case and sentenced to 10 years. These individuals should never have been targeted with inflated seditious conspiracy charges in the first place. Now, the Trump administration is finally moving to correct this injustice and vacate the convictions. But Raskin is fighting tooth and nail to stop it. He is demanding the court appoint a special lawyer (an independent amicus) to oppose the DOJ and defend the old jury verdicts -- essentially trying to keep the deep state 's narrative alive and continue punishing these patriots. This need is especially urgent. These patriots are broke and still fighting on multiple fronts. They cannot afford to pay lawyers to defend against this latest leftist attack themselves. Even if you're unable to give financially right now, your prayers for these patriots, for wisdom in the courtroom, and for protection against political persecution are always powerful and deeply appreciated. Thank you for your time, consideration, and continued support of conservative values and American justice. In solidarity, Shane Jenkins Founder and Executive Director of Stand in the Gap P.S. This is exactly the kind of emergency Stand in the Gap was built to handle. Even after President Trump commuted their sentences, many of our brothers and sisters are still struggling to rebuild their lives. They endured prison, lost jobs, homes, friends, and family. They were publicly defamed and smeared by the mainstream media and the radical left as "insurrectionists" and "terrorists." In many ways, that 's when the hardest part began -- financial ruin, ongoing stigma, and now fresh attacks from radicals like Jamie Raskin.** After everything our fellow patriots have endured, they shouldn't have to face this alone. The courtroom fight continues with a razor-sharp deadline. Without your rapid support, these individuals won't have the legal resources they need to push back effectively. Stand In The Gap is registered as a 501(c)(3) non-profit organization. All contributions are tax-deductible to the extent permitted by law. body:
This is why the President and I did NOT take plea deals.
This is why the President and I did NOT take plea deals.

| **_FROM THE DESK OF RUDY W. GIULIANI_**
---
Dear Patriot,
---
When I was arrested in Fulton County in the most violent jail in America, I could’ve made all the legal battles magically disappear overnight...
---
_...I could’ve betrayed the truth by going on camera, dropping to my knees, and saying that the 2020 election was perfectly fair, transparent, and completely free of fraud!_
---
In fact, some who were arrested __did__ take plea deals.
---
**But the President and I did NOT.**
---
Our position was clear: **__NEVER_ _SURRENDER_!_**
---
As the old saying goes, “I’d rather die on my feet than live on my knees.”
---
_And now, the TRUTH is finally coming out:_
---
**“Fulton County admits to verifying 315,000 votes in 2020 without poll worker signatures”**
_-Atlanta News First_
---
But unfortunately, bloodthirsty left-wing tyrants do not care about the truth.
---
**I am _still_ being PROSECUTED by a vengeful Democrat Attorney General who wants to imprison me as part of her re-election campaign platform _this_ year.**
---
And with reports of a blue wave coming, she thinks she can get away with it – because voters will not stop her.
---
_Well, I beg to differ..._
---
_The people can stop her right here, right now by signing onto the People’s Defense of Rudy W. Giuliani in light of new evidence that adds even MORE doubt to the integrity of the 2020 election._
---
[**Please show YOUR support by adding your name to the _People’s Defense of Rudy W. Giuliani_ – as I face up to 20 YEARS in prison as an innocent man in a case where the President legally cannot pardon me.**](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

__
---

[ADD YOUR NAME](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---

Thank you and God Bless you,
---
[](https://link.email.america1stwarroom.)
---
Rudy Giuliani
Rudy Defense Trust

name: Yen Bailey
subject: Quick update from Yen
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Yen Bailey for Congress
body:
Friend,

I'm writing this from my kitchen in Tallahassee on a Sunday afternoon.

It's been a hard week. The Florida legislature drew a new map designed to rig the state for Republicans. The Supreme Court gutted what was left of the Voting Rights Act. And ten Republicans are lining up to take Neal Dunn's seat, including one who's already poured $8 million of his own money trying to buy it.

A lot of people I've talked to this week are tired. I get it. I'm tired too.

But here's what I keep coming back to: my parents fled Vietnam with nothing but the belief that this country was worth the risk. They didn't get to be tired. Tired wasn't an option.

We still have 107 days until the primary. 184 days until November. That's enough time to win this if we don't quit now.

If you have $15 to spare on a Sunday, I'd be grateful for it.

https://yenbaileyforcongress.us9.list-manage.com/track/click?u=642870bb478010796c7288d8f&id=a4bb84a2c1&e=58216231a8

Thank you for being in this fight with me.

Yen

P.S. If you can't give, would you forward this to one person who might? That always helps too.

--
Paid for by Yen Bailey for Congress
yenbaileyforcongress.com

Our mailing address:
PO Box 12699, Tallahassee , FL 32317

But when thousands of people step up together, it adds up fast -- and it's how we win tough races like this. We've set a goal to raise $10,000 before our next fundraising deadline, but we're still falling short. ~~ ~~ ~~ Every dollar truly makes a difference in a race this close. Thank you for being in this with me. -- Keisha Lance Bottoms | ~~ "Facebook" ~ "X" \[BLUESKY\] "Bluesky" PAID FOR BY SHAWN FOR GEORGIA

name: Chaz Molder
subject: The next generation of TN-5
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Molder for Congress
body:
And it started in 2021.

| | | | |
---
Peter, People ask me all the time what I'm most proud of from my time as mayor, and my answer is always the same: The Columbia Mayor's Youth Council. When we formed the Council in 2021, the idea was simple: get young people involved in leadership and engagement early. We wanted them to see what it looks like to make a difference in their own hometown. What the Council has done since then has honestly blown me away. The youth on the Council have changed the way I think about this work. Being around them reminds me that every decision we make right now is shaping the world they're going to inherit. And when I look at it through their eyes, the stakes feel a whole lot more real. That's a big part of why I'm running for Congress. Because the next generation in TN-5 is going to need representatives who are focused on the things that will actually shape their lives. Whether they can afford a first home. Whether they'll have access to quality healthcare. Whether there are good-paying jobs waiting for them when they're ready. Those aren't abstract policy questions to these kids. That's their future. And right now, I don't think the person representing this district spends much time thinking about any of it. I do. Every single day. clean_body: And it started in 2021. | | | | | Peter, People ask me all the time what I'm most proud of from my time as mayor, and my answer is always the same: The Columbia Mayor's Youth Council. When we formed the Council in 2021, the idea was simple: get young people involved in leadership and engagement early. We wanted them to see what it looks like to make a difference in their own hometown. What the Council has done since then has honestly blown me away. The youth on the Council have changed the way I think about this work. Being around them reminds me that every decision we make right now is shaping the world they're going to inherit. And when I look at it through their eyes, the stakes feel a whole lot more real. That's a big part of why I'm running for Congress. Because the next generation in TN-5 is going to need representatives who are focused on the things that will actually shape their lives. Whether they can afford a first home. Whether they'll have access to quality healthcare. Whether there are good-paying jobs waiting for them when they're ready. Those aren't abstract policy questions to these kids. That's their future. And right now, I don't think the person representing this district spends much time thinking about any of it. I do. Every single day. ~~ If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | ~ | ~ | | | ~~ My kids are watching. So are yours. So are the kids on that Youth Council. What we do right now matters for all of them, and I don't plan on letting them down. — Chaz | | ---|---|--- About Chaz Molder Chaz Molder is the Mayor of Columbia, Tennessee, serving since 2019 and re-elected in 2022. A Columbia native and graduate of the University of Tennessee and the University of Memphis Law School, he returned home to build a career in law and public service. As mayor, he founded the Columbia Mayor’s Youth Council to promote civic engagement among young people and emphasizes the importance of being present and responsive to the community. | | | ~~ Click~~ to receive fewer emails. name: Elizabeth Guzman
subject: Some think I can’t win this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Guzman for Congress
body:
| | | Here’s the truth, Friend. I’m not the kind of candidate the system is built for. I’m a union member. A working mom. An immigrant who came here with $300 and worked three minimum wage jobs to survive. I don’t take super PAC money. I don’t have billionaire donors. And I’m running in a red-to-blue race that powerful people would rather keep exactly the way it is. I’ve heard “you can’t win” before. I’ve heard “you’re not electable” before. But in 2017, I took on an entrenched Republican and won, becoming the first immigrant Latina elected to the VA House of Delegates. I didn’t wait my turn. I didn’t play it safe. _And I’m not starting now._ **[Will you chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can right now to help me take this fight to Congress?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqsFlYb8tSgv_iNH9eUO8IibbLOfX6PT-3gGyMq8W09rTWGkhpOgx1v3_y0wksFDKhC57umKjg75i7zm7NBFpOE9lWw97IYC8yPYy0Kk-UeyQi8kYtPLtV6LYtIE7v0wNmA2Ab7tc1D-jPdw8y0bZVRIRzJ5G5mY7aMolNdGEE4TC7d4NNf2QxYhejqaj7bYtp7qXRD0R8hGLMvr-NGO_F7Wprr92CIp_5sXWwJek3nYnuAyRivGQyg5KogxwjiSiq-Z0lpU-byuVM6fB9eLiJekV4qQGzdTAk4bkuHrgn43OKHATuAVnF73os4uEvXBFYM/4qb/xsVCmbglTRSNSYVaaKEAhw/h0/h001.2p8DFuf8pYH_zvFXAon3HMP5d5XfI4dE1-NmeXDI0ak)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately._ [Donate $10

clean_body: | | | Here’s the truth, Friend. I’m not the kind of candidate the system is built for. I’m a union member. A working mom. An immigrant who came here with $300 and worked three minimum wage jobs to survive. I don’t take super PAC money. I don’t have billionaire donors. And I’m running in a red-to-blue race that powerful people would rather keep exactly the way it is. I’ve heard “you can’t win” before. I’ve heard “you’re not electable” before. But in 2017, I took on an entrenched Republican and won, becoming the first immigrant Latina elected to the VA House of Delegates. I didn’t wait my turn. I didn’t play it safe. And I’m not starting now. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Because here’s what I know: Working people are being squeezed from every direction. Corporations are raising prices and raking in profits. MAGA extremists are attacking our rights and our communities. And too many Democrats in Washington aren’t fighting hard enough to stop it. In solidarity, Elizabeth | Democrat is running for Congress in Virginia's 7th District. She came to America as a single mother, becoming a union leader and one of the first Latinas in the Virginia General Assembly. She passed stronger gun safety laws, expanded collective bargaining rights and paid sick leave, and protected reproductive rights. To donate by check, send to: Guzman for Congress PO Box 74, Nokesville VA, 20182 \- \- Paid for by Guzman for Congress. Contributions or gifts to Guzman for Congress are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. | | Sent via . subject: Q1 FEC Report, upcoming Events, Lily in the News
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/lilytangwilliams/q1-fec-report-upcoming-events-lily-in-the-news?e=c338950e03)
---
| |

| |
# Q1 FEC REPORT, UPCOMING EVENTS, LILY IN THE NEWS
**First Quarter Filing, 2026**
I am grateful for my individual donors across the country who helped me to raise $212,000, for a total raised of $870K. My cash on hand (after expenses) is $573K. I am proud to say the top state where my campaign donations came from is New Hampshire.

Maggie Goodlander's top donors state is New York, and she has 75 PACs, while I have none. She has raised $4M with $2M cash on hand.

Although I need all the help I can get to win in this uphill battle, I love the competition!

We will have a fundraising event May 20 (see below) - Click on this link for [Fulchino Vinyard Event](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=34464f9e57&e=c338950e03)

If you can NOT make it, please donate here - [Donate to Lily](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=95622711d6&e=c338950e03)

**Upcoming Events**
5/9 Attending Henniker Spring Sip & Shop at 1pm
5/11 Speaking at Grafton County GOP in Ashland at 7pm
5/13 Speaking at Nashua GOP in at 7pm
5/14 Speaking at Atkinson GOP at 7pm
5/16 Walk for Sight, Concord 10am (Sign Up here to walk with me [Check out Lily4Congress' team fundraising page for Future In Sight](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=e0f0acab62&e=c338950e03))

**Lily In the News**

It is very encouraging to hear Dr. Schrader, Direct of Center for Civic Engagement from New England College talking about my 10-Point Good Government Plan on local radio show. He particularly likes the Single Issue bills that would allow maximum citizen access & engagement. His comments start at 15:20.
[Dr. Nate Schrader - The WEFA Morning Update](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=e4fa84d2e9&e=c338950e03)

WMUR CloseUp with Adam Sexton - This is my third session this campaign season!
[Lily Tang Williams calls for transparency in Congress | CloseUp](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=222f2115fb&e=c338950e03)

And then there is this. I couldn't help it...

It is May Day. Socialism Still Sucks!
Follow me on X: [https://x.com/i/status/2050359956486910309](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=74f97af7a6&e=c338950e03)

**Call for Action**
If you live in New Hampshire, please consider to take action:
**Donate $15, $20 or $50 monthly** - [Donate - Lily Tang Williams for Congress](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=1ab47e9a99&e=c338950e03)
Sign Up to volunteer - [Volunteer - Lily Tang Williams for Congress](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=021c05127a&e=c338950e03)
Veterans, Endorse Lily here - [Veterans for Lily - Lily Tang Williams for Congress](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=9b7fe01103&e=c338950e03)
Small Business - [Small Businesses for Lily - Lily Tang Williams for Congress](https://lilytangwilliams.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8317033781a524f5f640e7e3e&id=9e1d24223d&e=c338950e03)

Thank you and God Bless,

name: Powered by People
subject: Students coming to class after a shift. Moms raising kids, holding down jobs.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
# [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240827%2E444211%2E37bJcH)
Beto was at Austin Community College and San Antonio College this week.
Two schools full of people who are working hard, carrying so much, and still finding a way forward.
Students coming to class after a shift. Moms raising kids, holding down jobs, doing homework late at night, trying to create a better life for their families.
When you’re working, studying, parenting, and doing everything you can to get by, politics can feel like a luxury. But being politically involved is how we ultimately change the conditions that make life so hard for working Texans in the first place.
It’s how we raise the minimum wage. It’s how we fund our schools. It’s how we make health care and child care affordable. It’s how we elect leaders who understand what life is like for the people they represent.
That’s why Powered by People is showing up at community colleges. We’re going to the schools where students take night classes after work. Where single parents study between shifts. Where people are living close to the edge and still betting on themselves.
We engage with them, listen to them and help them register or update their registration. We also personally stay in touch with each new voter until they vote. It’s a lot of work, but it works.
[**And it only happens because people like you make it possible. If you can, please chip in today to help us continue to organize across Texas. With your help we can elect Democrats up and down the ballot in November.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20260503.7_Q9TJ&refcode=ema20260503-240827&t=3&akid=240827%2E444211%2E37bJcH)
**[Donate $3](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/56109?c0=pbp-em-20260503.7_Q9TJ&refcode=ema20260503-240827&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=240827%2E444211%2E37bJcH)**
Thank you,
Powered by People

clean_body: Beto was at Austin Community College and San Antonio College this week. Two schools full of people who are working hard, carrying so much, and still finding a way forward. Students coming to class after a shift. Moms raising kids, holding down jobs, doing homework late at night, trying to create a better life for their families. When you’re working, studying, parenting, and doing everything you can to get by, politics can feel like a luxury. But being politically involved is how we ultimately change the conditions that make life so hard for working Texans in the first place. It’s how we raise the minimum wage. It’s how we fund our schools. It’s how we make health care and child care affordable. It’s how we elect leaders who understand what life is like for the people they represent. That’s why Powered by People is showing up at community colleges. We’re going to the schools where students take night classes after work. Where single parents study between shifts. Where people are living close to the edge and still betting on themselves. We engage with them, listen to them and help them register or update their registration. We also personally stay in touch with each new voter until they vote. It’s a lot of work, but it works. Thank you, Powered by People

Thank you, – Steve Hilton Authorized by Steve Hilton for Governor 2026 | | Paid for by Steve Hilton for Governor 2026** |

name: Alex Kelloff
subject: Here’s how we build momentum
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alex Kelloff for Colorado
body:
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2605-q2-ak [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2605-q2-ak]
Hey there,
We kicked off May with a clear focus: build real momentum over the next 60 days.
Now we need to turn that into action.
http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2605-q2-ak [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2605-q2-ak]
If we’re going to win this primary, we need to grow this campaign quickly, and that starts with people stepping up in their own communities.
Here’s what that looks like this month:
* 500 new donors to show early strength
* 50 new volunteers to help us reach voters across the district
* 20 local events to connect directly with communities
And there’s a role for you in that. You can:
* Volunteer your time and help us on the ground
* Host a small event or meet-and-greet in your community
* Contribute financially to help us stay competitive
Every conversation, every introduction, every person who steps up helps us build something stronger. If you’re ready to be part of this, sign up, get involved, or chip in today to help us keep growing: [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/2605-q2-ak]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

— Alex

name: Marcy Kaptur HQ
subject: ICE’s No. 2 is running against Marcy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
National Republicans see our district as a pick-up, and they’re opening their checkbooks.
| Friend,

MAGA spent $25 million trying to buy this district in 2024, and with the Republican primary just 2 days away, they're trying to force through ICE's former No. 2 as their nominee for 2026. [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108671?t=6&akid=24169%2E878179%2EskhSX_) [Before I get into it, I need to be direct. This race is a top MAGA target. The Voter Protection Project and Marcy need your help right now to defend this seat.](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/108671?t=7&akid=24169%2E878179%2EskhSX_)

MAGA's choice for this race is a close ally of Kristi Noem, and national Republicans are lining her up for Congress in a district they just gerrymandered again last fall to try to tilt the playing field in their favor.

That means outside GOP money is about to pour into this race. They see our district as a pickup opportunity, and they think they can buy this seat with MAGA cash and their handpicked recruits.

Marcy has spent decades fighting for Northwest Ohio, not Washington insiders. While they focus on political games, she's focused on delivering real results: lowering costs for working families, protecting access to affordable health care, and bringing transformative investments home.

[Friend, MAGA dark money is coming for this seat, and they think they've recruited a strong opponent against Marcy. **CLIFF 'S NOTE:** Want tho help us continue to fight billionaires so Dems can win back the 7-10 Senate seats I talk about in this video? [Support media that actually fights back](https://substack.com/redirect/e4fb8234-2248-4e9e-a296-1dd28a92893d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)--and shows you how we win--**[join BAM](https://substack.com/redirect/e4fb8234-2248-4e9e-a296-1dd28a92893d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).**
👉[ Upgrade Now To Paid](https://substack.com/redirect/e4fb8234-2248-4e9e-a296-1dd28a92893d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Thursday on _Tequila Talk_ , Cliff and Joe Walsh squared off over the most chaotic Senate race in America. Janet Mills just dropped out of Maine. The field now belongs to Graham Platner--the populist insurgent with a beard, a flannel shirt, a Nazi tattoo he allegedly lied about, a paper trail of guests on far-right anti-Semitic radio shows, and the kind of working-class authenticity Democratic primary voters say they're starving for.
The problem? Walsh isn't buying it. "There isn't a tent big enough for Joe Walsh and Graham Platner," he tells Cliff in one of the sharpest lines of the night. And then they go--two friends, half a bottle of tequila in, fighting over whether the Democratic Party needs fighters, saints, or something neither of them can quite name.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e4fb8234-2248-4e9e-a296-1dd28a92893d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The conversation goes deeper than Maine. It runs through Mills' filibuster blunder that cost her Cliff's support, through the Hungary playbook that just ended Orban, through the question of whether you'd vote for Rashida Tlaib if she were running against Susan Collins in your state, and through the harder question underneath all of it: when the GOP nominated Trump three times, did they take character off the table for everyone--and what does the Democratic Party become if it follows?
Cliff closes with a stake-the-ground call for institutional reform: 17 justices on the Supreme Court, a bigger House, the filibuster gone, and six-to-nine Senate pickups in 2026. If you've ever wondered what an honest argument between two friends who agree on the stakes but disagree on the tactics actually sounds like, this is it. Pour something good and hit play.
This is what independent media does that corporate news won't--two people who like each other, disagree publicly, name names, and don't pull punches because no advertiser is hovering over the conversation.

Tequila Talk gets real. | | , , and | May 3 | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- CLIFF 'S NOTE: Want tho help us continue to fight billionaires so Dems can win back the 7-10 Senate seats I talk about in this video? shows you how we win--. 👉 Thursday on Tequila Talk , Cliff and Joe Walsh squared off over the most chaotic Senate race in America. Janet Mills just dropped out of Maine. The field now belongs to Graham Platner--the populist insurgent with a beard, a flannel shirt, a Nazi tattoo he allegedly lied about, a paper trail of guests on far-right anti-Semitic radio shows, and the kind of working-class authenticity Democratic primary voters say they're starving for. The problem? Walsh isn't buying it. "There isn't a tent big enough for Joe Walsh and Graham Platner," he tells Cliff in one of the sharpest lines of the night. And then they go--two friends, half a bottle of tequila in, fighting over whether the Democratic Party needs fighters, saints, or something neither of them can quite name. | | ---|---|--- The conversation goes deeper than Maine. It runs through Mills' filibuster blunder that cost her Cliff's support, through the Hungary playbook that just ended Orban, through the question of whether you'd vote for Rashida Tlaib if she were running against Susan Collins in your state, and through the harder question underneath all of it: when the GOP nominated Trump three times, did they take character off the table for everyone--and what does the Democratic Party become if it follows? Cliff closes with a stake-the-ground call for institutional reform: 17 justices on the Supreme Court, a bigger House, the filibuster gone, and six-to-nine Senate pickups in 2026. If you've ever wondered what an honest argument between two friends who agree on the stakes but disagree on the tactics actually sounds like, this is it. Pour something good and hit play. This is what independent media does that corporate news won't--two people who like each other, disagree publicly, name names, and don't pull punches because no advertiser is hovering over the conversation. Tequila Talk exists because you fund it. --five bucks a month, less than a bad sandwich--or . Then share this episode with the friend who needs to hear an honest Democratic-primary argument... ...and drop a comment below with your own answer to Cliff and Joe's question: fighters, saints, or both? Every subscription, every donation, every share, every comment keeps Cliff at the table and the tequila flowing. Same fight. -- Cliff MORE FROM BLUE AMP MEDIA | | and | | ---|---|--- | Apr 28 | You're currently a free subscriber to . # [Your Bank Account and the Quantum Threat: How Safe Is Your Money Online?](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1526781&post_id=195396730&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTk1Mzk2NzMwLCJpYXQiOjE3Nzc4NDE3MDksImV4cCI6MTc4MDQzMzcwOSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE1MjY3ODEiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.E7klMt3BHF3bX5BFLOQuvBRo8y8ElO4gSSqhpekZ4wY)

---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/danacriswell/p/your-bank-account-and-the-quantum?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/aaa6991c-b5ab-4f80-939e-05f7ce12bf8b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
When people hear about quantum computing, the conversation often turns to Bitcoin. Could a powerful enough machine break its cryptography? Could digital assets be stolen? But there is a more immediate and less discussed question: what about your everyday bank account?
If quantum computing ever becomes capable of breaking modern encryption, your online checking account would not be exempt. In fact, in some ways, it could be just as exposed.
Today, banks rely on many of the same cryptographic tools that secure the broader internet. When you log into your account, your connection is protected by protocols like TLS, which depend on public key cryptography. Behind the scenes, systems use algorithms such as RSA and elliptic curve cryptography to secure logins, transactions, and communications between financial institutions.
These are the very systems that quantum computing threatens.
A sufficiently advanced quantum computer could use Shor's algorithm to break these encryption schemes, allowing an attacker to decrypt sensitive data or impersonate a trusted party. In theory, that could mean intercepting login credentials, forging transactions, or accessing private financial records.
But as with Bitcoin, the key phrase is "sufficiently advanced." That level of quantum capability does not exist today. There is no evidence that any institution, government or otherwise, has a machine capable of breaking modern banking encryption in real time.
Still, the concern is not hypothetical in the long run. Security experts have been warning for years about what is called "harvest now, decrypt later." The idea is simple. An attacker could collect encrypted financial data today and store it, waiting for the day when quantum computers are powerful enough to decrypt it. That does not require breaking systems now, only preserving the data for future access.
Banks and governments are not ignoring this risk. Standards bodies like the National Institute of Standards and Technology have already begun rolling out new forms of encryption designed to resist quantum attacks. Financial institutions are actively researching how to transition their systems to these new standards, though the process will take time. Unlike a simple software update, upgrading global financial infrastructure requires coordination across thousands of institutions and legacy systems.
There is also an important difference between Bitcoin and traditional banking when it comes to risk. If a vulnerability were exploited in Bitcoin, the burden would fall heavily on individual users to secure their funds and move them to safer systems. In contrast, banks operate within a regulated framework. They have security teams, insurance mechanisms, and, in many cases, government backstops. If a breach occurs, customers are typically not left to absorb the full loss.
That does not mean the system is invulnerable. It means the responsibility is distributed differently.
Your online checking account is protected by layers of security beyond cryptography. Multi factor authentication, fraud monitoring, transaction limits, and human oversight all add friction for attackers. Even if encryption were weakened in the future, these additional controls would still play a role in limiting damage.
The bigger challenge is time. Financial systems are vast and complex, and transitioning them to quantum resistant encryption will not happen overnight. The risk is not that your bank account will suddenly be drained tomorrow by a quantum computer. The risk is that institutions must complete a slow and careful migration before the technology reaches a tipping point.
For consumers, there is little immediate action required beyond basic security hygiene. Use strong passwords. Enable multi factor authentication. Monitor your accounts. These steps protect against today's threats, which are far more practical than quantum attacks.
The conversation around quantum computing should not be limited to cryptocurrency. It is a broader issue that touches every part of the digital economy, including the systems people rely on every day.
If quantum computing eventually reshapes cybersecurity, it will not just be a story about Bitcoin. It will be a story about the entire financial system adapting to a new kind of risk.

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-osborn [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-osborn]
I’ve spent my life fixing things that are broken.
On the factory floor.
In the Navy.
In the National Guard.
And right now, there’s nothing more broken than the United States Senate.
Washington isn’t working for people like us anymore. It’s working for billionaires, lobbyists, and corporations that write the rules for themselves — and leave the rest of us footing the bill.
I’m Dan Osborn, and I’m running for Senate to fix Washington. Please, chip in $10, $25, or whatever you can right now to help me → [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-osborn]
DONATE TODAY TO DEFEAT MAGA EXTREMISM! [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-osborn]
I’m not a career politician. I’m an industrial mechanic from Omaha, a former union leader who took on Kellogg’s to protect my coworkers’ wages and benefits, and a guy who knows what it means to work 80-hour weeks just to keep a middle-class life together.
And I’m running as an independent because I don’t owe either party a damn thing.
I owe you.
I’ll fight to cut taxes for working families, protect Social Security, stand up for family farms, and finally pass Right to Repair so corporations stop ripping people off just to fix what they own.
But I can’t do this alone. The same billionaires who broke Washington are going to spend whatever it takes to keep it that way.
So I’m asking: Will you chip in $10, $25, or anything you can right now to help us build a campaign that answers to working people — not the powerful? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rrr-osborn]
Let's fix this.
—Dan Osborn

body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=41252%2E3422442%2E9M1rZ2)
Peter, in just two days, Katie will take the stage for the _third debate_ in this race for governor.
If the first two debates made anything clear, it’s this: **Katie is the choice for California governor.**
She’s shown up with the clearest vision for lowering costs, taking on corporate greed, and delivering for working Californians—while proving she’s not afraid to stand up to anyone on that stage.
We set a goal to raise _$50,000_ before Katie takes the stage—making sure we have the resources to show up strong and get our message out.
**[Will you chip in $5 today so we can be prepared before and after Katie takes the stage in two days?](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260503_2_ak.JpVEeg&refcode=em20260503-41252&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=41252%2E3422442%2E9M1rZ2)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260503_2_ak.JpVEeg&refcode=em20260503-41252&t=4&akid=41252%2E3422442%2E9M1rZ2)
Katie is up against serious opposition:
* A self-funded billionaire who has poured **$147 million** into his own campaign.
* A candidate who took a maximum contribution from **Big Oil.**
* And **two MAGA Republicans** ready to bring Trump’s agenda to California.

We need the resources to amplify Katie’s message after she leaves the stage to reach undecided voters across California, and make sure this moment turns into momentum.
Because while our opponents can rely on personal fortunes, corporate checks, or MAGA infrastructure, Katie only relies on this grassroots team.
**[If you’re with Katie, chip in $5 to help us hit our $50,000 goal to reach more voters, keep Katie’s ads on the airwaves, and cut through the noise coming from billionaire money and right-wing extremists.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260503_2_ak.JpVEeg&refcode=em20260503-41252&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=41252%2E3422442%2E9M1rZ2)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260503_2_ak.JpVEeg&refcode=em20260503-41252&t=24&akid=41252%2E3422442%2E9M1rZ2)
Thank you,
Team Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260503-41252&amounts=&t=25&refcode2=41252_3422442_9M1rZ2&akid=41252%2E3422442%2E9M1rZ2)**

clean_body: Peter, in just two days, Katie will take the stage for the third debate in this race for governor. If the first two debates made anything clear, it’s this: Katie is the choice for California governor. She’s shown up with the clearest vision for lowering costs, taking on corporate greed, and delivering for working Californians—while proving she’s not afraid to stand up to anyone on that stage. We set a goal to raise $50,000 before Katie takes the stage—making sure we have the resources to show up strong and get our message out. Katie is up against serious opposition: A self-funded billionaire who has poured $147 million into his own campaign. A candidate who took a maximum contribution from Big Oil. And two MAGA Republicans ready to bring Trump’s agenda to California. We need the resources to amplify Katie’s message after she leaves the stage to reach undecided voters across California, and make sure this moment turns into momentum. Because while our opponents can rely on personal fortunes, corporate checks, or MAGA infrastructure, Katie only relies on this grassroots team. Thank you, Team Katie Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change.

name: Voter Action Project
subject: Trump's latest mail-in voting attack
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
NYT: Trump Signs Order Seeking Federal Control of Mail Voting as He Promotes False Claims [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=050326_2&amount=25]
Straight from the New York Times , Team:
" President Trump on [March 31] stepped up efforts to promote his false claims of widespread voting fraud, signing an executive order of questionable constitutionality seeking to create a national list of citizens that would determine voting eligibility and restrict mail ballots. "
Let's be clear: The president has no explicit Constitutional authority over elections, and much of this latest attack on our fundamental right to vote appears difficult to enforce and legally dubious.
This order directs the Department of Homeland Security to create a “ state citizenship list ” based on data from various federal databases. It also directs federal officials to send that made-up list to state election officials, and orders the attorney general to prioritize prosecution of election officials who provide ballots to voters not on the made-up list. It also directs the U.S. Postal Service not to transmit mail-in ballots from any individual not included on Trump's “ state citizenship list ," even though elections are mandated by the constitutional the be run by the states.
This order is yet another sign that the MAGA crew will do anything they can to codify their power permanently and silence the will of the people by suppressing and eliminating the votes we cast.
Our elections are sound and mail-in voting is secure, no matter what Trump says. Step up to defend our fundamental right to vote and the use of mail-in ballots with $35 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=050326_2&amount=35]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=050326_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=050326_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=050326_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=050326_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=050326_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=050326_2&amount=35]
We all know that mail-in voting laws are about ballot accessibility, making it easier for voters to participate in our elections . States have spent millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing. It's been used widely in some states for decades and in most of the country since the pandemic.
But that doesn't stop Trump because he's absolutely terrified of what might happen in the next election.
Arizona’s Secretary of State (the official who runs elections), Adrian Fontes, reacted like this: “ The Constitution doesn’t allow the executive to take over elections administration, that’s a job for the state legislatures or Congress, and so I don’t think this is going to pass any sort of judicial muster. So this is a big, giant waste of time, and it’s an attention grab from the Trump administration. ”
He added: “ The greatest threat to American elections is Donald Trump lying about them. ” That''s because Donald Trump’s continued claims about large-scale “cheating” in elections are outright lies.
Protecting vote-by-mail for the upcoming midterms is crucial to make every voice heard in our elections. Will you chip in $35 or whatever you can to fight lies about mail-in voting and help make every vote count? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=050326_2&amount=35]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=050326_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=050326_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States

If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=i5o21PVUoT%2FPacDYLsMuuXV%2B5cRQcuBYh9d%2BsMrFcK9nU0w4sqEBV%2FZGJZR9JPQu%2F1DxDxgqb%2FIpo9q2pSCg9kEh%2BKBMZW7c%2Ffv8rnO8xCXxyeHzRHxbJLCt8qsqa9UxRPUr%2Bj41uEHD1Kmto4pG1JaS3KhOwNzIRXSSlrPCuJS%2BTgRVrFlG4P4xXpSxv%2BawDvPpzJTHgwlCBJW%2F%2BYiJLs3ZuDacwLeQvHTBcD06eMiCqYIUHrw5yeAh9Dws7FX%2FHJvC5UKA7t96Sq1VhUdUX6g9WeWpVPwPwaH8ZxadymCTy1uTeWKU2h9QlCI43TMlW0cLq1ePttJ3boodyx9iDh8MDv8ANo1cnOr7NJPvf2V7bc0lOj67ZBU4TflS3JS2Chn259CslmPl37Iq6B7hHU8oT3o1%2FoBPJQG%2Bowp2py4%3D .

name: Amanda for Colorado
subject: Suspended
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Amanda for Colorado
body:
| | | Fellow democracy defender, Last week, I told you about the [Supreme Court gutting the Voting Rights Act](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMWn3R7U15hZOprFI75oZg457qQL2m-C_3EZQM-DEo9CYgLyNJj1Ouwn4pyHFfz33frL7FN2GOwc5fFuyqnAsYQrqK_cP-RXmGO07fcRrXLtZXZ-uiZnLVOGnf_Gj0e1yhHksnOrf-Y_NXYwh4RvdZrH9bLTPDoyWnW-rHhnG6gU9epHOIKfumMzkihYcU5ZlsYo5m0F9KRGWkBQ-HmaAs0pRYN6Ayv3nkluEfcJA7CXMia2Gk54-H-9PBEyN8ud1PQ/4qb/EXFnIdWhTvOgvz-EVSwZQA/h0/h001.Ewv7w93L9HnCJcw-Db5aXhxU-Q52NTBCDpwi5Byz7B0). Now we’re seeing what that means in real time. Louisiana’s MAGA Republican governor just suspended their in-progress primary election. People had already started to cast their votes. **He stopped their election after voting had already begun.** **** **We talk a lot about the “slide into authoritarianism”** like it’s some abstract idea. Something that might happen someday. **It’s happening right now.** We didn’t stop elections during the Civil War.
We didn’t stop elections during World War II.
We didn’t stop elections during COVID. But suddenly Republicans are willing to suspend elections so they can rig the outcome. **That should shake every single one of us.** Once you normalize overturning the rules of democracy when you don’t like the result, **you don’t have a democracy anymore.** However, **we are not powerless**. Colorado has some of the strongest election protections in the country because election officials like me have crafted secure, accessible, resilient systems and are willing to stand up and defend them. I’m running for Secretary of State because I’ve spent my career not just talking about democracy—but running elections, writing election law, and stopping efforts to undermine our voting rights before they succeed. **Anyone who comes for our elections in Colorado will have to go through me.** But**I can’t do this alone.** If you believe we should never cancel elections to serve political power, that **democracy is worth fighting for** right now, can you [chip in today](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu9tkS213ThEvbRM6r3opeYuU4W04YpDvXwBZQsTw3tVCcdBOOgK0I7HlDqdZWdshFz4ubFO9ae68JfH5LfeHxZdIDPTIpY0MeQinfqiPONKLTCrlce1FUzKNTfkuGP4IteMMcgUO-ZypwA2kaQdt4LdOsJ6duDDFdNdRZVoK-QZFxmqFegvm-qitXLgNi3K89Uw2p0z0ntz_qKFGXxmKx6K6YdCGeq0ToOgW6eCB4_wtKA6tiFC0UdQE3AytbaXkg/4qb/EXFnIdWhTvOgvz-EVSwZQA/h1/h001.Xp8CWSppTRRxLYFulEHzne_tuQ4sCNdgtUsyUqDPgLs) to help us protect it? [DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu9tkS213ThEvbRM6r3opeYUxsTPQE6Cub--RjvJT2HU0YWcN-v1jZqu1vqfkIO9pbGYyL4P79K2Yjbcb2xFDsSf0RsJ5MiAPp8M2C7XcMnLkqtaMtzRQmgbWGdiMbbnMQBSLCJaVEDshXzm84cUc6a3G3KK-Lo1_TlThkbbZYTumXbRabVCANPay1PdBUaIlxWPgc6gg7jWw0sND5gagHcEEBNJWdsVyHUS-lFdbc5yIP4Qskk3y1LY0FKVprhMHI/4qb/EXFnIdWhTvOgvz-EVSwZQA/h2/h001._urAHP1Ah-Y7JF3Afv8geneHacz65dwtjxMkfedyty0)
We don’t have the luxury of waiting. This is the moment. And what we do right now will decide what comes next. I hope you’ll **[join me in this fight](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqu9tkS213ThEvbRM6r3opeYexFZSkqjjtVfM-9gZg6ZcZDUS3_TIj7EEJdB12rwA3J12VMOrDBtoJMXiYAJATu1BNcKZaBLUeCZImqLD871plv0lOR5J6dptDH6CGEr0uAprcVkkJwq5y2eClAMKw3xL35C8ogf3sqHAEG6JqVs-aWkq5rjQyLvazDmZ1TuF5k11y3tDCSJmnqevtO3mJVH8tquofpe8wkwSxGWoZYV3HiCOmhPId8j8qMsNrlbvJE/4qb/EXFnIdWhTvOgvz-EVSwZQA/h3/h001.dXN975dNz_S8xr_m9vSobNiCFqz8fqF-PegRRGJHPCo).** Amanda Gonzalez, Candidate for Secretary of State

| | |
# [If Trump Builds the Ballroom, We Must Tear it Down](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0a3a65d5-f5f7-480d-bf0c-53ca7ef4d23d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | _(Already took this action?[Click here for others](https://default.salsalabs.org/T75ac23ae-b2c6-456e-a5df-6949115d3800/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9). Want to unsubscribe? See link below)_ Donald Trump is forcing a gold-gilded White House ballroom on the nation — something we don't need, don't want, and is an absurd waste of money. And he tore out a chunk of the White House, so we'd have no choice but to fill in the hole with it, and keep it as a tribute to him. **[To hell with that. If he builds it, we need to tear that down, and restore the White House as it was. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb53018a0-356b-410e-90d4-70b0146f7f8d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** We can't undo all the damage Trump has done to America, but this is one step we can take. And it's one we must take once he is out of there (presumably in handcuffs). [**Sign and show your support, and tell our leaders to do the same: "If Trump Builds the Ballroom, We Must Tear it Down"**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T25f39c48-6f44-4d37-a025-7bbde7cbfcf2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Gina Hinojosa
subject: Ann Richards territory
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Committee to Elect Aaron Ford
body:
Let’s break down what this actually means.
Polls are now showing only 3 points between me and Greg Abbott.
**Let me break down what this actually means.**
**3 points** is the same thin margin that sent Ann Richards to the governor's mansion — the last time a Democrat led Texas.
**3 points** is some of the closest polling Greg Abbott has ever seen.
**3 points** means we are not just competing, _we are a real threat and inches away from making history._
**[Every dollar counts. Will you split $5 between Aaron Ford and my campaign today to help turn 3 points into an electoral victory?](https://act.fordfornevada.com/go/1?c0=partner_ms_gh_em_aaron_ford.fBS4s1&amount=5&refcode=em20260503-56&t=1&akid=56%2E127862%2EDuWX_e)**
This isn’t just a fantasy anymore. We have a _real path to win_ — but only if we have the resources to fight against Abbott’s millions.
This team's support is exactly what we need for the sprint to November, to fund digital ads for Texas screens across the state. For thousands of text messages to mobilize our supporters. For door-knocking and conversations in neighborhoods Abbott has ignored for years.
**[We’re in winning territory. Can you help us swing the polls by splitting $5 between Aaron Ford and my campaign?](https://act.fordfornevada.com/go/1?c0=partner_ms_gh_em_aaron_ford.fBS4s1&amount=5&refcode=em20260503-56&t=2&akid=56%2E127862%2EDuWX_e)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://act.fordfornevada.com/go/1?c0=partner_ms_gh_em_aaron_ford.fBS4s1&amount=5&refcode=em20260503-56&t=21&akid=56%2E127862%2EDuWX_e)**
Thank you,
Gina Hinojosa
[](https://act.fordfornevada.com/go/1?c0=partner_ms_gh_em_aaron_ford.fBS4s1&amount=5&refcode=em20260503-56&t=22&akid=56%2E127862%2EDuWX_e)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_af_footer?refcode=em20260503-56-&t=23&refcode2=56_127862_DuWX_e&akid=56%2E127862%2EDuWX_e)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.fordfornevada.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=24&akid=56%2E127862%2EDuWX_e)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.fordfornevada.com/signup/update-your-information/?t=25&akid=56%2E127862%2EDuWX_e)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.fordfornevada.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=26&akid=56%2E127862%2EDuWX_e)

subject: difficult email to send
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action
body:
|
---
_You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you only want our most important email updates,[click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/108?t=2&akid=2185%2E259176%2EDYB8N7) If you'd like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/109?t=3&akid=2185%2E259176%2EDYB8N7)_

[](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10970?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.03_Acton-Down-Polls_B4_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=4&akid=2185%2E259176%2EDYB8N7) Peter, I have some tough news, and I wanted you to hear it directly from me: **A brand new poll shows me _one point down_ to my extreme opponent, Vivek Ramaswamy.** We knew this race was razor-thin. And I haven't lost hope yet, because four other recent polls have shown us ahead. [**With just 2 days until our primary election, I urgently need your support to fight back. That's why my team and I set a goal to raise $200,000 by midnight, and I'm counting on you to help us reach it. Will you please chip in $10 to me and Blue Amp Action now to help take back the lead in this critical election?**](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10970?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.03_Acton-Down-Polls_B4_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=5&akid=2185%2E259176%2EDYB8N7) | [CHIP IN $10](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10971?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.03_Acton-Down-Polls_B4_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=6&akid=2185%2E259176%2EDYB8N7)
---
Look, here’s what’s going on:
Over the past year, we’ve built an incredible grassroots movement. We’ve traveled to every corner of this state. We broke fundraising records. And against all odds – we took a narrow lead in the polls.
**But then, my billionaire opponent began unloading his massive warchest against us. He wrote his own campaign a check for $25 million. He poured $10 MILLION into ads to soften his extreme image and to spread ugly, baseless attacks against me.**
This will be a toss-up battle all the way to Election Day. Experts say it’ll be the most expensive governor's race in Ohio history.
I’m not a billionaire, Peter. But I’m confident that together — when folks like you chip in $10 or $25 at a time — we can take back our lead and win this race.
**So please, Peter, I'm personally asking:[ Will you chip in $10, $25, or anything at all to me and Blue Amp Action so that we can reach our critical $200,000 rapid-response goal by midnight, pull back ahead in the polls, and win?](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10970?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.03_Acton-Down-Polls_B4_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=7&akid=2185%2E259176%2EDYB8N7)**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Amy Acton and Blue Amp Action will go through immediately:_

[CHIP IN MORE](https://act.blueampaction.com/go/10974?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.05.03_Acton-Down-Polls_B4_F1_S1_C1_90AC-365DON_N-T1&t=11&akid=2185%2E259176%2EDYB8N7)
---
Thanks so much for your support,
Amy Acton 💚
| [ ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_baa_temp_2026?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.XX.XX_footer_XX_XX_XX_XX_XX_XX&amount=5,25,50,100,250,500,1000&t=12&refcode2=2185_259176_DYB8N7&akid=2185%2E259176%2EDYB8N7)

We’re facing a critical moment in American history, which means what we do right now will define the future of our nation and our world.

Here at Blue Amp, we’re dedicated to uplifting the movers and shakers who will defend our shared democratic values and beat back against right-wing authoritarianism. We’re amplifying good candidates who are passionate about protecting civil rights, making life affordable, and leaving a better world for future generations.

The midterms are coming up, and we can’t do this work without you. With your support, we'll work to halt the right-wing agenda and support strong Democrats who will fight for us across the country.

**[Chip in to Blue Amp Action today to support our mission and help us continue boosting Democratic champions and holding extremists accountable. Every contribution – $10, $25, or even $100 – allows us to keep amplifying real leaders who will fight for our democracy.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_baa_temp_2026?source=LOC_EM_FR_2026.XX.XX_footer_XX_XX_XX_XX_XX_XX&amount=10&t=13&refcode2=2185_259176_DYB8N7&akid=2185%2E259176%2EDYB8N7)**

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Sign: Don't let Trump Cut Medicare to Pay for Iran War
body:
Take action, and spread the word
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Don't Let Trump Cut Medicare to Pay for Iran War](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9f0f81c7-2bce-4767-85f6-d5e44888fb89/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5859b1b2-c915-482b-9342-75b27773822c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Did you see this? Holy cow, he said it out loud. **At a private White House Easter luncheon — in remarks he tried to hide by taking the video down — Trump admitted point-blank that he will cut Medicare and Medicaid to fund his war in Iran.** _" It's not possible for us to take care of Medicaid, Medicare, all these individual things. We have to take care of one thing: military protection. We're fighting wars." ([source](https://default.salsalabs.org/Ta9f680af-77bb-465a-bee0-4bb212f4a939/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)) _ Hundreds of billions for an unnecessary war in Iran -- but nothing for Medicare?
