name: Heidi Ganahl
subject: Sunday News Digest: 5/1/2026
body:
Inside our governor candidate Q&A; \+ Greg Gutfeld joins Freedom Fest
| | | | [](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s5nf58ae1f7)
---
**May 3, 2026** **SUNDAY NEWS DIGEST**
| | Dear Rocky Mountain Voice family,
This week, we did something increasingly rare in today’s media environment: **[We gave candidates a chance to speak for themselves.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s5j6690c392)**

No spin. No framing. No narrative shaping. Just their words—directly to you.

With Colorado’s Republican primary for governor approaching, we reached out to every candidate on the ballot and gave them the exact same opportunity: the same six questions, the same deadline, the same platform. Every question came directly from you—our readers—submitted through a public survey because we believe voters should be the ones driving the conversation, not the media.

[Two candidates showed up and answered. One did not.](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s2vdcd9257f)

We followed up. We extended the deadline. We made every effort to ensure equal access. But in the end, only State Sen. Barb Kirkmeyer and State Rep. Scott Bottoms chose to engage.

Elections shouldn’t be decided by headlines or talking points—they should be decided by informed voters who have actually heard from the people asking for their vote. That’s why we didn’t stop at a side-by-side comparison. We also gave each candidate their own space to go deeper—answering individualized questions based on their records, public statements, and the issues you told us you care about most.

This wasn’t about gotcha questions or viral moments. It was about clarity and TRUTH. It was about giving candidates an opportunity to get ahead of the narrative before there was any liberal spin or bias from other media. But most importantly, it was about giving you the information you need to make the most informed decision possible in this primary.
**
****Full articles on Colorado’s Republican governor primary:** 👉 [Where Kirkmeyer and Bottoms stand, and Marx stays silent](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s7h734f7012)
👉 [Scott Bottoms in his own words](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s9v8a803cf6)
👉 [Barb Kirkmeyer in her own words](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/sdua8e3486f)

If you’ve been with us for a while, you know this runs deeper than just one election cycle. Rocky Mountain Voice exists because of a gap we experienced firsthand.

During Heidi’s run for governor, there wasn’t a real platform to communicate directly with voters—without distortion, without selective editing, without narratives being built by outlets that had already made up their minds. Messages were filtered, reframed, and often lost entirely in the noise.

That’s exactly what we set out to change. Not by telling you what to think—but by making sure you actually get to hear what’s being said.

**Unfiltered. Unedited. And in full context.**

And that's exactly the theme we're taking into our Freedom Festival this summer!

This week, we added **Greg Gutfeld** to the RMV Freedom Festival speaker lineup—joining **Nick Shirley** and what’s shaping up to be an incredible group of voices coming this summer. We’ll be announcing more speakers this week, along with the full website and complete lineup.

👉 **[Get your tickets now!](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/sdt6fe6845a)**
👉 Join our **[priority list](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s3tdc61e756)** to be the first to know when new speakers are annoucned!

If you’ve been thinking about coming, now’s the time to lock it in—this event is coming together quickly, and you’re going to want to be part of it.

So as ballots begin to hit mailboxes in just a few weeks, here’s our commitment:
We will continue to ask the questions. We will continue to open the platform. And we will continue to make sure candidates have every opportunity to speak directly to you.

What they do with that opportunity? That’s up to them.
In truth & liberty, Team RMV
---
| | |
---
| | **TOP STORIES OF THE WEEK**
---
**[The lobbying blueprint behind Colorado’s parental rights erosion](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s6k9796ba45)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s6oea30adc3) In 2019, a team of lawyers at one of the world’s largest firms produced a document explaining, in precise detail, how to change the law around children and gender without the public knowing it was happening. That document is now a lens through which Colorado’s last three legislative sessions make a different kind of sense.
**[Colorado’s Republican governor primary: Where Kirkmeyer and Bottoms stand, and Marx stays silent](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s0l346ec715)** BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/sdg18a1cd4c) Three candidates will appear on Colorado’s Republican primary ballot for governor on June 30. Two of them answered questions from Rocky Mountain Voice this month. One did not. State Sen. Barb Kirkmeyer and State Rep. Scott Bottoms each responded to questions drawn from reader submissions and issues facing Republican primary voters.
**[Judge Barrett denies Tina Peters bond, calls future appeals “frivolous”](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s5h16407bf5)** BY JEN SCHUMANN, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/sfo920a5306) Tina Peters will not be released from custody. Judge Matthew Barrett denied her renewed motion for bond pending appeal Tuesday morning—two days after refusing to step aside from her case. The nine-page order keeps Peters in prison while her legal team prepares to take the bond question to the Colorado Court of Appeals, the same panel that threw out her sentence earlier this month.
|
---
**LEGISLATIVE SESSION**
_**Quick Summary of the Week:**_ 🏛️ _**In the Senate:** _ _Senate Democrats advanced several high-profile proposals this week, including _[SB26-146](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/sbud165705f)_ , which would require restaurants to withhold utensils and other items unless requested, raising concerns about added burdens on small businesses. Meanwhile, _[SB26-135](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s1l1d72c2e8)_ continued moving forward, a measure critics warn could allow the state to retain billions in revenue that would otherwise be refunded under TABOR, significantly expanding government spending. The chamber also recognized community events and milestones, including Día del Niño and the official recognition of Denver Summit FC._
🏛️ _**In the House:** It was a contentious week in the House, with Democrats narrowly passing _[HB26-1281](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s3rcb07f325)_ on a 33–32 vote—a bill that lowers penalties for certain “extreme indifference” murder cases, allowing parole eligibility where life without parole previously applied, drawing strong opposition from Republicans who argued it weakens accountability for the most serious crimes. Alongside that debate, lawmakers advanced a slate of bills on agriculture, mental health, education, and regulatory reform, while also pushing measures supporting law enforcement, reducing administrative burdens, and expanding cottage food operations._
📅 **Coming Up This Week:**_With the session entering its final stretch, lawmakers are moving quickly through a packed calendar of major bills, including a trio of tax proposals expected to advance to Senate committees with little notice. Hearings will cover a wide range of issues—from property taxes and healthcare regulations to education policy, gaming, and new constitutional rights litigation frameworks—while late-session dynamics mean schedules are shifting rapidly and _[public testimony](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s0vcb5d59e6)_ opportunities may come with limited warning._
|
---
**[If the state can take property without a conviction, no property is safe](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s0k73d69b09)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s9n182b8c6d)** BY REP. KEN DEGRAAF, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s9i5d21c506) _Civil asset forfeiture began as a narrow exception in colonial maritime law, not as a general tool of domestic policing. In those early admiralty cases, the government often had jurisdiction over the ship or cargo, but not over the owner._

**[Trump’s DOJ joins xAI suit against Colorado AI law as Weiser agrees to halt enforcement](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s6ra1a89e01)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/sfpeac178e7)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s2h41c723ea) The Colorado attorney general agreed last week to stop enforcing the state’s landmark artificial intelligence law. Not because a court told him to. Because he agreed to it himself.____
**[Colorado Bill Could Lock Xcel Customers Into Decades Of Power Plant Costs](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/sci8d4ed2be)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s9vd38fce78)[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s7jf9f10ac9)**[DENVER GAZETTE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/sak0da33f73) State regulators would gain expanded power to order Xcel Energy to finance major costs for its chronically troubled Comanche 3 coal plant through bonds backed by a decades-long charge on every customer’s monthly electric bill.

_**[READ MORE ON LEGISLATIVE SESSION](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s1je643706e)**_
|
---
**STATE**
**[Weiser’s record: A system falling behind](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s6g5fb72342)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s0rc83ce22f)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/saie20223cb) Every time a convicted felon in Colorado decides to fight their case on appeal, the state has to answer. Homicide. Sexual assault. White collar crime. Death row. It doesn’t matter — the Attorney General’s Criminal Appeals Section picks up every one.

**[The $3M campaign behind Colorado’s CoCo rail tax proposal](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s9q1fdd80a5)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s2j20c591c4)** BY SHAINA COLE, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s8ud5bfeca2) The Colorado Department of Transportation had options when describing what $3 million in state transportation funds would buy. Public education. A feasibility study. Community engagement. It called it a Ballot Access Plan.
**[Colorado’s Republican governor primary: Scott Bottoms in his own words](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/seraae1ecf6)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/sev81a23b85)** BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/sci8ea888b7) In five weeks, the candidate who won 45 percent of delegate votes at the GOP state assembly will be a name on a ballot. Scott Bottoms wants them to know exactly where he stands—on everything.

**[Colorado’s Republican governor primary: Barb Kirkmeyer in her own words](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s5k3d1f3859)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/sah0614dabc)** BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s3q9ba45ebc) In five weeks, more than 21,000 petition signatures become a name on a ballot. Barb Kirkmeyer got on that ballot by knocking on doors.
_**[READ MORE STATE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s5q61633cc9)**_
|
---
**NATIONAL**
**[Bongino Fears Retaliation After Uncovering Sensitive Crossfire Hurricane File](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/sbrd2a35da3)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s9lfe429ff3)**[JUST THE NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/scu05e01232) Former FBI Deputy Director Dan Bongino confessed in an interview Tuesday that he lives in constant fear that he’ll face retaliation after he shed light on corruption in the bureau and because of a document he found related to Crossfire Hurricane.
**[Beyond the “kill switch”: How modern vehicles are already tracking drivers](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/sftdc6ad3c7)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s3rfa4cecd1)** BY MARIA ORMS, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s4nbebe98a9) _Many people are talking about the “car surveillance” provision in the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act, which directs regulators to develop technology that can monitor driver impairment—such as passively detecting blood alcohol levels. This has led to claims about a government “kill switch.”_
__
**[Nationwide May Day Protests Spotlight Communist And Socialist Linked Activist Groups](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s9i4d73b9f8)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/sct79964aea)**[FOX NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s6g53897583) Some 600 groups, including hard-line communists and groups affiliated with the Democratic Party, are mobilizing all over the country today to demonstrate for May Day, socialism’s high holy day.
_**[READ MORE NATIONAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/scpd1f12c1d)**_
|
---
**LOCAL**
**[Colorado Student Granted Religious Exemption From School’s Digital Monitoring System](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/ser457302ca)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/sbl2456c1b7)**[WESTWORD](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s3i861fe29e) Hail Satan? A young member of the Satanic Temple was granted a religious accommodation from the Elizabeth School District, arguing that the district’s digital hall pass system conflicts with her beliefs.

**[Colorado Medicaid Cuts Force Aurora Mental Health Provider To Lay Off Over 100 Workers](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s1j6844a614)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s0gdb38e29c)**[COLORADO POLITICS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/set5a08e506) A nonprofit that provides services through 11 mental health centers in Aurora announced Thursday that it is eliminating 111 jobs effective June 30, the result of federal and state budget reductions.

**_[READ MORE LOCAL NEWS](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s4nbbe2dc8a)_**
|
---
**COMMENTARY**
**[The empty pail: The first step up the mountain](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/scu6c281328)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s4jbb9df452)** BY DRAKE HUNTER, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s5rf8130375) _“Jack and Jill went up the hill to fetch a pail of water...” Continuing with last devotion’s rhyme, we often remember the fall... but rarely ask the deeper question: What if they made it to the top... but never learned how to draw from the well?_
__
**[Common Sense, Conservatism, Parties and Other Meaningless Words](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/saua07ef8ea)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s3p45ed6ebf)** BY RUSS MINARY, [ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s8h5351a783) _People use words like common sense or conservatism. Here’s the problem: either words have precise meanings in certain contexts, or they mean precisely nothing. In this article, I’ll put some definitions around a few words – to create some objective truth for a dialogue among reasonable people._
**[Energy Foundation China Has Been Generous to Those Dealing in Colorado Politics](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s9lbfd4f357)**
**[](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s7l758c3b2c)**[COLORADO ACCOUNTABILITY PROJECT](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s4t37f10315) _There is a group named Energy Foundation China, which, though it has a San Francisco address for its headquarters, is strongly tied to Beijing, the Chinese government, and the CCP. Another important thing to note is how generous Energy Foundation China has been to environmental and other nonprofits here in Colorado._ __
**_[READ MORE COMMENTARY](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/saj43cf33e3)_**
|
---
**Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share?** Email [submit@rockymountainvoice.com](mailto:submit@rockymountainvoice.com).
|
---
🦶 **DID YOU KNOW?** In a 1967 mayoral race in Picoazá, Ecuador, a brand of medicated foot powder actually "won" the election as a write-in candidate after running a satirical marketing campaign.
|
---

The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support!
[DONATE TO ROCKY MOUNTAIN VOICE](https://link.email.rockymountainvoice._w/s1u37f6661b)
|

|

BY SHAINA COLE, The Colorado Department of Transportation had options when describing what $3 million in state transportation funds would buy. Public education. A feasibility study. Community engagement. It called it a Ballot Access Plan. BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD, In five weeks, the candidate who won 45 percent of delegate votes at the GOP state assembly will be a name on a ballot. Scott Bottoms wants them to know exactly where he stands—on everything. BY RMV EDITORIAL BOARD, In five weeks, more than 21,000 petition signatures become a name on a ballot. Barb Kirkmeyer got on that ballot by knocking on doors. | NATIONAL Former FBI Deputy Director Dan Bongino confessed in an interview Tuesday that he lives in constant fear that he’ll face retaliation after he shed light on corruption in the bureau and because of a document he found related to Crossfire Hurricane. BY MARIA ORMS, Many people are talking about the “car surveillance” provision in the Infrastructure Investment and Jobs Act, which directs regulators to develop technology that can monitor driver impairment—such as passively detecting blood alcohol levels. This has led to claims about a government “kill switch.” Some 600 groups, including hard-line communists and groups affiliated with the Democratic Party, are mobilizing all over the country today to demonstrate for May Day, socialism’s high holy day. | LOCAL Hail Satan? A young member of the Satanic Temple was granted a religious accommodation from the Elizabeth School District, arguing that the district’s digital hall pass system conflicts with her beliefs. A nonprofit that provides services through 11 mental health centers in Aurora announced Thursday that it is eliminating 111 jobs effective June 30, the result of federal and state budget reductions. | COMMENTARY BY DRAKE HUNTER, “Jack and Jill went up the hill to fetch a pail of water...” Continuing with last devotion’s rhyme, we often remember the fall... but rarely ask the deeper question: What if they made it to the top... but never learned how to draw from the well? BY RUSS MINARY, People use words like common sense or conservatism. Here’s the problem: either words have precise meanings in certain contexts, or they mean precisely nothing. In this article, I’ll put some definitions around a few words – to create some objective truth for a dialogue among reasonable people. There is a group named Energy Foundation China, which, though it has a San Francisco address for its headquarters, is strongly tied to Beijing, the Chinese government, and the CCP. Another important thing to note is how generous Energy Foundation China has been to environmental and other nonprofits here in Colorado. | Feel like you have a unique story or commentary to share? Email mailto:submit@rockymountainvoice.com. | 🦶 DID YOU KNOW? In a 1967 mayoral race in Picoazá, Ecuador, a brand of medicated foot powder actually "won" the election as a write-in candidate after running a satirical marketing campaign. | The Rocky Mountain Voice is a 501(c)(3) that exists to promote informed civic engagement and the principles of self-governance through enterprise reporting on public policy, politics, government, and culture throughout the state of Colorado. The only way we can continue to spread truth is with your support! | QUOTE OF THE DAY "No one leads until someone serves." – Howard E. Look, here’s what’s going on:

Over the past year, we’ve built an incredible grassroots movement. We’ve traveled to every corner of this state. We broke fundraising records. And against all odds – we took a narrow lead in the polls.

**But then, my billionaire opponent began unloading his massive warchest against us. He wrote his own campaign a check for $25 million. He poured $10 MILLION into ads to soften his extreme image and to spread ugly, baseless attacks against me.**

This will be a toss-up battle all the way to Election Day. Experts say it’ll be the most expensive governor's race in Ohio history.

I’m not a billionaire. But I’m confident that together — when folks like you chip in $10 or $25 at a time — we can take back our lead and win this race.

### Hello Capitalists,
After months of requests from many of you, we're excited to officially launch The Capitalist Portal in collaboration with SubStack. Our new **[exclusive community](https://substack.com/redirect/63371337-5ee5-4a80-af9a-85358c0342fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for paid subscribers.
[Just click here](https://substack.com/redirect/63371337-5ee5-4a80-af9a-85358c0342fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)

For just **[$6 a month](https://substack.com/redirect/7980bd13-c66d-486d-a57c-dd3a7f343a55?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** , you now get direct access to a private space where we deliver up-to-the-minute economic and financial news, analysis, and commentary as it breaks.
More importantly, you'll be able to discuss these breaking developments in real time with a like-minded audience and the Capitalist team.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/63371337-5ee5-4a80-af9a-85358c0342fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **No more shouting into the void of social media or wading through comment sections full of noise.**
* **This is an environment built for people who actually want to understand and discuss what 's happening in the markets, the economy, and the policy decisions driving it. **
* **Discuss the moves and pick up insights outside of the daily newsletter.**

Whether it's a surprise Fed move, a major corporate earnings report After Hours, or the latest regulatory nonsense coming out of Washington, you'll be able to jump in and discuss it with fellow Capitalists and our staff the moment it happens.
**[The portal is live right now for all paid subscribers.](https://substack.com/redirect/63371337-5ee5-4a80-af9a-85358c0342fc?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**

We built a newsletter that cuts through the noise. Now we're building the conversation to go with it.
Welcome to the inner circle.
Talk soon,
**The Capitalist Team**

name: America Fitzpatrick, LCV
subject: Tell Congress: Hands Off Grand Staircase-Escalante!
body:
To view this mail in a browser, copy https://links.messages.lcv.org/servlet/MailView?ms=MTM2ODAxMzQS1&r=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&j=MjQ2MDUxNjg4MgS2&mt=1&rt=0 into your browser.
Hands Off Grand Staircase-Escalante!

Trump’s Republican allies in Congress are trying to gut protections for Grand Staircase-Escalante National Monument in Utah. The environmental movement must speak up loud and clear: hands off our public lands!

LCV is calling on Congress to reject this legislative attack. We must keep up
public pressure to maintain protections for Grand Staircase-Escalante National
Monument and all our treasured public lands.

Tell Congress: Protect Grand Staircase-Escalante National Monumen https://links.messages.lcv. ADD YOUR NAME https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Ap9dcpP_ Peter, The same Republicans who have long wanted to sell off our public lands are back
at it — this time they’ve introduced legislation to gut protections for Grand
Staircase-Escalante National Monument in southern Utah. This legislation, introduced by Sen. Mike Lee and Rep. Celeste Maloy, is an
unprecedented attempt to overturn a national monument’s management plan to open
up these treasured places to more extraction, serving corporate interests. If it
succeeds, this maneuver could become part of the MAGA playbook for dismantling
protections for even more of our culturally rich national monuments and
treasured public lands. We can’t let this happen. Tell Congress: Protect Grand Staircase-Escalante National Monument! https://links.messages.lcv. Grand Staircase-Escalante National Monument spans nearly 1.9 million acres of
canyons, ancient fossil beds, sacred cultural sites, and essential wildlife
habitat. It’s home to bighorn sheep, mule deer, and endangered and protected
species like the California condor and bald eagle. Overturning the management
plan puts all this, and more, at risk. Current protections reflect years of scientific research, public comment, and
collaboration with Tribal coalitions and local communities. If enacted, this
legislation would strip critical protections away — and the consequences could
extend far beyond Utah and this monument. We need to make sure this doesn’t become the blueprint for dismantling national
monuments across the country. Don’t wait — send your message to Congress now. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/rNykfExRkDT- Speak up with LCV today and help keep our public lands protected for future
generations. Thank you for taking action for people and our planet. America Fitzpatrick
Conservation Program Director
League of Conservation Voters This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you,update your contact information https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=13680134&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjQ2MDUxNjg4MgS2&spReportId=MjQ2MDUxNjg4MgS2.Click here to unsubscribe https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/Unsubscribe?spMailingID=13680134&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MjQ2MDUxNjg4MgS2&spReportId=MjQ2MDUxNjg4MgS2 from our supporter list.Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback here mailto:feedback@lcv.org?subject=, or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

740 15th St NW, Suite 700
Washington, DC 20005
202-785-8683 DONATE https://links.messages.lcv.

body:
The scale of the fight we’re up against is unprecedented — and our budgets must be, too
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130686014/618572890/-3547583?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0YTg2YWQ0LTQzNDctZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=b2RU9CNfFO2gp0aP8j-_7bzy4Bwpc1cogFVxK8e7ONo=&emci=00de492d-a045-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&emdi=04a86ad4-4347-f111-8ef2-000d3a14b640&ceid=8431045)
---

Peter, The Supreme Court’s decision to strip protections guaranteeing voters of color the fair representation they deserve is already rippling into battleground states nationwide. And now, Arizona is one of them. The Senate president in Arizona has discussed pursuing a legal challenge to the state’s current map, a move to dilute — or potentially eliminate — Latino voting power. Look: Arizona has two congressional districts and seven state legislative districts that are majority-Latino. And some Republicans see this week’s Supreme Court ruling as an invitation to weaken or outright eliminate Latino representation. **This is horrifying — and it’s the kind of cynical garbage we should expect now that the Supreme Court gutted the Voting Rights Act.** As if that weren’t bad enough, Arizona isn’t the only state attempting power plays in the wake of this ruling. Florida passed their new gerrymander the same day the ruling was handed down, and there have been rumblings about rapid redraws in Louisiana, Mississippi, and Alabama. **Peter, the scale of the fight we’re up against is unprecedented — and our budgets must be too. This is a time for all hands on deck.** [**Rush a donation to help defeat anti-democracy attempts to gut equal representation in Arizona and across the country.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130686015/618572891/1630712388?refcode=don_ndrc_tier1_email_AZAlert_email_20260503-NDRC-Tier1-AZAlert_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20260503-NDRC-Tier1-AZAlert_&utm_campaign=AZAlert&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk0IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjA0YTg2YWQ0LTQzNDctZjExMS04ZWYyLTAwMGQzYTE0YjY0MCIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=b2RU9CNfFO2gp0aP8j-_7bzy4Bwpc1cogFVxK8e7ONo=) | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

clean_body: The scale of the fight we’re up against is unprecedented — and our budgets must be, too | Peter, The Supreme Court’s decision to strip protections guaranteeing voters of color the fair representation they deserve is already rippling into battleground states nationwide. And now, Arizona is one of them. The Senate president in Arizona has discussed pursuing a legal challenge to the state’s current map, a move to dilute — or potentially eliminate — Latino voting power. Look: Arizona has two congressional districts and seven state legislative districts that are majority-Latino. And some Republicans see this week’s Supreme Court ruling as an invitation to weaken or outright eliminate Latino representation. This is horrifying — and it’s the kind of cynical garbage we should expect now that the Supreme Court gutted the Voting Rights Act. As if that weren’t bad enough, Arizona isn’t the only state attempting power plays in the wake of this ruling. Florida passed their new gerrymander the same day the ruling was handed down, and there have been rumblings about rapid redraws in Louisiana, Mississippi, and Alabama. Peter, the scale of the fight we’re up against is unprecedented — and our budgets must be too. This is a time for all hands on deck. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thanks so much, The National Democratic Redistricting Committee = = | | Paid for by the National Democratic Redistricting Committee, John Bisognano, President. | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|---|--- National Democratic Redistricting Committee 712 H St NE, #25 Washington, DC 20002 United States if you'd like to receive fewer emails from the NDRC. In TX-03 specifically his approval has slipped to 45.6% and is still heading south.

Keith Self has spent every day of this Congress as the most enthusiastic cheerleader for an agenda that has brought this country to the brink of global recession and open-ended war in a matter of months. This is exactly the moment we have been building toward and the summer field organizing work ahead of us is where races like this one get won or lost. Every door knocked between now and November is a conversation that shows fed up voters of all stripes that a real alternative is on the ballot. A combat veteran who lives here, shows up, and actually gives a damn about the cost of groceries and the families being torn apart by masked federal agents while their congressman is busy rubber stamping an agenda that six in ten Americans want no part of. clean_body: Watch our latest interview and see why this race is moving our way. | | Peter, Last month election forecasters named TX-03 the most likely surprise flip in Texas and suddenly everyone wants to talk about what is happening here. My latest appearance on the Breaking The Meta Podcast dropped this weekend and I walked through exactly why this race is moving our way. You can watch . | National, state, and independent media are paying attention to our race because the numbers are genuinely hard to ignore. Trump's approval rating has hit 34% in the latest Pew poll with his cost of living numbers even worse at net negative 41. In TX-03 specifically his approval has slipped to 45.6% and is still heading south. Keith Self has spent every day of this Congress as the most enthusiastic cheerleader for an agenda that has brought this country to the brink of global recession and open-ended war in a matter of months. This is exactly the moment we have been building toward and the summer field organizing work ahead of us is where races like this one get won or lost. Every door knocked between now and November is a conversation that shows fed up voters of all stripes that a real alternative is on the ballot. A combat veteran who lives here, shows up, and actually gives a damn about the cost of groceries and the families being torn apart by masked federal agents while their congressman is busy rubber stamping an agenda that six in ten Americans want no part of. We have been on podcast after podcast and interview after interview making the case to voters and organizers across the country the TX-03 flip is for real. And that 's all thanks to you. Supporters are filling rooms in places Keith Self used to call his own. Activists are investing in a race that nobody thought was possible a year ago. And neighbors are having conversations that are changing minds block by block. Very respectfully, Evan Hunt Democratic Nominee TX-03 | | | Evan Hunt is a combat aviator and veteran, a community and business leader, and a Texas family man, running against MAGA Rep. * * *
Anti-ICE rioters in New York City attacked U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement agents and city police officers while attempting to leave the Wyckoff Heights Medical Center in Brooklyn early Sunday morning.
According to the Department of Homeland Security spokesperson, ICE agents arrested Chidozie Wilson Okeke, "a criminal illegal alien from Nigeria with previous arrests for assault and criminal drug possession."
Okeke entered the United States on August 27, 2023, on a tourist visa that required him to depart the U.S. on February 26, 2024.
His initial arrest did not go smoothly because "Okeke refused to comply with officers' lawful commands to exit the vehicle and weaponized his vehicle to attempt to hit ICE officers. Okeke became physically combative attempting to punch and elbow ICE officers."

That's exactly what happened to Mark Cuban... a 799,900% return, gone.

_**(Piece continues below)**_
After the arrest, "Okeke requested medical assistance, so ICE officers escorted him to Wyckoff Heights Medical Center for a medical evaluation. Okeke remained non-compliant during the medical evaluation throwing himself to the floor and screaming. The medical staff cleared him."
It was during that hospital visit where an anti-ICE crowd gathered outside and attempted to prevent agents from leaving, resulting in the NYPD having to intervene. It is unknown at this time how word spread quickly of ICE's presence at the hospital.
"The protestors damaged several ICE vehicles and assaulted ICE officers, resulting in minor injuries to the officers. Assaulting law enforcement is a felony and crime. Officers from the New York Police Department responded to the scene and arrested several rioters," DHS said.
Video taken during the clashes shows rioters throwing objects in the roadway and pushing themselves to get closer, fighting with officers while federal agents moved Okeke into a vehicle.
Okeke can be seen continuing to be uncooperative while agents were moving him.

I am reaching out today because the threat to our democracy has never been more immediate or more local. The GOP-captured Supreme Court just repealed a key provision of the Voting Rights Act that guaranteed minority voters congressional representation. This now gives state legislatures and Governors the power to redraw district maps. **To force this through quickly, Governor Bill Lee has officially called a special session, forcing state lawmakers back to the State Capitol to redraw the maps. ** Let me say it plainly: This is a racist power grab designed to silence minority voters and cement a Republican supermajority forever. It is a new Jim Crow South. **We refuse to sit back and let Republicans and a politicized Supreme Court rig the system while Tennesseans, and all Americans, are left to pay the price.** But we cannot fight back without the resources to organize on the ground. We need an immediate surge of donations to stop them. **[Will you rush a $15 donation right now to immediately take the fight to MAGA here in Tennessee?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130686519/618574383/1709264364?refcode=260503-email&Refcode=260503-email-dcs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2ZjYTdlZS00NDQ3LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3TgYbtSbJVLxjXD3WVzLpBvGbXn-5i9ywuHs-Hl-dzE=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [EXPRESS DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/130686520/618574384/-1270985636?refcode=260503-email&amount=10&Refcode=260503-email-dcs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NzEzNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2ZjYTdlZS00NDQ3LWYxMTEtOGVmMi0wMDBkM2ExNGI2NDAiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3TgYbtSbJVLxjXD3WVzLpBvGbXn-5i9ywuHs-Hl-dzE=)

subject: MAGA declares “state of emergency” in Louisiana to go after dems

body:
This is a manufactured “state of emergency” to cancel the May 16th election.
| | | | | [](https://r6msg8hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wgIYg_aGcmTIj0BrYqjwqWMsKrHupCoggE5DVZTZBhxWGdYADjzKZm-jdo0lXzlcVEs1QD76dsAQYF_4CIkIlk1Jk5FheE41zjpT9pdaBsUgFmtRL7X-yqjxfLaZvUXC7zJdBSTxf39cTS2dYw0e90mr8-iKBn06eyHrmfQU1XVt8TbR6M27HAgTaHfPUuyRXNuh3hyl9wCSEdoUu1JtJ-rnEwcXOi6I&c=76lx7X1fJoSQvCQkwxQVt9A0BgeHThXI5dUmlq37ORYS61NX0b_iFQ==&ch=o6hE379-KVsTtWwlwzaKvwtwfhoe2zwktV_aAWyZfu-XHG87k_5Uyg==)

Peter, The MAGA extremist Governor of Louisiana just declared a "state of emergency" as a pretext to cancel the May 16th election.
They are using this emergency to eliminate seats that Black people have been elected to, and now they are outright canceling an entire election in order to try and gerrymander the only two Black House members from Louisiana out of office.
---
| [](https://r6msg8hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wgIYg_aGcmTIj0BrYqjwqWMsKrHupCoggE5DVZTZBhxWGdYADjzKZm-jdo0lXzlcVEs1QD76dsAQYF_4CIkIlk1Jk5FheE41zjpT9pdaBsUgFmtRL7X-yqjxfLaZvUXC7zJdBSTxf39cTS2dYw0e90mr8-iKBn06eyHrmfQU1XVt8TbR6M27HAgTaHfPUuyRXNuh3hyl9wB602bV_7BYDt1ef6NQPFoO&c=76lx7X1fJoSQvCQkwxQVt9A0BgeHThXI5dUmlq37ORYS61NX0b_iFQ==&ch=o6hE379-KVsTtWwlwzaKvwtwfhoe2zwktV_aAWyZfu-XHG87k_5Uyg==)
---
They had this planned the whole time. What kind of perfect timing to have the case that rolled back the Voting Rights Act come down the pipe 9 days before early voting starts.
The Governor had warned fellow Republicans that these races would be canceled.
That just goes to show how much planning MAGA puts into disenfranchising voters and making a mockery of democracy.
The truth is, having these people in power is the real emergency.
There is an emergency in Louisiana. And it is definitely not fair maps that protect the rights of Black voters.
There are a number of emergencies in this nation: poverty, unaffordable healthcare, people working for wages who can't afford the basics of life and instead of tackling these issues, MAGA would rather declare a fake state of emergency to redraw maps that protect their ability to drag all of us back to the way things were before the Civil Rights movement.
But we won't abide by Jim Crow 2.0--we are going to fight like hell to stop this bullshit from continuing.
They are fooling around with democracy, and they are about to find out.
They're going to find out that when people vote, their corrupt and cruel policies are the minority, and people who are tired of their Jim Crow antics are the real majority. [I need your urgent support to wage this fight, a fight for our basic rights and to save what is left of minority power in the South. Will you stand with us today?](https://r6msg8hbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001wgIYg_aGcmTIj0BrYqjwqWMsKrHupCoggE5DVZTZBhxWGdYADjzKZm-jdo0lXzlcEFNQSN2ZWOWus4mPw9OxAKZP5KMG7MzSeMnAVdAVhnWCi4-Omno9Bo1cgfPONbcb9g5UmTxfSrLYdtBW7DprcwFm4knKxdyyCrxcIo2qPbyBw5UQkP6LdHNaO7MHyT1hA72BCTjWMDtWPKIWjLfJD922n3JgeGAnECHFgWINcOo=&c=76lx7X1fJoSQvCQkwxQVt9A0BgeHThXI5dUmlq37ORYS61NX0b_iFQ==&ch=o6hE379-KVsTtWwlwzaKvwtwfhoe2zwktV_aAWyZfu-XHG87k_5Uyg==)

clean_body: This is a manufactured “state of emergency” to cancel the May 16th election. | | | | | == Peter, The MAGA extremist Governor of Louisiana just declared a "state of emergency" as a pretext to cancel the May 16th election. They are using this emergency to eliminate seats that Black people have been elected to, and now they are outright canceling an entire election in order to try and gerrymander the only two Black House members from Louisiana out of office. | == They had this planned the whole time. What kind of perfect timing to have the case that rolled back the Voting Rights Act come down the pipe 9 days before early voting starts. The Governor had warned fellow Republicans that these races would be canceled. That just goes to show how much planning MAGA puts into disenfranchising voters and making a mockery of democracy. The truth is, having these people in power is the real emergency. There is an emergency in Louisiana. And it is definitely not fair maps that protect the rights of Black voters. There are a number of emergencies in this nation: poverty, unaffordable healthcare, people working for wages who can't afford the basics of life and instead of tackling these issues, MAGA would rather declare a fake state of emergency to redraw maps that protect their ability to drag all of us back to the way things were before the Civil Rights movement. But we won't abide by Jim Crow 2.0--we are going to fight like hell to stop this bullshit from continuing. They are fooling around with democracy, and they are about to find out. They're going to find out that when people vote, their corrupt and cruel policies are the minority, and people who are tired of their Jim Crow antics are the real majority. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | We're going to tell folks straight up: what MAGA is doing here in Louisiana is racist and wrong, plain and simple. And together we will fight back and win. In Solidarity, Jamie Davis Democrat for Senate | | == | | | == | | == | == == == == Mail checks to: Jamie Davis for U.S. Senate PO Box 55 Ferriday, LA 71334 | Paid for by Jamie Davis for U.S. Senate | | | | Jamie for Louisiana | PO Box 55 | Ferriday, LA 71334 US |

Sorry to bump this so soon, Peter, but listen:
**Senate control hinges on North Carolina.**

That's why the GOP is committing to pour tens of millions into the race to smear Roy's record of delivering real change and defeat him. He simply cannot fight back without people like you by his side.
**[We just need a handful of signatures to reach our 50,000 endorsement goal and prove the people-powered strength of Roy's campaign. | | | | High school dropout. Waffle House waitress. First woman to graduate from The Citadel. Single mom. Fighter.

Nancy Mace wasn’t born into power. She worked for every inch of ground she’s gained.

At 17, she dropped out of high school and took a job slinging hash browns at Waffle House to survive. No silver spoon. No Ivy League connections. Just grit, grace, and a whole lot of graveyard shifts.

By the grace of God, she turned that struggle into a story no politician can touch. She made history as the first woman to graduate from The Citadel, South Carolina’s legendary military college. She built her own business. She raised two kids on her own. And when the Left came for everything she believed in, she stood her ground. Now, she’s running for Governor of South Carolina.

Nancy Mace is a battle-tested conservative who’s walked through fire and come out swinging. In Congress, she’s been one of President Trump’s fiercest allies, fighting to secure our border, protect our daughters, and stop the Left’s sick agenda dead in its tracks.

She’s not here to make friends. She’s here to make history.

Nancy is fighting to:

* Eliminate South Carolina’s Income Tax—the highest in the Southeast

* Prosecute violent criminals and pedophiles with zero leniency

* Crack down on sanctuary sheriffs who let illegal aliens roam free

* Defund radical public universities that indoctrinate, not educate

* Reform education so students learn how to think—not what to think

* Work hand-in-hand with President Trump to put South Carolina FIRST

Through every hardship, Nancy never gave up. And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front.

South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started.
---
| | | | |
---
| | | Paid for by Nancy Mace For Governor
---
| | Copyright © 2025 , All rights reserved.
You are receiving this email because you are interested in updates.
295 Seven Farms Drive, Suite C-186
Charleston, SC 29492

And now she’s ready to do what she’s always done: roll up her sleeves, take the heat, and lead from the front. South Carolina is worth fighting for. And Nancy Mace is just getting started. | | | | | | | | Paid for by Nancy Mace For Governor | | Copyright © 2025 , All rights reserved.

**1.2%.** That’s the margin of Jon Ossoff’s victory in the 2021 Georgia Senate runoff. We have to be prepared for this race to be just as close, which means we have to build the resources to win **now.** [**If that’s all you need to hear, chip in here.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-may26.KE07xH&refcode=em260503-1-f&t=2&akid=2219%2E5691347%2EiF5mgO)
Let us explain:
In 2021, this grassroots team elected Jon to the U.S. Senate and secured a Senate majority for Democrats by building the biggest voter mobilization program Georgia has ever seen.
Our work was — and continues to be — fueled by everyday people chipping in $5, $10, or $25 at a time because Jon’s campaign won’t accept contributions from corporate PACs or federal lobbyists.
So while Republican Super PACs try to buy this election, we are running a grassroots campaign made up of lots and lots of people chipping in what they can, when they can.
We can reelect Jon. We can win back the Senate majority. _But we can’t do it alone._

name: James Talarico
subject: My commencement address
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter —
I had the honor of delivering the commencement address yesterday at Paul Quinn College — it’s the oldest HBCU in Texas.
[](http://act.jamestalarico.com/go/2282?t=1&akid=615%2E1347274%2ElmnLQk)
As a former teacher, graduation days are always special to me. The world these young people are graduating into is not easy.
I called my speech “Unshakeable Things: Gen Z and the New Great Awakening” because, as I told the graduates, I believe we are on the verge of a New Great Awakening. This generation — with disillusionment as their superpower — will lead us.
I want to share an excerpt of what I said below. **[If you’d like to see the full address or send it to a young graduate you know, you can watch it here.](http://act.jamestalarico.com/go/2282?t=2&akid=615%2E1347274%2ElmnLQk)**
_Paul Quinn College was not built by politicians. It was built by Black preachers holding classes in church basements and living rooms just seven years after emancipation came to Texas.

For 154 years, Quinnites have been guided by a deep moral commitment to all of God’s children — regardless of their skin color or their zip code.

This place has spiritual roots. This place is rooted in faith, in service, and in love. Today, I want to call you to live out of those roots.

When this school fell on hard times, God sent a teacher, a leader, a visionary — Dr. Michael Sorrell — to pick up the pieces.

Dr. Sorrell returned this school to its roots. He doubled down on serving the poor and the marginalized. He transformed this college into one of the best HBCUs in the country and sparked a revolution in the process.

I’m reminded of the words of scripture: “The stone the builders rejected has become the cornerstone.” In this new world Dr. Sorrell is building, all who have been counted out, who have been left behind, who have been forgotten — the stones the builders rejected — will be the cornerstone. A revolution from below.

Because in the words of Dr. Sorrell himself, “in the history of mankind, how many revolutions have started from above?"

You may not believe that a world rooted in faith, service, and love is possible.

In your short lives, you’ve seen a pandemic and an insurrection, natural disasters and artificial intelligence, mass shootings and mass deportations. All piped through your screen into your soul. You have scrolled through more suffering, more division, more chaos than any generation in human history.

You’ve grown up in an economy that isn’t built for you. The American Dream is on life support. 90% of Baby Boomers went on to earn more money than their parents. For Millennials, it’s 50%. For Gen Z, it’s even lower.

And we know that Black Texans have 10 times less wealth and are half as likely to own a home.

This current cost of living crisis is the culmination of 50 years of trickle down economics. 50 years of the top 1% rigging this economic system and this political system for their own benefit — at our expense.

Young people can’t buy a home, but Jeff Bezos has 12. Young people can’t afford to fill up their gas tank, but Mark Zuckerberg is launching helicopters from his mega-yacht. Young people pay more than their fair share of income taxes, but Elon Musk can get away with not paying a penny.

All this has left your generation disillusioned.

Disillusionment has a bad reputation. But being disillusioned means being freed from illusions — to see reality. To know the truth. As painful as it may be, your disillusionment is a superpower. You can see the world as it is and dream of the way it ought to be.

...

Scripture tells us, “All of creation will be shaken, so that only unshakable things will remain.

The world as we know it is shaking — the old certainties, the old institutions, the old corruption. The old world is dying — and a new one is struggling to be born.

In the rubble of this shaken world, you’ll find the stones the builders rejected. The people who have been told they’re too poor, too different, too young to matter. You will be the cornerstone of a new world built on unshakable things: faith, service, and love.”_
James Talarico
Our movement is part of this fight to shake the world and the corrupt institutions that protect a broken status quo. It will require a multi-generational effort. Each of us has a role to play to build the future we want.
[**If you are tired of the corruption in Washington, please consider making a contribution today to our people-powered movment. Every dollar will help us usher in a new era of our democracy and economy that puts working people first.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q2.t_pReT&refcode=em260503-2-ak&t=3&akid=615%2E1347274%2ElmnLQk)**
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-2026q2.t_pReT&refcode=em260503-2-ak&t=4&akid=615%2E1347274%2ElmnLQk)

Paid for by Talarico for Texas
Talarico for Texas
PO Box 14508
Austin, TX 78761
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update your contact information, [**you can submit this form.**](https://act.jamestalarico.com/signup/update-info/?t=5&akid=615%2E1347274%2ElmnLQk) Looking for Team Talarico merch? [**Check out our online store!**](https://store.jamestalarico.com?utm_source=em_footer&utm_campaign=em_footer) This is a grassroots movement to take back Texas for working people. [**Please consider making a contribution to support our fight today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jt-em-launch?refcode=em_footer&t=6&refcode2=615_1347274_lmnLQk&akid=615%2E1347274%2ElmnLQk)
James is grateful to have you in our movement. We try to send only the most important updates and opportunities to participate via email, but if you want to, you can [unsubscribe here](https://act.jamestalarico.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=7&akid=615%2E1347274%2ElmnLQk).

name: Spencer Pratt
subject: I’m running for Mayor, here’s why
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pratt for Mayor 2026 (FPPC ID 1485940)
body:
And for a year, I listened to the media and California officials do nothing but pedal the machine designed to protect the people at the top and the friends they exchange favors with, while the rest of us drowned in toxic smoke and ash.

**I know what you’re thinking:_Spencer Pratt is running for Mayor?_ **

YES - it’s true.

And if you know me, you know I don’t hold back, and I’m not afraid to say what everyone else is thinking but won’t say out loud.

And if you don’t know me, well, you are about to find out what I’m talking about.

One year ago, my home was destroyed during the devastating Pacific Palisades wildfires.

[ ](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/PskdbM3znfufdmoQ50gBNPOYSCw2d4xMxdGY99VriWSeQwigrZzaou5cxSJD4hQaWHEzm43tc-tPYBhR6wrj2wJJOfC9A-HJo5ulY5jvVgE9_SJ7Zl-5696_RVwcIb2fkbWAJ7SIfXJHOlXbY1i4TM7bzYgoWWWyvD2kstp00P32GCZe6sTG-BdN0O6jID8qidUT0KWdlQVSC3TMBGsswDu2ouB22sS0GuDREeuEuIQ7tRHp3S8VuJvE4qSF4TGG2tfhYDJtk92B5c0fvthAqmUn1cn5SkHZ9y73fxe8Z38Vr3HK2w8duzb6XSV15orMAiAJCMl0Ljb-lkoeosPXb_1zJeqmJY6-X8ggNIBQ93xUaFHRzbCa8j-yoef1p8c62-3OFjGQ7-RWyaR_pPAHVXBJdKNQzC5ORMQnxpLGgI9Fxctkwrp2_M7nKqqh8S-8SRsuRt6-1gPiueqDJr9TEW0Tvxn7i9kdfbmWM4cUYeFD69rSr322pDaGwfhGEHLnr6eoWhfK8TauMBzf9N2Bnzny9UTAMBxxtqzg5RVLUWqmhhnO9j1r5EUwWRLAMSKlQ2dacNkp5KERuNhxIzSy_bVx2xSfC6lBezwuytX36psmdwuIj40HMkepPo3ZuUl3BReegUwPPZ_gmHa2ImLIua03uXp4IVWmN0LEm71zmbATk3kqQ60igw5k3tU_FmrTivynAv3tmrAK/BQVHEVdnnKFEQk9Iol2pGzDRs77fIoT2/20)
And for a year, I listened to the media and California officials do nothing but pedal the machine designed to protect the people at the top and the friends they exchange favors with, while the rest of us drowned in toxic smoke and ash.

Let’s be real: the system in Los Angeles isn’t struggling, it’s fundamentally broken.**Business as usual is a death sentence for Los Angeles,** and I’m done waiting for someone to take real action.

That’s why I am running for mayor. This just isn’t a campaign; this is a mission, and **we’re gonna expose the system.**

clean_body: And for a year, I listened to the media and California officials do nothing but pedal the machine designed to protect the people at the top and the friends they exchange favors with, while the rest of us drowned in toxic smoke and ash. I know what you’re thinking:Spencer Pratt is running for Mayor? YES - it’s true. And if you know me, you know I don’t hold back, and I’m not afraid to say what everyone else is thinking but won’t say out loud. And if you don’t know me, well, you are about to find out what I’m talking about. One year ago, my home was destroyed during the devastating Pacific Palisades wildfires. And for a year, I listened to the media and California officials do nothing but pedal the machine designed to protect the people at the top and the friends they exchange favors with, while the rest of us drowned in toxic smoke and ash. Let’s be real: the system in Los Angeles isn’t struggling, it’s fundamentally broken.Business as usual is a death sentence for Los Angeles, and I’m done waiting for someone to take real action. That’s why I am running for mayor. This just isn’t a campaign; this is a mission, and we’re gonna expose the system. Friend, I’d love to have you on my team. I’m relying on the support of people like you to stand up to the recycled politicians and DEMAND change. | I wouldn’t run unless I believed we could win. And I wouldn’t ask unless it truly mattered. Let’s do this. — Spencer Pratt Candidate for Mayor Pacific Palisades Resident Karen Bass’s Worst Nightmare Paid for by Pratt for Mayor 2026 (FPPC ID 1485940) Pratt for Mayor 2026 970 Seacoast Drive, Suite 7 Imperial Beach, CA 91932. subject: The stakes just got higher

body:
We’re the top Democratic campaign in this race—and if we can’t stand up against Hilton’s spending, our worst-case scenario becomes a reality.
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103136?refcode=em20260503-10379&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10379%2E614464%2EePvAks)
Peter,
Poppy managed to score 3 bagels off the counter today while I was baking. While she’s in her carb coma, I’ve got a quick note for you.
**Trump endorsing Steve Hilton changes this race up big time.**
His endorsement comes with a surge of support from the very same MAGA allies who are working hard to bring his agenda to California.
We’re the top Democratic campaign in this race—and if we can’t stand up against Hilton’s spending, our worst-case scenario becomes a reality:
**TWO Republicans advancing to the general election, locking Democrats out and virtually flipping the state red.**
**[Can I count on you to pitch in a split donation of $15 or whatever makes sense to you between my campaign and State Democrats Committee to sustain our fight and keep California blue?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/103136?refcode=em20260503-10379&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=2&akid=10379%2E614464%2EePvAks)**

name: Rep. John Ray Clemmons
subject: Urgent gathering supporting the TN House Dems | TOMORROW
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus | Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer
body:
https://tnhousedems.com/ [https://tnhousedems.com/]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/prespecialmay4?refcode=email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/prespecialmay4?refcode=email]
Peter,
Governor Lee has called a special session to push through new, gerrymandered maps that further divide Memphis and Nashville so Republicans can rig the mid-term elections.
We must fight like hell, and we have to do it now.
Tomorrow, Monday, May 4th , I’m hosting a “flash fundraiser” at my home for the House Democratic Caucus. My colleagues and I head back in session on Tuesday, and we will be fighting for voting rights and real representation. But we truly need your support to do it. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/prespecialmay4?refcode=email]
If you can, I hope you’ll join us in person.
If you can’t be there, your support is still absolutely crucial. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/prespecialmay4?refcode=email]
Please RSVP at the link below to receive the address and/or to chip in whatever you can:
RSVP & DONATE HERE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/prespecialmay4?refcode=email]
They are trying to silence our voices. Let’s make sure they hear us loud and clear.
Thank you for standing with us,
Rep. John Ray Clemmons
TN House Democratic Caucus Chair
P.S. Every dollar helps us organize, communicate, and push back against this power grab in the days ahead. Please give what you can today: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/prespecialmay4?refcode=email [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/prespecialmay4?refcode=email]

My colleagues and I head back in session on Tuesday, and we will be fighting for voting rights and real representation. But we truly need your support to do it. [] If you can, I hope you’ll join us in person. If you can’t be there, your support is still absolutely crucial. [] Please RSVP at the link below to receive the address and/or to chip in whatever you can: RSVP & DONATE HERE [] They are trying to silence our voices. Let’s make sure they hear us loud and clear. Thank you for standing with us, Rep. John Ray Clemmons TN House Democratic Caucus Chair P.S. Every dollar helps us organize, communicate, and push back against this power grab in the days ahead. Please give what you can today: [] DONATE [] Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus | Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer Tennessee House Democratic Caucus P. O. Box 198082 Nashville, TN 37219 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

name: The Democrats
subject: Only 6 months left
body:
---
Derek, **There are only 6 months until Election Day.** That means we have 6 months to reach as many voters as possible to ensure everybody has a plan to vote for Democrats up and down the ballot this November. 6 months to register as many new Democratic voters as we can in key battleground states. 6 months to keep funneling resources to state parties to ensure they have the resources they need to win down-ballot. **6 months to get out the message: Trump and Republicans’ agenda is harming millions of Americans — and we’re not even halfway into Trump’s second term._This is our best chance to stop him._** The DNC is the only organization working around the clock to elect Democrats at all levels of government, in every corner of the country, _every single year_. We’re on the ground organizing across the country to reach Democrats everywhere and ensure we have the strongest possible infrastructure headed into November’s midterms. [**We MUST win back the House and the Senate to put a massive check on Trump’s power. If you’re with us, we hope you’ll use this link to chip in $7 directly to the DNC today to help power our work nationwide.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-gfr?refcode=em_20260503_6983_fr&amount=7&refcode2=6983_22930333_PrSZrM&akid=6983%2E22930333%2EPrSZrM) _If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._ | | | **[Donate $7](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-may-2026-gfr?express_lane=true&amount=7&refcode=em_20260503_6983_fr&refcode2=6983_22930333_PrSZrM&akid=6983%2E22930333%2EPrSZrM)**
